This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from _The Guardian_ :"_Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division._ "This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. **Are we surprised? No.** But this action -- _though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years_ \-- highlights how badly **we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens** , from the outside of government. **[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110016617/552989439/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=VMZqzby172R/FJROu6Hr5y353/cTdLoCOcPB20KpCPYvGy4QU9rImx7qA4nbd6vKVyiygIgbRxQ9ehVSX/Vwp8+V/03FEQFo2B9mJp+Mg/o=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjM2ZlMTFjLWZjNGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_nd-N8Vg5NMRZf1dnXQjIy0p6jmIbM3ts3V5zKxPaQs=&emci=f7027ecb-bb4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8c3fe11c-fc4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

| | The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, **she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.** You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. **[Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $25 or more right now>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110016624/552989446/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=VMZqzby172R/FJROu6Hr5y353/cTdLoCOcPB20KpCPYvGy4QU9rImx7qA4nbd6vKVyiygIgbRxQ9ehVSX/Vwp8+V/03FEQFo2B9mJp+Mg/o=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjM2ZlMTFjLWZjNGUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_nd-N8Vg5NMRZf1dnXQjIy0p6jmIbM3ts3V5zKxPaQs=&emci=f7027ecb-bb4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8c3fe11c-fc4e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit| | | | | This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :"Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting, coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years \-- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities. You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. subject: He sent in the Marines. Now he wants Newsom arrested.
body:

Trump is using the U.S. military to silence dissent — and threatening to arrest governors who stand in his way.
🔻 700 Marines
🔻 4,000 National Guard
🔗 Mass arrests sweep L.A.
🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled.
And then Trump said Governor Gavin Newsom should be arrested for opposing him.
This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate.
And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. He has impulsively risked launching a war that may ensnare us for generations.
It is absolutely and clearly grounds for impeachment.
More soon,
Alexandria

#
Peter: Max Rose here from VoteVets.
Trump’s decision to launch direct strikes against Iran without congressional authorization is illegal.
He has violated the Constitution we swore an oath to defend and potentially drawn us into another war of choice in the Middle East, all while bungling the economy and deploying troops to American streets.
This conflict is his and the Republicans who have abrogated all their responsibilities.
We will hold them all accountable.
Max Rose

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Trump’s Unilateral Act of War with Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
---
Derek, In January — speaking to the entire nation at his Inauguration — Donald Trump proclaimed "We will measure our success not only by the battles we win, but also by the wars that we end, and perhaps most importantly, the wars we never get into." Today, against his own words, the president sent bombers into Iran. Americans overwhelmingly do not want to go to war. Americans do not want to risk the safety of our troops abroad. Americans do not want a president who bypasses our Constitution and pulls us towards war without Congressional approval. Donald Trump needs to bring his case to Congress immediately. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We’re at the inflection point
body:
It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.

It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbvv10aut87712essb9nf63243ld1ke4tfvdgjng_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I recently shared a major update with you: The battle for the House Majority has fallen within the **_margin of error_**.
---
_Right now, we’re at the inflection point that will decide which way the toss-up falls._
---
**_Democrats are convinced that their showdown with President Trump over illegal immigration raids in blue states across America will be the key to flipping the House..._**
---
**_...And they’re BETTING IT ALL on the belief that they’re right._**
---
But just like you, I know in my heart that they’re dead WRONG.
---
Every voter I talk to absolutely stands by the President’s actions on illegal immigration.
---
_But, at the end of the day, we can cite every focus group saying we’re right until we’re blue in the face – the _ONLY_ thing that matters is the final vote tally at the ballot box._
---
**And to win at the ballot box, we need a 100% verified, up-to-date voter file. No ands, ifs, or buts about it.**
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5e0ueh4peac518gqqtibtsdm5v2hq0oid1cetm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)
---

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgjud72br1cvgi4muvtkdrp37cjjq9iba8js1nc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)
---
[VERIFY NOW](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zs211sj3666qsht7pfuc0gs1eh2omd3psqogus70_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8nii3habonr84f75prbav40q1r6kigo31k3glm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)

name: Maud Maron
subject: New York has become a third-world hellscape!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmrlk7bk56o5m0s0r1e03nra2aj2iqnq2aeca0j8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpktsu7sobvckv0nrjhd0fa1o9k7h04uvob34078_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z86tsndk6mok0df1s621v90jmbnl6sj2p42uhlq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4b2hieb1db2imbdur7dvttvlbpjfalp2vic15ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq17eanses7m2dhsa2p4tenjj3bvhhu8144m1td8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z59n4t0hlhsr1jmnck5g20c1r1i514537slu9ilg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clge6ob2clh2bs)**
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
---
P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z24vvq01pcplnhfk67icd3flt1c2ab4qcuponrhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clgeepj6chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9v5ssn7cv41o6hgd6qpb2hcu1afkeddebgf0heg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clgeepj6chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5kunc86ksmuum9cscj4jg3sk6fd22unks2nj7kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clgeepj6chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. clean_body: This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zquub8fde92pdqr49bah0m2g62f9ohcal86eo078_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z38t3s65ltla94ibr9lgoftgvgva0k1b3bj2lqbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32cth2bs) [NO](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmco52m02q3rg6fs22mh8usc6ncc7eotk05pne38_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32cth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvot37dtbvphnpvmmd6a3qktu7u1ft9uuoegm4ug_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32cth2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

name: Maud Maron
subject: New York has become a third-world hellscape!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdc3te7rfbn8nq4ttg650rrt4efedfgs1mhs5228_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5lnl110r0kqathgjk6pu9u194gf10j153n5qq78_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsvrsnr65nbvk2avktffg39r6thljt5t489fesu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk5ocmbvtb53krqp4k6h7g26amj6huocjibjpiig_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z89vljdfuki4ghgnrrjam4meb5lrqjfkeips82no_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zukitr2ti2j3d3bqeo87ujgdlb10i2chhdgp81hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)**
---
|
---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8977mfqis97b17m4uj7700qgbm5jn1em8qqpkdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcj2nh3ndu7138qi5obmafchhk2ci2ofnu0c7q0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zddd19b9r0r2rgel9f61p2qoch7etkhc89lah6p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie0o32c5h2bs)

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk9nl7n7n34j5fj1g46rsn0fq6aulm5hajh61ijo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cliecor2cth2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z81obdaoucqdeo6vrj2rck911m83ae3h96lvq1d8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cliecor2cth2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zolda4f0lh3glasu1ivnnmn69blueel4t5dvpnro_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cliecor2cth2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z14rjpuh0ph7cc9ncr4m52mrb9sjekafkeg2ndqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0cliecor2cth2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuah7bgvmm9ekt2kf7nmsjnjfh47gf64s17b7pr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie2pb2chh2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoibjelcubr0cgttahe1pcgvm1vbhtmsdu0d1jdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie2pb2chh2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc84671lu3r2atkffukq0lkc1jfksvanb4frvpg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie2pb2chh2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z747dqvcq3n0i50ua7c87heis0ibp2rbh7q2mbt0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie2pb4cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuo2fq1fm3c2ha72kdm74hbfmndr6cmcbri4qni8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie2pb4cth2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2kf73qmb9939flkpou473qv4n6jib9q25fl9md8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie2pb4cth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk5cnbqpjkbb4pffdkr9d12mnjeopg11akiar7kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0clie2pb4cth2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---

# Sunday, June 22, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1944, President Franklin D. Roosevelt signed the Servicemen’s Readjustment Act, [otherwise known as the G.I. ## U.S. Bombs Iranian Nuclear Sites
The U.S. bombed [three nuclear sites in Iran](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ_GdEZmzc9RuEhDd2lTIhsvd5sYG9nLoXv7iLxCupFGmtH3fd3nu6VA8fFpNzS8pjniWQIyY56P4tLmCmUbc1zSwQ9Lsfi4zKCgk6qXALO3FN5zW3mzIgLqCk0zdKq79UOrqqe5Od07XBZsm057qwdE58FD06Fq7bBWZK411QM0SnX6Vo_rqEc3rso2DfZKi1ahJ065_k4U-YlreKcX5npJWxXMk3kvQn8ImARM53nWiysXxdULmK4oYOJ8bLu03mcsRUbLlKI8irzoZOFMPyhgqrLx-0khUOkH0arHZin8HfG_7LwM_AYAAP__eF563Q) on Saturday in an operation President Trump hailed as a "_spectacular military success_." Speaking from the White House, Trump said the strikes were aimed at ending Iran’s nuclear threat and warned of "_far greater_ " attacks if Iran does not "_make peace_." U.S. [military aircraft bombed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGupSAQhp8GO04AFbGg2MbubLulQRmUvQgGxmN8-xvuK9xuksn_zXz_v_f8Nj74uP01B2h0aY5wlwCIkOerLOlYis8m5rimCzfjY7FxnQUTPWWSCjFb48Mzd43VDkBA24DmQ896JYeONbvmHAYOnXIKHFdWrk4OapBtv4yMK7U0Xlcak0JwxvpWvUY3tuMyOmY4B8la0jGwHlN-_U8-4g4uPOkD-bWmowl6RzwLaf8QMRExxedMBeuKiKmCiZiYrDMnYrpTDpZWRSKmq9BgrrjuUGjB7L-g0BRp1aX1ko8bdSmvUOjtcae-ZAOBWvMUahxCppiv4ywUYa-Z2-SaIWJqsrbn7UPwRQ6kY9thfPh5F3_V8UeL7wAAAP__5TWRvQ) Iran’s Fordow, Natanz, and Esfahan nuclear sites, using at least six bunker busters on Fordow, buried nearly 300 feet beneath a mountain. Trump declared the facility was “ _completely and totally obliterated_.” Saturday’s bombing followed Israeli strikes on Iranian nuclear sites and Iran firing hundreds of missiles across Israel. Officials confirmed that Trump approved [attack plans Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9u9CAQxJ8Gd7aW9V8Kiq9xd1-b0sJmOW-C4QTcWff2kZNHSDeakWb0m4_bcjPsOdz_m4N0cXEJdGZPpVBannmNx5o5mZDCFp_lbjhkG7YFAfsahhpxsYb9e-kqqx0RUluRlmMP_TSMHVS7lhY6cCOM0k6ql51CUK2xOK4gJ-pdxfpqgwFRAvTt1CinWrUqB0ZKGqAVHZDlElPzGTmUnZx_xxelZotH5fVeyiOL9p_AWeB8nmezrfmiuHKB8yUFzpyTIV9fMPVpUr3H_OBifh02oT44Z_ZU55jilxE4V0nbx8necx5G0cH9MOx_Rsufnnpp_A4AAP__7-Z-BQ) but wanted to pursue negotiations first. The Trump administration explored [a backchannel meeting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd1hwsYldUGzjLttuaYG5JHcXQwQ43vz9k98vvG6kkc5ozp_7ercUKT1-2x1NC3lNeNaIrWFZj-ry7ioVm0ra8tEellL1aVtBwMiF5gCrtxQ_69B5ExABVYdG3kYxTvo2iO5p9LYpN2np_CxdcLMU2qKe1DCiCnryHZmLJjSAFGJUUz-HWc1uDsJKiVooNgj01HLp_2ZK7YkhfvIbS7_lvYvm2dqrMvWLwcJgOc-zt_8p16tlsFxsBovQV5YMlqPy2gr9Q3794unYItrCqRaLkbdy7K-uGP86KUaq-sYG8dgtxe-19iNFbwNfAQAA__8iLnn9) with Iran in Istanbul, brokered by Turkey’s president as a last-ditch effort, but Tehran refused direct talks unless Israel halted its attacks.
## Dangerous Heat Moves Across U.S.
A heat wave will bring [life-threatening temperatures](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2q3DAQhZ9G7mRGI_8WKgLB3aYJIaWRrbE9QZYWSbtm3z74vsJtz4HD-b6_j_lh2XPYf9mTTNniHOjKnkqhNL_yEs8lc7IhhTW-ym45ZBfWGQFbCZ1EnJ1l_5mbypmNCElXZFTfQjt0fQPVYcYBB-j6HtE1gNC1CkdaVt2qcVCLhorNvQYdogJo9VCP26jHZdzAKkUdaNEAOS4x1f8ih3LQ5j_xTale41l5c5TyzEL_EDgJnOyy3gT1Hu9a4PTnt8Ap0RqTk_mwNxiHXR5ki7zsm-TBpdzJxY5kvmw55CsLnHKJ6SP0xE7onwo16FappkrGPS_2nnPXiwb207L_elK-pe9t8H8AAAD__9rNgnY) to nearly 100 million people from the Midwest to the Northeast, starting Sunday and lasting through midweek. The expected surging heat, intense sunshine, and high humidity may leave Midwest and Northeast [residents unprepared](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-upCAUxp9GOyZHQNSCYhu7u-2W5oiHkQ2CgeOY-_ab2XmE237_8uX352v5whBDev7Ggyz7vCS6ayRmKstV13ysNRRMJbl88RNDqltyiwTZCzBCymXDEL8X3W7WE0lSLdlu6KEfzaCh3a0xqnMwglNm7FFrp1eFo_Y46WkcHLXBvtfASNkB9Gp8TH5S0zp5wK4jA6rRQFvgXB5_c0i8k4_f-UXl4fLRRrszn7VRvxo5N3K-7_uBzl03Ie-fTCNnSm_rIwmfCzmsXBs574QsbnyR4CzOq-6C6TirSIRFdADCC3Ql1yocJS4YBWFlKklc73o3jL3UfVvsdt4hxlDN0Gh4Hhji_3v8I6YvK_8FAAD__5WMi8E) after a year of mild temperatures. Heat indices near 104 degrees are forecast in Nashville, Tennessee, and Louisville, Kentucky, on Sunday and Tuesday. Daily record highs are possible from Detroit to Raleigh, North Carolina, to Boston on Monday and Tuesday. Hot and humid days can be dangerous [when the body is unable to cool](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO3CAUhJ_G7lhxM5iCIs12mzalBeawJuJi4eO9vH3kvMJfjkYazff9eSwPl3Kqz9-ugMXYlgrvIwMi9OU8fCv-SN3VXtd24tOleoS6LpzyiVBFOF-CS_m7yDHYCMBBjGCZnug0Ky3puNkQwbnVTEH5eZLMaz9LP2sRRWCwBjkme61RxTmjdBLzzUQjjDeROsZAUTFICiFh67e_LVXcIOZve0G_ra2M2W6I-zGIXwO_D_zu9gvgqq7QMa0ZBn7fwCEJrQBJNcCHbGdJIeGXwAc7FCAIZYfu8OxwEJBci8mpmUcpnOcGViGUlppHZgyjY7dhf6ec06H0IOmzuJT_38EfOXxZ_i8AAP__tViF0Q) itself off and can exacerbate pre-existing health conditions, potentially leading to heat stroke.
## Twins Take Center Stage at Graduation
A high school graduation ceremony in the suburbs of New York City will [double down on twins](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDEO3CAURE9jd6zgY4NdUKTZbtOmtDB87J9gWAFea28fOVdIORppNO_9ei0vS5HS9tMeaFrIS8KrRmwNy3LWNR9rpWJTSS6fbbOUqk9uAQ4j44oBLN5S_C5D701ABJQ9GqFHPk5KD7zfjUbwo7Ao1oATR5TobVCAqD0ImENP5l7jCkBwPsrpMYdZzuscuBUCFZfdwNFTy-XxO1NqO4b4zR8sD5ePPpq9tXft5I8Onh087fsGuKs7lEYuYgfPnbadVbfnHNlWrD9to5xYOo8VC2sXpcoSXuybyx-m7WSnwNGPUk7KDcLpwetZOKXHWa2uL8a_L4qRqtLdwLfDUvz3pv2Xwo-BvwEAAP__fTqGAA) on Sunday when 15 sets of siblings receive their diplomas. In the class of nearly 500 students at Long Island’s Plainview-Old Bethpage John F. Kennedy High School, 30 are twins. Many have known each other since kindergarten, their parents meeting through a local twins club. All 15 sets are fraternal twins. There are [two sets of twins](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAUAL_G7ojgYbApKK5Jl2uvtDB-2O8WgwUkVv5-lf2FrUeakebfY344ipS2v-5A20KeE141YmtY5mdd8rFUKi6V5POzbY5SXZOfgYNiXDOAeXUU3_PQrzYgAsoerRgVV5MeB97vVg5iGgxIrZRYhOIyLEoa76TGEcfge7IfG9cAgnMlp5sJRprFBO6EQM1lN3BcqeVy-58ptR1DfOcXlpvPRx_t3tpZO_mng3sH9xPzGfGDOrgnvNg7ly-207az6vecIxOKVWyVtYtSZVtx69M1Shvz0dXKhBiFmTj0xa7nRTFS1WM38O1wFH-S7VefXha-AwAA__9-t3v1) that include both a Josh and a Rebecca, and 14 of the 15 sets are headed to different universities.

clean_body: The U.S. bombed on Saturday in an operation President Trump hailed as a "spectacular military success." | | | | | | Sunday, June 22, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1944, President Franklin D. Roosevelt signed the Servicemen’s Readjustment Act, , into law, providing World War II veterans with funds for college education, unemployment insurance, and housing. In the 1940s and 1950s, artists and designers imagined what the future might look like. Their depictions were a bit naive – but also optimistic. . Start your weight loss journey with today's sponsor, , offering special deals for The Flyover readers. | U.S. Bombs Iranian Nuclear Sites The U.S. bombed on Saturday in an operation President Trump hailed as a "spectacular military success." Speaking from the White House, Trump said the strikes were aimed at ending Iran’s nuclear threat and warned of "far greater " attacks if Iran does not "make peace." U.S. Iran’s Fordow, Natanz, and Esfahan nuclear sites, using at least six bunker busters on Fordow, buried nearly 300 feet beneath a mountain. Trump declared the facility was “ completely and totally obliterated.” Saturday’s bombing followed Israeli strikes on Iranian nuclear sites and Iran firing hundreds of missiles across Israel. Officials confirmed that Trump approved but wanted to pursue negotiations first. The Trump administration explored with Iran in Istanbul, brokered by Turkey’s president as a last-ditch effort, but Tehran refused direct talks unless Israel halted its attacks. Dangerous Heat Moves Across U.S. A heat wave will bring to nearly 100 million people from the Midwest to the Northeast, starting Sunday and lasting through midweek. The expected surging heat, intense sunshine, and high humidity may leave Midwest and Northeast after a year of mild temperatures. Heat indices near 104 degrees are forecast in Nashville, Tennessee, and Louisville, Kentucky, on Sunday and Tuesday. Daily record highs are possible from Detroit to Raleigh, North Carolina, to Boston on Monday and Tuesday. Hot and humid days can be dangerous itself off and can exacerbate pre-existing health conditions, potentially leading to heat stroke. Twins Take Center Stage at Graduation A high school graduation ceremony in the suburbs of New York City will on Sunday when 15 sets of siblings receive their diplomas. In the class of nearly 500 students at Long Island’s Plainview-Old Bethpage John F. Kennedy High School, 30 are twins. Many have known each other since kindergarten, their parents meeting through a local twins club. All 15 sets are fraternal twins. ## Tesla Robotaxi Set to Debut in Austin
After years of anticipation and teasing from Tesla and Elon Musk, the electric car company [is set to debut](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdEbrNSZQuLiGLtdeiQxegu8WO8ImJG9_Iq_wdyON9I3m-3Mf7y5wiI_fbiNb3ksaI52ZqRTaxzyvKfFzTZEmF7MLnPY5bZRHBDQSWok4ehf4MzaVtxP4XlVk1c2A6QE6qFbbLVobtWjUShs006IATevnBsn0CqYq2AsGLaJSoFRXI918Q7TovkOiRokGyIeS9rqsVOjt8sKf9KK9ntNWsV1LeWahfwkcBA7nedbzlK8XVy9wuKLAoVBmJ_c0peLeQbI74rxKd-QSovxiJXGKcjvyP_n3iCQRBQ7Vbv3zDMwhtzfRwGNzgb_L5We-Xhb_BwAA__9hOIBK) its fully autonomous robotaxi service today in Austin. The debut will include a small number of those who were invited to participate, use Tesla Model Ys, and will include a safety monitor, a human onboard to ensure nothing goes wrong. Tesla is currently developing a vehicle solely for the robotaxi service, but there is no set date for the general public to use the service. Volume production of the robotaxi is set to begin in 2026. [You can see photos here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4yAUAL_G7rCA4FdBsY27bLulxePYPgrmRED8-PtV7i_cfjQazb_n_DQYMK5_zQ66XAvNEc4coBRIc3YbUXhvFMGamA0GSo52yLPksmW8Y1LO3mC4Z1V7bbkfRQ1a9C1vR84HXm9actGDko73oxeuG0fRPgawFgbDlR9Ujfor452UQnAhhkZC7xXA8hgHCaBEpTh4LJSaskGBy-Ql3HRAahztddBbKe9cPf5UcqrkdJ5ns9BlPxkj5PxlKjkVcFukQOtdyWn_5FdmiSwVcyFLcFD4FKTILKwYMzsBXhA9w3hgAUYx3MzdFpIzliX0kOuk_fvEEDB3faX4uhsMPz3ldxcPLf8HAAD__4EEixo).
## Abbott Signs Ban on Cell Phones in Schools
A bill that will ban the use of cell phones by K-12 students in school [was signed into law](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3SAQhZ8Gd1gw6x9cUKSh27QpLQxjG2UMV4DXe98-spM3SDcafTpH5_v1OX_aQCFuP-2Bun6vaY54FcJaMc_F7SnRa08RFxuLDZSySweWGQT0XAwcYPY20HvuGq8X4SfZoJZjL_pJCCWaXa9q8dNoRSd6sbrBL_2gUKmpH1W3SsAm6DtMDABSCilVCzj6DnH9mBQgdpJ1An2oKbd1x4rftqz0Tl-YW5eOhvRe66uwjx8MDANzXVfrKLjfsKez1BRvioG5ZzEwlJwlBubuZGDE8NwMzBPMl0DEFxtjiBvfsvXI_0rgpZ4eYy18zengZ7kBh0T80VO4P_P9-kfv6cyFl7BF9DzEmjjZi4FpsvavKxCFMoysE9thAz076v_Z_9LwJwAA__9eqpvT) by Gov. Abbott on Saturday. House Bill 1481 requires schools to prohibit students from using their phones during the school day by either requiring them to leave them at home or store them in a “secure storage” space. The bill also restricts the use of devices like smart watches that are capable of “digital communication." The bill’s passage brings Texas into alignment with eight other states that have banned cell phones in schools. The law will take effect in the 2026-2027 school year, and you can [read the full text here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMFqhDAURb8m7kZenlHjIouWErqZLrrpUqJ5GQNPIyY4M39fOr_Q5YXLOXB-ruPVRY7b7cutZMojpHGje2YqhY4xz0tKvC9po8lt2UVOx5xWyiMCthfoLoijd5Gfo6q8mcAPsiIj-xbaAUBDtZh-6qZBaegn6AfdqNC0zhFCCE3o21lX0fzBoEOUEqTUNVLvFVFoBo1ESgoF5GNJR10WKvRwOfAznXTUc1orNkspexbNm0Ar0M5ujyVx_TrWt3QKtIWTT3MWaPXwLdBOkbnQowi0uw8C7ec7SKWlrV-z2dy5u42yaD6gOozf75E55q4XCm6ri_wyl__1Og3-BgAA__-TS33f).
## Missing Sailor's Remains Returned Home
The remains of a U.S. Navy sailor who went missing in May [were returned home](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpTAMRp8mdEGJL5efIsU2dLPtlshgA5ZCcpVkYO7br9jZN5jS0pGPzvfnY_pA8RK233iwK19rnAJf2XMpnKa87DH61x4Dzxgyio9piQfnCQw8tWk1wEQo_j01FbnZ0GArdrZ7mudgTG-q3TVkiTtL1A3DvMJj7gdYCGmYkc3cciXufmZaAGuNtX0N3FHDvD6GHpgbqxrDJCWmuuxc-Avz6t_x5FQv8ai820t5ZfX4pWBUMF7XVZ_oPb8XDiWhvykF452lYPRxQa__H4kPlJB1XPUhOUvY9HekXuNnIE2MpCXoU9ImQVAnLp8p3FyJ-tuiYKySo9cl3ktuO9WY7UD5p63KzyY9HfwNAAD__2pSj7Q) to the Rio Grande Valley. Angela Resendiz, a 21-year-old sailor, was reported missing from Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia on May 29. The Naval Criminal Investigative Service located the sailor on June 10. Another sailor is [currently in pre-trial](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQhZ_GdEZm-C9c3IZub5sSDfawWBrsle2FJU8fbZI3SHl0pKPzfR-3-YaOnb__x510fq1h9nQmppwpzslsIfBjC54W9Akdh2jCTmkGBa1UnQSYLTq-5qawelF2rArSVd-qdlRqUMWma1S9HUYYhwZpNIsZGov9UluzqM7atnD6PaY6gKpSVTWUQL1tiNZ6HICoqUSjyLocYpk3yvTCtPIVDoqlCXvBesv5kUT9T8AkYDrPszzxuN6lgOlNI2DiYJDlb1iRmbx8yiQ9Hpf8AZPo78TOo4yUyFv3KSPlZ_RJbmEnAVMRtX2cjtmlrheNuu_o-PtE_pu6Q8NXAAAA__9zOYXc) confinement in connection with Resendiz’s death. No motive or cause of death has been released. Resendiz was received home with full military honors. [You can see the video here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGnwVuswzHYycAQ6crLVdqxVRdEOCeBCpvIkDh5-8p9ha7_T_oN38fJnlxMcb6-uYlNfV6ynXktiWvlxRYfck63kGc-u7m4mPLi88TFIqDeQb9DtORielnVkDkDHWTDRg4a9AFgD03YIvaaHDF4hYP3jlCBlp6c0p6oiWbDoEeUEqTct8gDKeZLd9gjs5JCAVOseWlr4MpPVy7plR-8tD5PTTKh1lsR3VHgKHBc17V95Xu9n3nbt-KqD6IbH6L71wX79T3-fy-fx2YxdFtjSrH0g1BwnVxMv2T92xEPgz8BAAD__92Ict4).

Abbott on Saturday. House Bill 1481 requires schools to prohibit students from using their phones during the school day by either requiring them to leave them at home or store them in a “secure storage” space. The bill also restricts the use of devices like smart watches that are capable of “digital communication." subject: Stop Trump from using tactical nuclear weapons against Iran
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Stop Trump from using tactical nuclear weapons against Iran](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9df4fdc-32c9-4cfa-92ab-1ca47dc94695/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T806f3f14-107b-4580-962c-e7acd9669670/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already signed? Forward to others!) _ A truly [alarming report ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31ee0e17-0849-496b-9a6d-03631f74f8d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)says that Trump was considering using tactical nuclear weapons against Iran's underground nuclear sites, if our conventional weapons (including the massive "bunker-buster" bombs used yesterday) were not powerful enough to destroy them (that damage is now being assessed). **It's hard to stress enough[just how horrible an idea this is](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9352ed5-570b-4e61-9dea-f8cde7548cf9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and how dangerous the Pandora's Box it would open would be.** Tactical nuclear weapons may be smaller and less powerful than the strategic nuclear bombs designed to destroy cities. But they are still orders of magnitude more powerful than conventional weapons. **And most importantly, they are nuclear weapons. They cross a red line that could trigger a nuclear response against our troops, our allies, and the US itself. ** There's a good reason the world has spent the better part of a century trying desperately to keep these weapons from being used again. But Trump, Hegseth, and the rest of Trump's team may honestly be too dumb or to ill-informed to understand that. [**Add your name, and demand that Trump not go down this catastrophic path, and that safeguards be added by Congress, our military, or however else possible, to keep him from doing it**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b7c2629-d986-45dd-9094-7daaf5894f0e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Democrats Accuse Republicans of Being Democrats
body:
Every Accusation Is a Confession—and They’re Screaming

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/17254bd99ba4/when-we-vote-we-win-14764079?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “Accuse the other side of that which you are guilty.”— Joseph Goebbels, The Third Reich
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
# Democrats Accuse Republicans
# of Being Democrats
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Confessions of a Guilty Mind:
# _Why Liberals Keep Screaming Their Sins at Republicans_
---
| _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
It’s becoming hard to tell if the modern Democratic Party is running a political platform or **just broadcasting live therapy sessions**. Every time they accuse Republicans of some horrendous act—racism, authoritarianism, grooming, election denial—it starts sounding less like criticism and more like projection. Call it **Freudian politics:** deep guilt mixed with the exhaustion of being wrong for two decades straight.Let’s look at the current situation. The Democrats are underwater in the polls, clinging to the smoldering remains of “The Message” (whatever it was), and held together by duct tape, delusion, and the collective rage of people still angry that brunch is ruined forever. Their strategy now? **Accuse the other side of exactly what they’ve been doing, but louder and with more hashtags.**
Take the “No Kings” protests—a group of aging hippies and **freshly-minted gender studies majors** protesting checks notes the enforcement of federal immigration law. The irony? These same folks stood silently (or worse, cheered) while their own party played monarch during COVID, decreeing who could work, which kids could go to school, and whether you were allowed to visit dying relatives.**Authoritarianism? Democrats wrote the playbook.**
Remember when they tried to force tens of millions of Americans to get vaccinated or be fired, denied healthcare access, or banned from public spaces? OSHA’s “vax or test” order was so overreaching it got slapped down by the Supreme Court. California and New York doubled down and kept the mandates anyway—because **nothing says “democracy” like rule-by-bureaucrat.**
Speaking of kings: Biden, Newsom, and their coastal court jesters have no problem overriding local governments when it suits them. Want to keep your town from being bulldozed into a prefab “equity village”? Tough. **Connecticut just told every municipality how much “fair share” housing they must zone for.** If you thought zoning was boring, congratulations—you now live in a state-run SimCity.
But hey, at least they’re consistent. If you’re a 15-year-old girl in Illinois, you don’t need parental consent to get an abortion. But God forbid you try to sell lemonade without a state license or use the wrong pronoun in a New York City bodega—civil fines await. Welcome to **Progressive FreedomTM, where everything is legal except personal responsibility.**
And while Democrats hyperventilate over ICE raids and “militarization,” they conveniently forget the facts: **85% of those arrested by ICE under Trump had criminal records or pending charges.** These weren’t nannies and dishwashers. They were convicted felons. The response? Protest. Because clearly, the real danger to our republic is enforcing existing law.
Meanwhile, Trump’s administration was so “king-like” that the courts have consistently upheld its actions—like using the National Guard to prevent cities from descending into third-world chaos. The horror! Imagine a president enforcing the law while blue-state governors sip lattes and pretend Antifa is just a myth.
Here’s the truth: Democrats are tired. Not from governing, mind you—but from **defending the indefensible.** They can’t explain what they stand for anymore, so they shout about what they’re against: parents, borders, fossil fuels, nuclear families, meritocracy, and any cartoon villain they can Photoshop into a MAGA hat.What’s left? They’re for criminals, non-citizens, drug dens, groomer curricula, and press releases about pronouns.
**The Republican Party, on the other hand, is attracting more young voters than ever—** especially young men and women sick of being told their faith, families, and futures are “problematic.” **Conservatives are now the party of law and order, of economic sanity, and—let’s face it—of basic reality.**
So next time you hear a liberal accuse a Republican of tyranny, racism, or extremism, remember: they’re **just confessing**. Out loud. To everyone. Because deep down, they know who’s really behaving like a king.
**And it ain’t us.**
**dominic@dominicforct.us**

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Report: PA 4th graders can't read
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de5a12c075&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[$23K per student, but only one in three can read at grade level](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ff46e7ebd1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Despite spending more than $23,000 per student annually, only a third of Pennsylvania fourth graders can read at grade level. Lawmakers are scrambling to fix it — but are they missing a key solution? As a result of what can only be called a crisis, House and Senate members on both sides of the aisle sponsored bills this year in an attempt to address the problem. The pending legislation is modeled after other state literacy laws where vast increases were seen; however, Pennsylvania excluded one potentially key component — third grade retention for students not reading proficiently. **Why It Matters.** According to the 2024 [Nation’s Report Card](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=84da26f65e&e=b7b3eddce2), Pennsylvania ranks 17th out of 50 states for fourth grade reading proficiency, despite higher than average funding levels. The [Commonwealth Foundation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=22adcff232&e=b7b3eddce2) reports Pennsylvania school districts spent over $23,000 per student in the 2023-2024 school year, “ranking seventh in the nation compared to the national average of [$18,461](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8534eaf1bf&e=b7b3eddce2).” Of the states scoring higher than Pennsylvania and the national average, several have enacted laws focused on improving reading proficiency. One debatable component is the concept of retaining third grade students who are not proficient readers. Retention is the current term for what was previously known as “holding back” a student and repeating the third grade.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9879a482fe&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Assaults keep climbing at Delco prison under county control, data shows](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a720b06656&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
Assaults in the Delaware County prison last year reached a new high of 278, making it the most violent county lock-up among the ten most populous counties, according to data self-reported by the counties and compiled by the Pennsylvania Department of Corrections. But a prison expert says the data is imperfect and should be viewed cautiously.

This latest batch of numbers shows that the county may still be struggling with management and staffing issues in the three years since the government took control of the prison after being privately run for nearly 30 years. It also seems to echo many complaints from front-line correctional officers in the wake of the management transition.

**Why It Matters**. At a minimum, 2023 and 2024 are the prison’s own data with the government as the manager, which could suggest those numbers, even if self-reported, are reasonably standardized from one year to the next, and as such, could reveal directional trends.

And the data reflect complaints of many of the front-line staff in the wake of the government takeover.
In December 2022 — about nine months after the management transition — guards told the five-member county council of low morale and dangerous conditions.

**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0c1fa84bff&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Melissa Hart: Is Pittsburgh’s fentanyl epidemic finally subsiding?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=684fd512ec&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Protest theater in West Chester — hate has a home, after all](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=31d59b687f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Harper + Lamb: The four-letter word missing from the One Big Beautiful Bill: JOBS](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f79ae334a2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Democrats tell us who they are by what they fight for](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=535fa988d9&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Three writers, three obituaries](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=61541a8991&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Jeff Hurvitz: The new Trojan horse](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fd8d0f1cea&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f6098f5a83&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
Earlier this week, in [United States v. Skrmetti](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=92795dc97a&e=b7b3eddce2), held that states could ban “gender transition” surgeries and treatments for children. The story behind the case, and the ACLU’s strange decision to bring it to the Supreme Court when most observers thought they would lose, is carefully chronicled in a [mostly balanced and even-handed article](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5971bbea4f&e=b7b3eddce2) by Nicholas Confessore in the _New York Times_ — yes, that _New York Times_. We were surprised, too.****

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Beth Ann Rosica Despite spending more than $23,000 per student annually, only a third of Pennsylvania fourth graders can read at grade level. Lawmakers are scrambling to fix it — but are they missing a key solution? As a result of what can only be called a crisis, House and Senate members on both sides of the aisle sponsored bills this year in an attempt to address the problem. The pending legislation is modeled after other state literacy laws where vast increases were seen; however, Pennsylvania excluded one potentially key component — third grade retention for students not reading proficiently. Why It Matters. According to the 2024 , Pennsylvania ranks 17th out of 50 states for fourth grade reading proficiency, despite higher than average funding levels. The reports Pennsylvania school districts spent over $23,000 per student in the 2023-2024 school year, “ranking seventh in the nation compared to the national average of .” Of the states scoring higher than Pennsylvania and the national average, several have enacted laws focused on improving reading proficiency. One debatable component is the concept of retaining third grade students who are not proficient readers. Retention is the current term for what was previously known as “holding back” a student and repeating the third grade. | | 2. By Todd Shepherd Assaults in the Delaware County prison last year reached a new high of 278, making it the most violent county lock-up among the ten most populous counties, according to data self-reported by the counties and compiled by the Pennsylvania Department of Corrections. But a prison expert says the data is imperfect and should be viewed cautiously. This latest batch of numbers shows that the county may still be struggling with management and staffing issues in the three years since the government took control of the prison after being privately run for nearly 30 years. body:
We need your help.
| | **This is a _DIRECT ATTACK_ on the freedom of the press:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250622_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=20301%2E878179%2EZcbEGx) | [EMERGENCY - 15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO SAVE PBS AND NPR »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250622_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20301%2E878179%2EZcbEGx)
---
**Here’s what you need to know:**

**1.** The House just voted to _DEFUND_ NPR and PBS — they have been foaming at the mouth to get this done for YEARS!

**2.** Under Project 2025, ANY media that criticizes Trump is at risk — __so he’s abusing his power to go after them.__

**3.** NPR and PBS could lose BILLIONS in funding if this bill passes in the Senate next month — so we have to act FAST and build MASSIVE support for PBS and NPR, _right now!!!_

[**This isn’t just an attack on the free press — it’s an attack on our Democracy and on ALL of us. We refuse to sit back and let Trump and MAGA Republicans get away with this, but we can’t do it without you: Add your name to help us SAVE public broadcasting from MAGA destruction! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-npr?source=VPP_20250622_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=20301%2E878179%2EZcbEGx)

We need you to act fast,
Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20301%2E878179%2EZcbEGx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20301%2E878179%2EZcbEGx).**

body:

📖 **_Take a Look:_ The Stakes Have Never Been Higher in an Off-Year Election **
For _The Nation_ , Heather Williams, President of the DLCC, unpacks the power of now. She explained that as Trump was celebrating his first 100 days in office, Democrats won five contests that secured the party’s control of state legislative chambers, flipped seats in districts that Trump had won by double digits, and dramatically outperformed their 2024 numbers in contests across the country. She explained that as Trump was celebrating his first 100 days in office, Democrats won five contests that secured the party’s control of state legislative chambers, flipped seats in districts that Trump had won by double digits, and dramatically outperformed their 2024 numbers in contests across the country. 🗞️ Stay Up to Date: Republicans go after LGBTQ+ rights Nearly 600 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced in state legislatures just this year – attacking this community has become a mainstay priority for the GOP. 🔦 Spotlight: Check out DLCC Spotlight Candidates The DLCC Spotlight program highlights key races to build Democratic power nationwide. From protecting fundamental freedoms and voting rights to growing the middle class and advancing opportunity, state legislators are moving the Democratic agenda forward and shaping the future of this country. 🛡️ You’re Invited: Down Ballot Defenders Summit Team DLCC is hosting our first-ever virtual Down Ballot Defenders Summit on July 9th. DLCC President Heather Williams and state legislators from around the country will be answering your questions and firing up supporters for our work ahead. 🫏 Join our movement: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005.
