name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: a clear contrast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I want you to know where I stand:
Peter — I’ve always believed that if any political candidate is going to ask you for your hard-earned money, they have an obligation to share with you exactly where they stand on key issues.
So if you have a moment, I’d like to share with you where I stand on three key issues in this race, and how my position compares with my opponent’s. And if after reading this, your views align with mine, I hope you will **[split $10 or whatever amount works for you between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me win what could be a nail-biter of an election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90121?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U)**
**Abortion rights**
**Where I stand:** The decision of if and when to start a family is one that every woman deserves to make for herself — period. As governor, I will work to permanently protect reproductive freedom in our state by enshrining the right to an abortion in New Jersey's state constitution, as well as stockpile mifepristone and strengthen protections for providers.
**Where my opponent stands:** He supports an abortion ban and wants to defund Planned Parenthood in New Jersey.
**Affordability**
**Where I stand:** My top priority is making every aspect of daily life more affordable for New Jerseyans — and I’ve put forward detailed plans on how to lower the cost of housing, health care, child care, energy, groceries, and the taxes that working families pay.
**Where my opponent stands:** Proudly alongside Trump as national Republicans try to cut Medicaid, endanger Medicare, take away food assistance, and give billionaires a massive tax break. In fact, he’s not only urging Republican Members of Congress to vote for Trump’s agenda — _he’s promising to implement it at the state level in New Jersey, too._
**The Rule of Law**
**Where I stand:** The first time I took an oath to defend the Constitution, I was a teenager entering the Naval Academy. Ever since then, that oath has been the north star for everything I do. I’ve never been afraid to run toward a tough fight, and as governor, I will defend your rights and your freedoms from anyone who tries to take them away.
**Where my opponent stands:** He got Trump’s endorsement in this race after shamelessly begging for it. He quite literally hitched a ride on a helicopter to rush to Trump’s golf club in Bedminster to ask for the endorsement. If he so willingly bent the knee before the election, why would we expect anything different after taking office?
**[Peter, if you prefer my vision for New Jersey over my opponent’s, then I am humbly asking you to help me get my message out to voters all across the state by splitting $10 or more between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90121?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90122?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90122?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90122?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90122?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90122?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90122?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90121?refcode=em20250622-9039&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9039%2E614464%2Ebvbn7U)

Friend, I don’t get this excited often, but something BIG is happening on college campuses across the United States. Believe it or not, the younger generation is finally rejecting woke and radical leftism. You saw this during Trump’s election - a major shift in the 18-29 year old voters. And the media hates it!
* “America’s Youngest Voters Turn Right” – Axios;
* “The Not-So-Woke Generation Z” – The Atlantic;
* “Are Zoomers Shifting Right?” – Newsweek; and
* “Analysis: Young and Non-White Voters Have Shifted Right Since 2020” – Washington Post.

Here’s a major reason why this is happening. An organization called Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is identifying, recruiting, and training college students to Make Liberty Win. YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus. In a moment, I will humbly ask you to send an urgent donation to Young Americans for Liberty, but before I do that, let me explain why your support is critical, especially today. A generous donor is MATCHING all funds raised up to $50,000 until the end of the month. That means your contribution today will be DOUBLED. [I am personally asking all my supporters to chip in $10, $35, $100, $250, or even $500 today to Young Americans for Liberty. This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c56e4f7898204c248f1c7688c110306c&_e=hxRWhJg_Qab8IyXfQceB-V99N1MGQGTZYT634sBCWtuTyW-a8U7LBmzwAufAIAZ_8plQUJ5AW_IpJzZvup8VDi466OBcBEpWnPRjpbgysSawRkTMpaAgTOh7eGydB3sgnkX_Yrd2xHKnQv3oGp4o1oPd9AJdyiktG3FU9GaCd2wCfbmh5_bdtyRF17WwTrbR31IIzLpgPDAxgGAwU7lVhQqL0QrbhfyGEonzPDXKxHXGNqADSFDESCYRnQUAu2tF_5ZiLqIGVCs881u6znV4B-6AqeNoRzHGEoqc4MUn3yiORdQgVXNBTt90JqzKQpq65u2zuV9forW-rRTO39p62l7_VB_SAaaSCvsPOMgB_oNrR7wwjd7-9SgafUoIOQ_ks4_4Xa68PfS3jWR_p0jw4-Mu_mIvpuCJSIFLFnOzRDbKpurctoivzu7kQ8YdLGgNAkDvgGRYq9GYJNVrtRWyWUJiArBPqnaK67mDsfCtogb-vw3JYxbHhI8zbG7Qr-MKbUkcI7IQe7Cw566VXFcB4_5v_wHYUzdQP-wK8dyUtyHBLtbUSL_oIfhtJvJ1Ajz_46aJ8X0XhrUpInwiPcice3o-mLMR7qqDdEBerGhnJw_rT2lZ447OlJbaV7HRMPuYGzn_-4Wy9aX_nS285SBCinNt1WR53Yb_PCwO1sL_511bh-DEzxSDCd2Hoa36QO7a1rtXr1c0SmBgBTRPdFtgLExwZLSf69oWApJtxECOj3Yuyg-nfNxPB9SJTs8u6cPd)

Peter,

Figuring out where to start writing this email has been tough because the content of the copy you’re about to read is, quite honestly, absurd.

I’ve spent most of my adult life in some of the world’s most dangerous places. **I’ve seen what happens when governments collapse, the truth is suppressed, and strong men choose silence instead of standing up. But I never thought I’d see it here, not in America.**

And yet last week, sitting in a congressional hearing, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz was asked a straightforward question:

_**“Can you define what a woman is?”**_

_**He couldn’t.**_
_**He wouldn’t.**_

He dodged. He deflected. And then he sat in silence.

Let me be clear — this wasn’t a trick. This wasn’t a “gotcha” question. This was the easiest test a leader can face: tell the truth, or bow to the mob.
**
Governor Walz chose the mob.**

That moment — that silence — wasn’t just embarrassing. It was dangerous.

Because when leaders abandon truth to protect their politics, it’s the people who suffer. And right now, our daughters, wives, sisters, and grandmothers are being erased in real time—not just from locker rooms and playing fields but from language itself.

My name is Adam Schwarze.

**I’m a proud Minnesotan and a retired Navy SEAL.** I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and served in special operations, deploying 13 times to over 70 countries.

_**I didn’t just fight for this country — I bled for it.**_

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c56e4f7898204c248f1c7688c110306c&_e=hxRWhJg_Qab8IyXfQceB-V99N1MGQGTZYT634sBCWtuTyW-a8U7LBmzwAufAIAZ_ZeLOCgGLdEqE0rQAuZKjp7fEoqO85CfqK68WtqH-9ctepe3qze-beuGDhWSoA9Diu-MnUkfyPs1VbmLVPDyfJFosD95hZcq4yja2-TIuD2rf_ZNOeYCf0oxfXq3ToSdlMRP5nZHVx1xUyXuuE94s1FVZPI4SP5DNUAgP45_8d9WBiCplfQBmBLawAjCcnix0R3Vtoh1TEAICS3uKGM44dGbc4Ap5As9M8uQ9fU7sv4k8iAUXUa-p9Ew4KIWWPIh7NPoS3KBMBz8aKklE1fOEo7oHO1jieiBupL-BcpBJrjB2gPFOOGqrGbcNritPMrua6CJZrvmwSeu5ZdQ6c_19k-xWZRfoUMiGkku99ZKkX3iegVczSJ5IkFuWwwoKIJB7dODbBFmLQh4UGdekyisMXnYkERiEV82lxIYspurIQJsbwuymGwSrWSpRknjaisQouMpRt09_e3Unk2VaKMahlwlCGg0QvcMhqVLBLvHEEe9eSmQU8h5sCe28xodqITnx29Yfxb89vk9nxROK9ZR4Phn8Oqvs5oBxjA_lZ2iTVJgk7v0Y-CjUFvbVDkk8fWIDBOD-1JQNWRfHNLluQKmeHPJr_pxEVImXI8RUyD-p0pbYoofvzdI70uKBs4-YtWTwsUAj-Mruc2hgfigTBEX1gGGfNruY1yufyGG8zl5oTgXpAixIQAvdWR92982CzhrlAHKhD6_IRIaH6zuy1h6Sig27umlNKh0AzO8Q4H_ygTE%3D)

And I never imagined I’d be running for public office. But something has changed. Something fundamental.

When a governor can’t say what a woman is...
When “men in women’s sports” becomes policy...
**When the truth becomes optional, and lies become virtue, that’s when I knew I had one more mission.**

I’m running for the United States Senate because I believe America is worth saving. But it’s going to take more than votes — it’s going to take backbone.

I’ve seen the cost of freedom. I’ve watched friends give everything so that future generations could live in a country built on truth. I won’t let their sacrifice be undone by a political class too cowardly to speak plainly.

That’s why I need your help today.

**[Could you chip in $5 or even $10 right now to help me get my U.S. Senate campaign in Minnesota off the ground?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c56e4f7898204c248f1c7688c110306c&_e=hxRWhJg_Qab8IyXfQceB-V99N1MGQGTZYT634sBCWtuTyW-a8U7LBmzwAufAIAZ_8plQUJ5AW_IpJzZvup8VDi466OBcBEpWnPRjpbgysSawRkTMpaAgTOh7eGydB3sgnkX_Yrd2xHKnQv3oGp4o1oPd9AJdyiktG3FU9GaCd2wCfbmh5_bdtyRF17WwTrbR31IIzLpgPDAxgGAwU7lVhQqL0QrbhfyGEonzPDXKxHXGNqADSFDESCYRnQUAu2tF_5ZiLqIGVCs881u6znV4B8IehnrQnaGHe9bFUQvA2uU8xXGsDJS6wW2OwBqC9hiHRYmZptEN-Fg1wSYbCfnrP0J6RmCFU7Cx4rQQrmpBhnN7uY-VYpOoGzIHYlSu97yBEmxqL5ESEgHYwhW9xTKWEJBcfzjJh7505ra5weejWMxulLTqfsJsmvIfLBfE26tWwVE_eeVIZ6nONxD1T4qJeyoe8FOM-4qWrIb4ykBzmYx1rwtV7rN44SjuXJybLBc7DmPaS94stbd5DFpKjbUojM4jE27s4ivuM7lUZ9PQO16weKY_ry_xQ_llSZttC9rYBwllFiQjtYLU_Fq_n-BivEBiuwLpkle1Ua9R5-ckx5HFi7Nhr6R0TJa0cGbbyG1fmann3VlZV65SBM0Y6evrI19j3Hq1S4IaGkxQ0L7FrKtxr03Ht9scwlsxJdl2XC7x3JnX8v-nX667dxXRrFc2LeP-TQVfJsUzsDSWM5Xago12SbrvrLOynTrlebnJ4hYY) **

clean_body: This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | Peter, Figuring out where to start writing this email has been tough because the content of the copy you’re about to read is, quite honestly, absurd. I’ve spent most of my adult life in some of the world’s most dangerous places. I’ve seen what happens when governments collapse, the truth is suppressed, and strong men choose silence instead of standing up. But I never thought I’d see it here, not in America. And yet last week, sitting in a congressional hearing, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz was asked a straightforward question: “Can you define what a woman is?” He couldn’t. He wouldn’t. He dodged. He deflected. And then he sat in silence. Let me be clear — this wasn’t a trick. This wasn’t a “gotcha” question. This was the easiest test a leader can face: tell the truth, or bow to the mob. Governor Walz chose the mob. That moment — that silence — wasn’t just embarrassing. It was dangerous. Because when leaders abandon truth to protect their politics, it’s the people who suffer. And right now, our daughters, wives, sisters, and grandmothers are being erased in real time—not just from locker rooms and playing fields but from language itself. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a proud Minnesotan and a retired Navy SEAL. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11 and served in special operations, deploying 13 times to over 70 countries. I didn’t just fight for this country — I bled for it. And I never imagined I’d be running for public office. But something has changed. Something fundamental. When a governor can’t say what a woman is... When “men in women’s sports” becomes policy... When the truth becomes optional, and lies become virtue, that’s when I knew I had one more mission. I’m running for the United States Senate because I believe America is worth saving. But it’s going to take more than votes — it’s going to take backbone. I’ve seen the cost of freedom. I’ve watched friends give everything so that future generations could live in a country built on truth. I won’t let their sacrifice be undone by a political class too cowardly to speak plainly. That’s why I need your help today. The Democratic Party isn’t just drifting — it’s sprinting toward something unrecognizable. First, they said men could use women’s bathrooms. Then they demanded that girls compete against biological males in school sports. Now, they claim they don’t even know what a woman is. And Governor Walz? He’s not a bystander. He’s a willing participant in this charade. His likely successor — my opponent — is even more radical. So if you’re like me — and - Stand with me. Fight back. Let’s win this. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Peter,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---

clean_body: ........................ | Peter, All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a helper. I helped take down the mob in New York... I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th... I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like YOU. But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [MSNBC] “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [CNBC] “Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” [New York Times] And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ FINAL sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask you to help me. That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Peter... Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core. But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE. Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a state-level charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old! My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump. And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell! Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies. And the ONLY way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to NEVER,EVER SURRENDER to it. ...Just ask President Trump! The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under booking # 2313757. So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

How did we get here, how you can raise your voice against war, and what happens next

| |

# [The United States Has Attacked Iran -- Now What?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166506565&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTA2NTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA2MDExNDEsImV4cCI6MTc1MzE5MzE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YtXuDwXBxWn0t4IL2MIBq5nzS9J2xoOl3h_euYXZNRc)
### How did we get here, how you can raise your voice against war, and what happens next
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jun 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166506565&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTA2NTY1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MDYwMTE0MSwiZXhwIjoxNzUzMTkzMTQxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.X_FzKzUDht5PfNdbnFx_ZkHtsnCpyIhIH-Y6p44mV1s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166506565&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTA2NTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA2MDExNDEsImV4cCI6MTc1MzE5MzE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YtXuDwXBxWn0t4IL2MIBq5nzS9J2xoOl3h_euYXZNRc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=166506565&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTA2NTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTA2MDExNDEsImV4cCI6MTc1MzE5MzE0MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YtXuDwXBxWn0t4IL2MIBq5nzS9J2xoOl3h_euYXZNRc)
---
| | [](https://substack..LIerUQ6vdbScSqqmeDcQS1blpEhWFWfXZuX194i3d54?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/the-united-states-has-attacked-iran?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last night, on the first night of Summer, Donald Trump announced that the United States has carried out direct attacks on three nuclear sites in Iran--Fordow, Natanz, and Esfahan.
Let's be clear about what this means: The U.S. has unilaterally bombed a sovereign nation of 92 million people, with zero authorization from Congress, no declaration of war, and no legitimate justification under international law. This is not defense. This is a deliberate act of aggression--and if we've learned anything from history, it's that preemptive wars waged on false pretenses lead to devastation, instability, and unimaginable human suffering. Where do we go from here and how can you raise your voice against this yet another unjust war? **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..d4IKKQ1YU3Scys9BngpzAfR6Dw2EJMNYR_iQH4oatyY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=166506565)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c617535-1c55-4ab8-b69d-05766f52e998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, Irananian Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Donald Trump
## Deja Vu to Iraq
The echoes of 2003 are deafening. Back then, the lie was weapons of mass destruction in Iraq. Today, it's the myth of Iranian nuclear weapons--a myth that U.S. intelligence has repeatedly debunked, a myth contradicted by the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA), and a myth long pushed by Benjamin Netanyahu, who has demanded war with Iran since the 1990s. [I wrote on this at length last week](https://substack.com/redirect/8de4ce3b-6c18-4e82-baac-25532c15322d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). At every turn, Netanyahu claimed that Iran was "months away" from a bomb--despite Iran being a signatory to the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty, despite Iran permitting full IAEA inspections, and despite Iran offering to reenter the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA), the nuclear deal Trump recklessly tore up in 2018. Netanyahu did nothing but repeatedly lie.
And now, after years of compliance from Iran and lawlessness from Trump, the United States has struck first--without provocation. This is what empire in decline looks like: violence without legitimacy, escalation without reason, and cowardice parading as strength.
## **Trump Betrays our Constitution & the American People**
Trump has no Congressional approval to attack Iran. No U.N. resolution. No imminent threat. This strike is a violation of Article I of the U.S. Constitution, which grants war powers to Congress, not the executive. Yet here we are, with a president launching missiles like it's a campaign ad--and with a Congress too weak, too compromised, or too afraid to hold him accountable. Trump's own DNI Secretary Tulsi Gabbard admitted that Iran is not making a nuclear weapon and Trump publicly humiliated her by stating, "I don't care what she says."
And let's talk about the cost--because it's not Trump or his billionaire cronies who will suffer. Already, early reports indicate that U.S. and Israeli strikes have killed 400 Iranian civilians and injured 3000 more. And many more are at risk. More than 40,000 U.S. troops are stationed across the Middle East. More innocent civilians in Iran now bracing for retaliation. At home, it is working-class families who will bear the burden of war, instability, and economic fallout. You notice how the same people who claim they oppose fair taxation of the super wealthy because "no one is entitled to other people's money" are simultaneously perfectly entitled in forcing other people's children to fight corrupt wars for oil and power? Their hoarding of wealth is more precious to them than us holding our children.
Already, Iranian state media is promising vengeance: _" You started this, we will end it,"_ they said, directly addressing Trump. The AP reports that Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says "_the U.S. is fully responsible for the consequences of its strikes on Iranian nuclear sites, and diplomacy is not an option_." Independent journalist Ken Klippenstein reports that the U.S. military is now briefing personnel to prepare for retaliatory strikes--on bases, embassies, and even soft targets here at home. According to internal briefings leaked to him, the Pentagon expects this strike "will likely activate Iran and other foreign terrorist organizations cells abroad including the U.S."
Trump's act of war hasn't made us safer. It's made every American more vulnerable.
**This research takes work and needs your support. If you find value in this scholarship, please join us as a paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..d4IKKQ1YU3Scys9BngpzAfR6Dw2EJMNYR_iQH4oatyY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=166506565)
## **Trump Lied ...As Expected**
Trump ran as the "pro-peace, anti-war" candidate. He lied, again. And I can only hope the people naive (arrogant?) enough to believe him then recognize now what they have enabled, and work to stop him.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bd5129-8a6f-4487-afdf-f7c3fc1f399b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And moreover, what precedent does this set? How do we now tell Russia not to attack Ukraine, or China not to attack Taiwan, when the United States has launched unprovoked attacks on Afghanistan, Iraq, and now Iran--all without consequence?
I've spent my career as a human rights lawyer standing against war, fascism, and disinformation. And this is a textbook example of all three.
## **Congress Must Act Or Democracy Dies**
If Congress refuses to impeach, remove, and convict Trump for violating the Constitution and committing an act of war without authorization, then they are complicit in what follows. The bloodshed. The destabilization. The erosion of what little democratic credibility we have left. Our Constitution contemplates a corrupt power hungry Executive like Trump, who threatens the very fabric of our Republic, and in this case, world peace. Every member of Congress who refuses to call for Trump's removal is and remains complicit in the atrocities he is committing. Here's how you can raise your voice.
## How to Take Action
As of this piece's publication, only 51 of 538 members of Congress have signed onto the bipartisan anti-war resolution. It is spearheaded by Senator Tim Kaine (my old law school professor!), Congressman Ro Khanna (D-CA), and Congressman Thomas Massie (R-KY). We need to get all 538 members of Congress to sign and act on this anti-war resolution.
Here's how:
* First, visit [https://1833stopwar.com/](https://substack.com/redirect/62f09429-ee4d-4f57-92b1-30f866bc7ac3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), enter your zip code, and sign the petition to ensure your member of Congress knows you oppose war with Iran.
* Next, call 1-833-STOP-WAR to be connected directly to your members of Congress. Demand verbally they act immediately and stop this war.
* Finally, share this article and the above links on your social platforms and get as many people as possible to take action.

Sign the petition, make the call, share this article, and likewise [subscribe to this human rights newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/d93ac2f0-a81b-4617-b07e-69c0bda75e3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I will continue to keep you up to date and informed on the latest developments and what actions you can take to advocate for peace, accountability, and justice. I will also continue to provide updates as this crisis unfolds. And I ask for your support--because in moments like this, we cannot rely on corporate media to report on the best interests of the American people. We saw their complicity in Afghanistan and Iraq, their current complicity in the ongoing genocide in Gaza, and their shameless whitewashing of Trump's injustices in this new war. We need voices that build movements rooted in human rights--not war profiteering.
Subscribe below. Share this piece. Speak out. And let's get to work.
And above all, remember: silence is complicity. Let us make sure our voices are heard.

It’s the easiest one!
| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kV1znCAUhn8N3uHgwUX3wou0xs70I223mcmkN4wCRnYAqaK7-fcdya63D8_5eDmt9Ub37xUqPiGAQcsZASD6gAAefsPLn2f1qAr89wTfcPuovj5tr_D5pq6wy060pqyb9d9ZvMw_7ImK719euzXb_fDu1W7fpqbKttpstKgTWYEoQYhEVVlxIIyQY0mSoVKMlF13lKwvsp7JvJSlYPSYA-26roA-0RUQOBAGkOUEKEslE4eCZkdJsj7raIlyctEulaNrjTyHabE-FaNNTDWE4Oe4UoOgmZVYJpVetJuU3AwETbSxa4PeqrEYrdUhKIXPvUDQGI-HHscY-EP1ozF4zQ45nimizRIst0rqxSJa3-KyDc7jMgmFaG08N54P_Y2L1vpWvzlE63ssHpzgsfvenM-Uy4i48ffK0QXlAqL1ljQoBIw7o2Uc7M_y-uv5yiKMZ6b16xNIce1OP5Opkv6ijdEzK1BO3rY94xetFfwPAAD___9irTU)

Friend,
If I say PLEASE, will you at least answer question #1?

Fellow Patriot,
---
Any day now, the Supreme Court will make a massive ruling that will shape the rest of Trump’s presidency.
---
_Washington Examiner:
**Supreme Court sets stage for possible crackdown on nationwide injunctions** _
---
_**That’s right – reports indicate that the justices are poised to not only rule on President Trump’s order ending birthright citizenship, but also to limit the power of nationwide injunctions that Democrat activist judges are using to unilaterally BLOCK key components of the President’s agenda!**_
---
These rogue judges _MUST_ be brought under control, Fellow Patriot.
---
They’re claiming to have more power than the Supreme Court themselves!
---
**_For the Supreme Court to enact historic policy that affects GENERATIONS of Americans, at least FIVE justices must be in agreement._**
---
But ONE _un_ elected judge in San Francisco or Washington, DC can simply decide they don’t like the President’s immigration or military policy and OVERRULE the duly __elected__ Commander in Chief?
---
_A judge can singlehandedly ORDER an aircraft carrying a violent gang of illegal aliens to land in America?_
---
It’s absolute insanity – and now, the Supreme Court can finally end it once and for all.
---
**But Democrats and Deep State operatives are launching a frantic, last-minute behind-the-scenes pressure campaign to FLIP the justices _RIGHT_ _NOW_. **
---
_That’s why I’m gathering 75,000,000 signatures from American citizens urging the court to stay true to the rule of law and the Constitution by ENDING – or at the very least, restricting – nationwide injunctions._
---
With the fate of President Trump’s America First agenda hanging in the balance, it’s never been more important for the justices to hear from We The People.
---
_Can we count on you to speak out and stand with President Trump at this critical moment, Fellow Patriot?_
---

clean_body: For a special birthday gift... | Fellow Patriot, Any day now, the Supreme Court will make a massive ruling that will shape the rest of Trump’s presidency. Washington Examiner: Supreme Court sets stage for possible crackdown on nationwide injunctions That’s right – reports indicate that the justices are poised to not only rule on President Trump’s order ending birthright citizenship, but also to limit the power of nationwide injunctions that Democrat activist judges are using to unilaterally BLOCK key components of the President’s agenda! These rogue judges MUST be brought under control, Fellow Patriot. They’re claiming to have more power than the Supreme Court themselves! For the Supreme Court to enact historic policy that affects GENERATIONS of Americans, at least FIVE justices must be in agreement. But ONE un elected judge in San Francisco or Washington, DC can simply decide they don’t like the President’s immigration or military policy and OVERRULE the duly elected Commander in Chief? A judge can singlehandedly ORDER an aircraft carrying a violent gang of illegal aliens to land in America? It’s absolute insanity – and now, the Supreme Court can finally end it once and for all. But Democrats and Deep State operatives are launching a frantic, last-minute behind-the-scenes pressure campaign to FLIP the justices RIGHT NOW. That’s why I’m gathering 75,000,000 signatures from American citizens urging the court to stay true to the rule of law and the Constitution by ENDING – or at the very least, restricting – nationwide injunctions. With the fate of President Trump’s America First agenda hanging in the balance, it’s never been more important for the justices to hear from We The People. Can we count on you to speak out and stand with President Trump at this critical moment, Fellow Patriot? Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

subject: Drop by Drop
body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110038805/553072237/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzUyNTFlNC03MTRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PRE5Yaa6HR3qwHZUK2_iS77SddcMVdIOH__dkszmy9Y=)
Peter, I’ve always been fascinated with how storms build. It’s not a linear process, but rather an exponential one. Water vapor in the air condenses around particles, like dust, to build a cloud. And the more water there is, the bigger the cloud grows. The toughest part is the beginning. The conditions have to be _just_ right. I have found over the past four years (_wow, four years!_) that building a campaign is a similar process. This started as me having an idea in my basement, and essentially, I was the first water droplet of our campaign. The next droplets were my friends and family. And the next batch of droplets were supporters from across Illinois and the country – individuals passionate about bringing more science and a trusted neighbor to Congress. Now here we are, barely a week away from our FEC deadline, and what was once a few water droplets has the chance to grow into a full-fledged storm! [**Peter, as we face this critical June 30 deadline, we have our biggest opportunity to demonstrate our storm’s strength. name: Carol Obando-Derstine
subject: I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
I’m Carol Obando-Derstine, and I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 7th District!

I’m the daughter of two working-class union members. My family immigrated to the United States when I was just 3 years old. We came with all the hopes and dreams of so many immigrants before us who wanted the best for their families. While there were challenges along the way, my family built the better life that they were looking for in the U.S.

As I watched my parents make sacrifices in order to provide for our family, I learned the value of a strong work ethic. That work ethic led me to serve in a variety of roles: youth advocate, nonprofit leader, public servant, educator, and engineer.

While I’ve held different titles, my dedication to serving my community has remained unchanged. And I’ve always strived to be worthy of the generosity this country has shown my family and me.

**Right now, our current representation doesn’t understand the challenges that our community is facing. I won’t stand by as extreme Republicans like Ryan Mackenzie work with Donald Trump and Elon Musk to chaotically implement tariffs that jack up costs for Pennsylvania families while they cut taxes for their billionaire donors.**

**I’m running for Congress because this district deserves better.**

I will stand up for the district and fight for real economic change, to build an economy where working families like the one I grew up in can afford housing, groceries and utilities, and have a pathway to real prosperity.

Trump's war is illegal - and could be disastrous | | |

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzwE4kwFudFEk03ht4MxX3V49ZmZQl2KMQa0Y-NTGC5aS9BGAgejh1HTRquefSb-JDqmhzuwzv7xe1sP-bKkDd51R33z3yxXY5cmrSWxz7c2Nx-Vw3INSiNHwc1x4dfC6NFYet8NqBKJWVujzXMeSM45BjtVsW-C2LYD_KLHgC_o9DKnZO1C3ECfmONUTYPPf7F4E7SQq0NRZAJ_S46sGzEvnNd68AwRGuW-EDth5w6iRRo3X5wq8bEnBDcqEdR9KxfzggmGDqdcX1rJQw7fZuSIv02cgC2pA1aOrFrcJOWA/4hk/ijJhNeqOSKeZS-Dnb6EzfA/h0/h001.wVXTaPKLU6rxLuA2DZIP7yQxow-tRAGeS5nlchYQmSA)Hi Friend, On June 21, **[Donald Trump declared war on Iran](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzwE4kwFudFEk03ht4MxX3V49ZmZQl2KMQa0Y-NTGC5a4yjJBGqyBc5j4ASj3Y7eZvuXY3Y5gKzBcxqSZI9mf9dIO3b_7Xcem3w5s_UWXroO9_YLEyBEW1CSkh_wKDkvjnu_Z6FlxGnl8KJJn7ltrtAJ3_ILeQBkZfr-v8ZuW8qiFO8VQKZK7dwjqHj5myY-9U5CCxpXAUn64HFBqjoxasRpDdbwt5QOLoXl1wWcvChLeWcxxmebwxP78kCnqpiFVGaBeDFtXcv5ynq9wol6XKv4jc2ID_HwdQ0f0YnqXVyZ/4hk/ijJhNeqOSKeZS-Dnb6EzfA/h1/h001.uqfRugCdjvri_W3F-DeGU2lBRrUF7qUPjNhjQ_5bY9U)** by dropping massive bombs. **Trump's war is illegal** \- only Congress can declare war. [**Tell Congress:
Stop Trump's War on Iran**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39hibSOAWFjMlolZNRsUp16Dc09PuhIlE42PPuuGM4TeHh4HTHXnmOp2tM0os_lBR0irir3JkWS-JD2qdXFbo14bVaKfMBtX0NR2UNW2Mb6k4VKusOuoKr2Lh0AWBQmEb6x9_JqvAMEwEZ2xdwKed6F_-gBZXjjmLHOXDkQ5bmGQ1hkYXgPaxuw9Ezl_VuBbkEZbFcPUZQMI7CIGzouV0gFDY70kUdotLkWy8p4U3oQAT7MJiQCIXY3mf5hbmoCwg75bqHJkL0owfb3boy5hlt3sEt9WSnn-dwg7n9bg9CIow/4hk/ijJhNeqOSKeZS-Dnb6EzfA/h2/h001.EBNrh_f9jvu13KbueZbuYzd9KmeIu5NuulrWoOV1nOw)
In response, Iran fired missiles at Israel. But **Iran is likely to attack the United States as well**. If Iran attacks the US, **Trump promised to escalate his war on Iran even further**. As we learned in Iraq, **wars last for years - at massive cost to soldiers as well as civilians**. To pay for his war, **Trump will increase taxes on working Americans** \- even while his billionaire supporters get massive tax cuts. As we learned in Iraq, wars last for years - at massive cost to soldiers as well as civilians. body:
MAGA Republicans just admitted the reason behind their efforts to dilute voting power
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110039909/553073894/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMjlhYjRjLTczNGYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5VArXwZy2zImxFXFF_gvK-RLKRUM0uPtbPpIzENaEn0=&emci=b0dc16e9-114e-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2229ab4c-734f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, we actually can’t believe this happened. Republicans are saying the quiet part out loud. In a recent court filing, the Republican National Committee (RNC) admitted that stronger access to the ballot box makes it harder for their candidates to win. **Democracy Docket: RNC Intervenes to Back Trump Anti-Voting Order, Claims Greater Voter Access Hurts Their Candidates** Let’s be clear: This is how the national Republican Party tried to defend President Trump’s anti-voter executive order that is trying to gut vote-by-mail and impose proof-of-citizenship laws. It’s a plan that would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters and undermine our fundamental right to vote. **When an entire political party admits it’s doing what it can to make it harder to vote, it’s on the rest of us to stop them. ** [**Rush a donation to double down on our efforts to fight for fair maps and a truly representative democracy where every eligible voter can make their voices heard.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110039910/553073895/1950963963?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VoterAccess_email_20250622-NDRC-Tier1-VoterAccess_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250622-NDRC-Tier1-VoterAccess_&utm_campaign=VoterAccess&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMjlhYjRjLTczNGYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5VArXwZy2zImxFXFF_gvK-RLKRUM0uPtbPpIzENaEn0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The reality is, this is just the latest effort in a long list of measures that attack voting rights.
Anti-democracy forces have launched widespread efforts to further partisan gerrymandering across the country, including the Trump administration pushing Texas lawmakers to draw new gerrymandered maps before the midterms. This includes the SAVE Act, which aims to restrict access to the ballot box for certain citizens, as well as several state-level copycat bills. And don’t forget, Republicans even tried to outright steal a free and fair election in North Carolina.
**Republicans are making it clear they will do everything they can to dilute the power of citizens to make their voices heard. That means we need to keep fighting tooth and nail to stop them.**
[**Rush a contribution now to help push back against extreme anti-voter efforts and let’s build a stronger, fairer democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110039917/553073902/1950963963?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_VoterAccess_email_20250622-NDRC-Tier1-VoterAccess_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250622-NDRC-Tier1-VoterAccess_&utm_campaign=VoterAccess&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMjlhYjRjLTczNGYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5VArXwZy2zImxFXFF_gvK-RLKRUM0uPtbPpIzENaEn0=)

clean_body: MAGA Republicans just admitted the reason behind their efforts to dilute voting power | Peter, we actually can’t believe this happened. Republicans are saying the quiet part out loud. In a recent court filing, the Republican National Committee (RNC) admitted that stronger access to the ballot box makes it harder for their candidates to win. Democracy Docket: RNC Intervenes to Back Trump Anti-Voting Order, Claims Greater Voter Access Hurts Their Candidates Let’s be clear: This is how the national Republican Party tried to defend President Trump’s anti-voter executive order that is trying to gut vote-by-mail and impose proof-of-citizenship laws. It’s a plan that would disenfranchise millions of eligible voters and undermine our fundamental right to vote. When an entire political party admits it’s doing what it can to make it harder to vote, it’s on the rest of us to stop them. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The reality is, this is just the latest effort in a long list of measures that attack voting rights. Anti-democracy forces have launched widespread efforts to further partisan gerrymandering across the country, including the Trump administration pushing Texas lawmakers to draw new gerrymandered maps before the midterms. This includes the SAVE Act, which aims to restrict access to the ballot box for certain citizens, as well as several state-level copycat bills. And don’t forget, Republicans even tried to outright steal a free and fair election in North Carolina. Republicans are making it clear they will do everything they can to dilute the power of citizens to make their voices heard. That means we need to keep fighting tooth and nail to stop them. = Thank you, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. subject: A coordinated political AMBUSH against Kristi Noem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I know Secretary Noem well.
I served with her in Congress. She was my right hand on the GOP Whip Team. So it felt personal to see the Left's COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH play out in real-time.
FIRST: Liberal activists unleashed chaos in Los Angeles and 1,500 other cities nationwide - reports show this is the largest rally of Trump-hating radicals in American history!
THEN: Liberal CA Senator Alex Padilla cheered on these lawless rioters, barged into Kristi Noem's press conference, and even FUNDRAISED off of it
NOW: Democrat Eric Swalwell just called for Secretary Kristi Noem to RESIGN for enforcing mass deportations and cracking down on the rioters
Liberal activists across the country are pulling out all the stops to undermine President Trump, Kristi Noem, and the entire Administration.
So don't be fooled:
This isn't really about Kristi Noem or the job she's doing. She's being targeted by Congressional Democrats for carrying out the President's agenda - for doing exactly what the American People elected him to do.
They want to BLOCK deportations, DISRUPT the important work of ICE, SABOTAGE everything Trump is doing to save America, and INTIMIDATE you into giving up your public support of MAGA.
But we can't legitimize their political showmanship with our silence!
[These Trump-hating radicals are receiving wall-to-wall news coverage as we speak so it’ll take a massive response to cut through the noise. So I just set a goal of raising $500,000 between now and 6/30/2025 to make sure Conservatives have the resources needed to hold the line.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/6T3lxALm-yNDR5VCxDyG82hK6miQbeIh2uUHIKQFGTGb0UNu2t8WS40Br1Mk5m90uIhYOj5qdLxi6jLv220nSM84czc2PYFKxFunP4KqvdvSX4iYwmuDnDROGp22THt9N-JzQi8PNCddC92akHD9ZPm0GArItNxb1d8rllaPMvzsfEY_mm5wIfrwcTjxr_-aSn32tQEuLsnqbjBDJON7mwXGIMkNqT6H3P-8CbzlKoXNKCvXsYn6ddcoVVwr5VSG0sg5qjHzXTeNZ8BFzytXgT3C-O5Fxkipf_aHtLBFT-_lx4KoitsXovR8R6wBtu4Uuo53zedIxdDt5CSoeCrxcUnVBLtV_m7OItCOAjp8Iax_L5yI7u2TW6HzqhK31onB-_E59GtCzFP-Z7Ga8MZqvh8Lcp7C_zxyjxS1a3i3B65QihWsOav7NfUdOrtiUOc1QFi0-K55qmsACT0GwUZSxutmVHRuF9NOLfjhQOb5Qbri2lboG81hlP-_kHQUdvgqlnXIjlcd9ztwVEe7WOKC58Y5KryazBkVDkd_zq79L6n3kOH-u7R59yYEUTcX1SRZsvEyJfJId_Q-ncrn6djvFCPETXK3pT5mLYCD3JZfK9aAInZkw_JPJZX1PgGfFq1WM2nCtUNx5D1aZLWaNSqcFRW6AZHra54kWhZEcBdhScsTqY9MLrKnwd1kJ6PH7_Rj1V-eNUPjvwJZduCJg7Q7M-belR-DmXmAO9Ut3_TuFJjt9bGjLoRwrKiWyKg_4iIojoet968bwkL53fGAP0bHj0IU6jfXhcyjyyDTLskr4Bti3okBeg46nR_KnnjluWtcCuk2fGb9Gbsx_mkQZA/W6prJQeoIXcySXGi-WaCK_WWrHS8mfbe/10)

But every dollar collected from this email will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and defend President Trump and his closest allies.
If we fail to reach this goal, the consequences could be dire: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials - including Kristi Noem and the President himself.
NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So I'm asking for your immediate support. Not next week, not next month...

clean_body: I know Secretary Noem well. I served with her in Congress. She was my right hand on the GOP Whip Team. So it felt personal to see the Left's COORDINATED POLITICAL AMBUSH play out in real-time. FIRST: Liberal activists unleashed chaos in Los Angeles and 1,500 other cities nationwide - reports show this is the largest rally of Trump-hating radicals in American history! THEN: Liberal CA Senator Alex Padilla cheered on these lawless rioters, barged into Kristi Noem's press conference, and even FUNDRAISED off of it NOW: Democrat Eric Swalwell just called for Secretary Kristi Noem to RESIGN for enforcing mass deportations and cracking down on the rioters Liberal activists across the country are pulling out all the stops to undermine President Trump, Kristi Noem, and the entire Administration. So don't be fooled: This isn't really about Kristi Noem or the job she's doing. She's being targeted by Congressional Democrats for carrying out the President's agenda - for doing exactly what the American People elected him to do. They want to BLOCK deportations, DISRUPT the important work of ICE, SABOTAGE everything Trump is doing to save America, and INTIMIDATE you into giving up your public support of MAGA. But we can't legitimize their political showmanship with our silence! I know it's ambitious.. But every dollar collected from this email will go DIRECTLY to help Republicans cut through the Liberal propaganda, fight back in battleground states, and defend President Trump and his closest allies. If we fail to reach this goal, the consequences could be dire: Congress could fall to the Democrats, handing them the power to impeach and remove scores of Trump officials - including Kristi Noem and the President himself. NOTHING would be worse for our plans to Make America Great Again. So I'm asking for your immediate support. Not next week, not next month... name: Wes Moore
subject: I never took an oath to the president
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=209%2E1086043%2E8cb60c ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=209%2E1086043%2E8cb60c ]Wes Moore for Governor

When I joined the Army, I took an oath to defend and uphold the
Constitution of the United States. To protect our country against all
enemies foreign and domestic. And to follow orders.

But it was never to an individual, regardless of who the Commander and
Chief was at the time.

How I see my service now is not that different. When I was sworn in as
Governor of the State of Maryland, I placed my hand on Frederick Douglass’
bible and swore to uphold the federal and state constitution. To protect
and defend the people of Maryland.

I have fought for the people of Maryland every day of my term and I will
continue to do so.

But let me be clear: If the requirement for partnership is ceding my
values, kowtowing or curling up in a fetal position, or allowing my people
to be left behind, then I will never surrender.

While I will work with anyone, I will bow down to no one.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250622-1?refcode=em-20250622-1&refcode2=209_1086043_8cb60c&akid=209%2E1086043%2E8cb60c ]If that is the kind of leadership you can get behind, will you chip in
$5 or any amount today?

Wes

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: [Signature Needed] No war with Iran!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1676%2E791427%2E5Qrd2N)

Friend, we’re sure you’ve been following some of the news around the worsening missile attacks between Israel and Iran.
We are writing today to ask you to support a simple and clear message: Americans **cannot** and **will not** be dragged into a war with Iran.
**[Please, add your name to Ilhan Omar’s petition today calling for NO WAR with Iran. Show your support for peace and diplomacy over death and destruction.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-iran/?source=em250622-1-nor&akid=1676%2E791427%2E5Qrd2N)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-iran/?source=em250622-1-nor&akid=1676%2E791427%2E5Qrd2N)**
Over the last decade we have come to terms with the devastating failures of America’s invasions of Iraq and Afghanistan.
Thousands of US troops were killed along with hundreds of thousands of Iraqi and Afghan civilians. Both countries were destabilized. ISIS was formed as a direct response. And the US spent trillions of dollars in the process. Trillions that could have gone to housing, healthcare, and education instead.
**The American people have no appetite for another endless, needless war** — especially not at the behest of the Israeli government and their ambitions.
Now is the time to make our voices heard and send a clear message that President Trump will pay a political price for going to war and risking more lives.
**[Sign on to Ilhan Omar’s petition today and help us show that there are millions of Americans who oppose any prospect of war with Iran. We need everyone speaking out on this right now.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-iran/?source=em250622-1-nor&akid=1676%2E791427%2E5Qrd2N)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-iran/?source=em250622-1-nor&akid=1676%2E791427%2E5Qrd2N)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1676%2E791427%2E5Qrd2N)**. And then Trump said Governor Gavin Newsom should be arrested for opposing him.
This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate.
And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1e24788a45fc4fc59ca6894a9d235d58&_e=yKo5YBw85S07wKLID6BdKMF0QQ9EPf8Q6sZXiMxgUF3VwyHag5ZmM__DkWZqCO8hjSaBrER4bI1oprcfJiyrrFJGrHSqZVFjWMqE159Dg-alva2oz6eS_ren8d6YTIAaq7p-Vx5DhPPoePeA1q5yJF-3yV-4MUd8SGhVzyoJG2_lJyn1FqYF2cWJvwgqddxPHw8cD8JRqw0ZZ1XD6Fp06yoCsfL6UZuUQqlQkN9kAPReawQ2OT2KqFktyD6JaaEfV415gQ_9jVHcrFo2-oKyIY0In5mOOaioMcp8ygImLK22kZe8MFLtK4I4YCQFXz8wypBCmMVIOvpkHaXtRrKXtY4TgPa31AGYxZGKJv27hCoPhxisSFpz22boEALh9l4lvsCg1e2hjl3qpEvyNMORYurG_XL0v0KxnvGnEaRSBkR8uKEnGU1kjjeJRUh6TAi4y4aOelIyOc7SqU_PiENvzbKzvlaOL9FAsa8DeKBNFTdKiLVeOCpCcMujV6qCyaUliI8mcIk0jkKwnT93TEEFb_FgO3xdpmTSkXMyuwpreNSqogzcL9CMSZ-KwzhRy2A_fO2o0mkkI5Xumz5SrNBXui8ZcHeMTlvVFggT1cmcrYmTscVmHtHApeFFyLSSgzZ7jzDqyt35qbl9tzokR_HPySgtiKaHeUT9R22oMKrg5CFjitu62Z2NgDKYJzWf-fdAkPBCDKcerv3vfD6nXIXuGXWb284Mzym_aGgytpd_ToI%3D) Peter,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1e24788a45fc4fc59ca6894a9d235d58&_e=yKo5YBw85S07wKLID6BdKMF0QQ9EPf8Q6sZXiMxgUF3VwyHag5ZmM__DkWZqCO8hjSaBrER4bI1oprcfJiyrrFJGrHSqZVFjWMqE159Dg-alva2oz6eS_ren8d6YTIAaq7p-Vx5DhPPoePeA1q5yJF-3yV-4MUd8SGhVzyoJG2_lJyn1FqYF2cWJvwgqddxPHw8cD8JRqw0ZZ1XD6Fp06yoCsfL6UZuUQqlQkN9kAPReawQ2OT2KqFktyD6JaaEfV415gQ_9jVHcrFo2-oKyISYObaWOpIsxD6Gi5cNclb4jqlIrnBdpx7EjLzaTxtNqaO0CXWQc3TMTXAZnWaBQaKT_YYF73fMocRsU6ZHFP5CuBNvQPA9OsgbH09acoX30X73oZit5mbLeRjSEW5_VoxnqsvM1siyxFucUXX6f9tMqzWBVzQOXgXLcG1J_iFRenwd-YFCEniw8hMhXF8fsflOtzCbaoRAicayV7P0deFW7586Z3JY5RBNjY5o209NFAzXYZ5MnUYpsn4tu3iiTkK_BGKg7SX0Sjrb96bf3zBMHQxExduxcUF5PkbXuKvAo3F33S94p_7QcIB19XKXsRtuY6ESHSgkAKti54afXrlBsnmK3r-p7b3YejFYlYX3gJwvlPT3k9q2897Vnb0KINItoCOCpYcTGcHMm8TlzMlpuajS_usxPA_D3js9IX1BzTGr5lMujz42YGoN82bULYfgzfl6CdKGT9ZmZyo-Dfhw%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Katie Porter
subject: Here’s what $5 does for a campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39821%2E3422442%2E90oACU)
Dear Derek,
We have an important fundraising deadline coming up at the end of June. It’ll be the first time in this campaign that we release our fundraising numbers publicly, and everyone from pundits to our opponents will be combing through the numbers to assess how much support we have.
**[Ahead of this deadline, I’m asking you to donate $5 today, and I want to tell you exactly what your $5 can do.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250622_1_ak?refcode=em20250622-39821&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39821_3422442_90oACU&akid=39821%2E3422442%2E90oACU)**
This is what a campaign can get with just $5:
* 250 digital ad impressions
* 8 pieces of mail
* 10 doors knocked (you can increase this number by volunteering!)

When it comes down to it, we win races by doing voter contact. That is, communicating with people and explaining why they should support us. This work takes resources, and for this campaign, which rejects contributions from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, every single ad we run or voter we canvass is funded by people like you chipping in.
**[So please, will you donate $5 or whatever you can to help us get our message in front of voters?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250622_1_ak?refcode=em20250622-39821&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39821_3422442_90oACU&akid=39821%2E3422442%2E90oACU)**

Thanks for considering,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250622-39821&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39821_3422442_90oACU&akid=39821%2E3422442%2E90oACU)**

Make no mistake: This is government overreach at its deadliest, and we’re wasting no time to respond. Add your name before midnight to condemn Trump's toxic coal agenda and demand Congress step in NOW >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110044750/553085842/-387028521?refcode=ea.a6c0eccc-7c4f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a6c0eccc-7c4f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2YzBlY2NjLTdjNGYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8tDyO0KVslMV3ULPl_7Df5cvRZX3DFE7p1P6uoZvs98=&emci=9c06a9f2-ed4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a6c0eccc-7c4f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110044752/553085844/-387028521?refcode=ea.a6c0eccc-7c4f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a6c0eccc-7c4f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2YzBlY2NjLTdjNGYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8tDyO0KVslMV3ULPl_7Df5cvRZX3DFE7p1P6uoZvs98=&emci=9c06a9f2-ed4d-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a6c0eccc-7c4f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
Here’s where things stand:
**FIRST:** Trump launched an all-out assault on clean air with executive orders that open our public lands to coal mining and weaponize the Justice Department against clean energy states like California and New Mexico.
**THEN:** He abused his emergency powers to force aging coal and gas plants in Michigan and Pennsylvania to stay open, even though grid operators never asked for it and had already planned to shut them down.
**NOW:** The cost of keeping these toxic plants running will total tens of millions of dollars. That burden will fall directly on families already struggling with high energy bills and polluted air.
Let’s be clear: Coal is expensive, and it’s one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide when burned than any other fossil fuel. It poisons our air and water and puts low-income and working-class communities at higher risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer.
**But Trump doesn't care about facts. He cares about billionaires who profit from pollution.**

clean_body: Enough is enough. | URGENT NEWS via The New York Times: “Coal and Gas Plants Were Closing. Then Trump Ordered Them to Keep Running.” | Here’s where things stand: FIRST: Trump launched an all-out assault on clean air with executive orders that open our public lands to coal mining and weaponize the Justice Department against clean energy states like California and New Mexico. THEN: He abused his emergency powers to force aging coal and gas plants in Michigan and Pennsylvania to stay open, even though grid operators never asked for it and had already planned to shut them down. NOW: The cost of keeping these toxic plants running will total tens of millions of dollars. That burden will fall directly on families already struggling with high energy bills and polluted air. Let’s be clear: Coal is expensive, and it’s one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide when burned than any other fossil fuel. It poisons our air and water and puts low-income and working-class communities at higher risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer. But Trump doesn't care about facts. He cares about billionaires who profit from pollution. This movement is powered by people like you who care deeply and act boldly — and we aren’t turning away. Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Michael Bennet
subject: my campaign for president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250622_presidentialplatform_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250622_presidentialplatform_act]
Hi folks, it’s Michael.
In May 2019, I threw my hat into the ring and announced that I was running for president.
It wasn’t a decision I made lightly, but I knew our vision for America was worth fighting for.
I ran for president on a platform that was progressive, fiscally responsible, and popular among a majority of the American people. We called it “The Real Deal.”
It was an economic vision informed by the years and miles I’ve spent traveling our state. My platform called for paid and family medical leave, investing in our infrastructure, raising the minimum wage, lowering healthcare and prescription drug costs, tackling our housing affordability crisis, driving down the cost of higher education, and paying teachers their worth.
The Economist even said some of my ideas were better than Senator Elizabeth Warren’s. [https://www.economist.com/united-states/2019/09/07/elizabeth-warrens-ideas-get-noticed-michael-bennets-are-better]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250622_presidentialplatform_act]
At the center of my platform was the expansion of the Child Tax Credit. Working families have always been my top priority in public service—and this policy gives parents much-needed breathing room to put food on the table, pay for essentials, and support their kids.
We’ve made progress since my run for president. Along with the temporary Child Tax Credit expansion, we’ve passed a historic investment in American infrastructure and lowered prescription drug prices for seniors.
But President Trump and Republican leadership are hellbent on reversing as much of our progress as possible. Trump’s "big, beautiful bill" will strip millions of Americans of their healthcare, drive up costs, and further explode our national debt—just to fund tax giveaways for the ultra-wealthy.
The solutions to our biggest challenges won't come from Washington's broken politics or Trump's chaos. They will come from Colorado; from all of us working together. That's why I'm running for governor.
In the State Capitol, I’ll continue pushing bold ideas and policies that reflect the best of us. We’ll build more affordable housing, lower the cost of healthcare, modernize our education system, and protect our precious public lands.
Friend, I can’t and wouldn’t want to do this without you right by my side. I’d love it if you’d consider supporting my campaign for governor by contributing today. Even just $25 or $15 makes an impact. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250622_presidentialplatform_act&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250622_presidentialplatform_act]
Thank you,
Michael

The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
**Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:**
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
**As a senior how do you feel about their findings?** _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. clean_body: We will call this what it is - abuse| | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?_Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

Trump’s decision to bomb Iran is illegal. Article 1 of the Constitution
makes it crystal clear that Congress has the SOLE authority to declare
war. Bernie Sander’s & Ro Khanna’s bills exercise that authority to stop
Trump’s war with Iran.

This is an extremely dangerous situation: Trump has immediately threatened
even more attacks, and U.S. service members are now directly in harm's
way. We are on the cusp of a catastrophic conflict that could cost
countless American and Iranian lives.
