name: Survey Dept. [Heritage Action]
subject: DOGE: $59 MILLION to house illegals in luxury NYC hotels...
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205z8zugq436b4fj9x4q9p386jx4mideavzhu59wsyjz3j2s87x3whr6jkjexnzp4am1g1jizpmzz8y3vto&__stmp=sy9lu2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy9lu2&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jj0fhn31wba2v7xo7i5fk8x5jp0j6fuvbpz68jjy4abcr2ou89jtlgq5i8zum9kzsnlpclamr7jh9u6hj5ocju35dhglsz0iudmxkdhlo9ez03vb7cw9comhtzphvlzx1vaz3i5jto5getf1tr1z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy9lu2&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy9lu2&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy9lu2&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy9lu2&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jj0fhn31wba2v7xo7i5fk8x6703pqxsqtmgxk4n9n1nx9p2rktwa6pga2dd7chpbo91bdv45the6xxiccmsyw4oisezkpxniru5sf9ixabg5n18i9zzipnj56wzf0f75pfplioejophwm6ior3t3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy9lu2&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sy9lu2&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Heather (VPP)
subject: Is this it, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi friend, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project.

I noticed that you started the process of confirming your 2025 Democratic Membership to save our Democracy from Donald Trump and MAGA extremism... __but you never finished.__

You probably don’t need me to remind you what’s at stake:

**Trump is _attacking_ Democratic politicians, _gutting_ critical social safety nets like Medicaid and Social Security, and deliberately _fanning the flames_ of chaos that he manufactured himself.**

But Democratic Supporter Memberships give us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with — it’s that simple. _If we lose supporters like you, we lose everything!_

**That’s why I need to make sure that loyal Democrats like you aren’t throwing in the towel, with so much on the line.**

[**With Trump ramping up his billionaire-funded war chest, we need all the help we can get. Will you finish the 2025 Democratic Supporter Membership you previously started so we can flip critical swing seats, take back the House, and end Trump’s trifecta? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91311?t=6&akid=20299%2E878179%2E8YzTLk) | [STOP TRUMP: RUSH $7 TO CONFIRM YOUR 2025 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91311?t=7&akid=20299%2E878179%2E8YzTLk)
---
Thank you for doing your part!

– Heather
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20299%2E878179%2E8YzTLk). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20299%2E878179%2E8YzTLk).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20299%2E878179%2E8YzTLk) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=20299%2E878179%2E8YzTLk). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20299%2E878179%2E8YzTLk)
---

subject: this ain’t a typo

body:
Folks - it's John Kennedy.[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a3be436756534499a1d73b7523b20bea&_e=WBwCT86I3xbNr3G675-ZS7Xwp-TE0f1-Kpx3G5HtnPK4GjiZJHIpG_u7Zt3cE5qQyJGRxaFVN0Zp26QMIlP1jr92NY_zt5CKWrecxr5d2vm_2J8TrX0e4AdZ50vKeL2BhQlIdPcL67eUXqyqOQ8dyUIIpzmk9Lmww9pmrKadhOpKY3PHWg9jbaZwAiZYjWVd7Mp0BfBhAnT6tm1mbvf3KogQXgaIogFjY-3yudQgLw3EXU3QmB8ryrQQo4pYKNoE7aU1ocJKObA2hOMTBuK206ug1d14n8Zf3RXUdn4bRWdgMen5hC26B07CL_0tlO1dIpq1ZrdH62syLZAQsbvrMKFgvyzgpf6VnCeLHPy16dSKz6OnU-L-v8CVmFoc6MMHGnnodJhz3NHzMXfcDjwS9xcdqfzd5jGkh1SKoFOLfq_G2rHcG9Q8S8NTEZAlrkHCCHgxcbOAfc9sEZYYdNC8CVTjScx6B2Zf2nDDsJi481LZwK5m2aaqEe9kzNG2SsrSPmUqxwSYVicfOBGADHuP97MOlvvOQZgjqIi_eInyoxNDCt4GY52kZ4KljIlyt27MUiY9h1nq-A19qU8T8I6ESXv_XAEiwj_9_bKBeJkXRCwyH9AThLl1C0bM5rUtzc1jrq5uIiK2jicIcZkH8pKrQLhC3E-PMLI2nRykT_w6GA4%3D)I'm told my reputation precedes me.
I hope that's a good thing.
I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.
So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.
My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.
That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!
_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal.__
_It 'll be a real disaster if they miss it.
With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. **_[We’ve only got DAYS ‘til June is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a3be436756534499a1d73b7523b20bea&_e=WBwCT86I3xbNr3G675-ZS7Xwp-TE0f1-Kpx3G5HtnPK4GjiZJHIpG_u7Zt3cE5qQyJGRxaFVN0Zp26QMIlP1jr92NY_zt5CKWrecxr5d2vm_2J8TrX0e4AdZ50vKeL2BhQlIdPcL67eUXqyqOQ8dyUIIpzmk9Lmww9pmrKadhOpKY3PHWg9jbaZwAiZYjWVd7Mp0BfBhAnT6tm1mbvf3KogQXgaIogFjY-3yudQgLw09pUokspilGdyxUnArTSktN5lrNRoHEZJQgFmQ2rWZp7VS1wk4k16XePBRiIJ2mCZGUGI2ehrawusbg08kYPJ89mdCDeWrUi7Ci6lHzhxbr3JlplGOnrT-P-JrzZOv4ngaojbChv5wWWyT5W5zIVYdVnjfTOypXTap7NETzg34VOVFP9hSMsDo9gsfDRZve_fQ7Sf5Vz4fSGN2F9Ebzq-RVP6deALth_PFkb5iJV8tFdu4SyO5sm4CCeF4dM-A8nPhUaqOH92gzHLD5kVCY_WVBPCdEckwbixo6eWyfqcxIn7yFlQNftvnkKhfcNhjP7-Acjbuv_MdEUkCJdTudsDKEqOB45ImDXgVWsNgBBqYLxBgj47Ax4wkmbaImmFuOsbnoCGyAOqYT8ixkvv7CF884lHO3zd3JsAiclp-0KhgqMs2VqO_EZ7yfY5J80Q582E%3D)_**[ Contribute Ten Bucks Now >>

Vice President JD Vance **[told MSNBC on Sunday that the U.S. is not at war](https://substack.com/redirect/2d0c769e-bd7d-424b-83b6-4f9c61ac8d37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Iran following last nights effective strikes on the regime's nuclear assets.
"We are not at war with Iran, we are at war with Iran's nuclear program...We destroyed that uranium, and we did it without endangering the American pilots," Vance made clear.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8aa663a7-81ef-40ac-82e2-d8d8b47dabf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# How the U.S. pulled off last night's historic strikes on the Iranian regime
The United States launched its biggest-ever B-2 stealth bomber attack against Iranian nuclear facilities in a 25-minute operation that caught Tehran completely by surprise, marking the first combat use of massive 15-ton bunker buster bombs and the longest B-2 flight since 2001, Pentagon officials announced Sunday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc3f023b-b961-472e-adcd-7213b8ef5b1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The operation was a historic military achievement using America's most advanced weapons** \- It marked the biggest-ever attack by B-2 Spirit stealth bombers, the longest B-2 flight since 2001, and the first combat use of the massive 15-ton GBU-57 "bunker buster" bombs, with 14 of them dropped on Iranian nuclear sites.
* **The strike completely surprised Iran with zero resistance encountered** \- Iranian fighters never took off and surface-to-air missile systems failed to detect the incoming American aircraft throughout the entire mission, allowing U.S. forces to maintain the element of surprise from entry to exit.
* **Three major Iranian nuclear facilities were targeted in a precisely coordinated 25-minute attack** \- Seven B-2 bombers struck Fordow, Natanz, and Isfahan between 6:40-7:05 p.m. ET, while a U.S. submarine launched over two dozen Tomahawk cruise missiles against surface infrastructure at Isfahan.
* **The mission required extraordinary logistical planning and execution** \- The B-2s flew 18 hours and 6,900 miles from Whiteman Air Force Base in Missouri, completing multiple in-flight refuelings while maintaining minimal communications and coordinating with escort aircraft in complex, tightly-timed maneuvers.
* **Advanced deception tactics ensured mission success** \- The U.S. employed decoys and had F-22, F-35, and F-16 fighters sweep ahead at high altitude and speed, while using high-speed suppression weapons and preemptive fires against potential Iranian surface-to-air threats.
* **U.S. forces remain on high alert for Iranian retaliation** \- Military officials warned that American forces throughout Iraq, Syria, and the Gulf are fully postured to respond to any Iranian retaliation or proxy attacks, which they characterized as "an incredibly poor choice" for Tehran.

* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/49ca846e-516a-439c-a86b-c2ffb698ab98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's Push For America First](https://substack.com/redirect/49ca846e-516a-439c-a86b-c2ffb698ab98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49ca846e-516a-439c-a86b-c2ffb698ab98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/49ca846e-516a-439c-a86b-c2ffb698ab98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/49ca846e-516a-439c-a86b-c2ffb698ab98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against.
**[Read The Great American Reset now.](https://substack.com/redirect/49ca846e-516a-439c-a86b-c2ffb698ab98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Yours Truly,
**SEAN HANNITY**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49ca846e-516a-439c-a86b-c2ffb698ab98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

* * *
# What did Trump say about the strikes?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fc3f023b-b961-472e-adcd-7213b8ef5b1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump declared the strikes a "spectacular military success" that completely destroyed Iran's nuclear capabilities** \- Speaking to the nation at 10 p.m. ET, the president announced that precision strikes had "obliterated" nuclear facilities at Fordow, Natanz, and Isfahan, eliminating Iran's nuclear enrichment capacity and the threat from the "world's number one state sponsor of terror."
* **The president justified the attacks by citing decades of Iranian aggression against Americans** \- Trump said Iran had been chanting "Death to America" for 40 years while killing over 1,000 Americans with roadside bombs and causing hundreds of thousands of deaths worldwide, making the strikes necessary to stop their "horribly destructive enterprise."
* **Trump issued an ultimatum demanding Iran choose between peace or facing even more devastating attacks** \- He warned that Iran "must now make peace" and that if they don't, "future attacks would be far greater and a lot easier," noting that many targets remain and most "can be taken out in a matter of minutes."
* **The operation was conducted in coordination with Israel after diplomatic efforts failed** \- Trump praised Prime Minister Netanyahu for working "like perhaps no team has ever worked before" and thanked both Israeli and American military forces, while noting that Iran had pulled out of scheduled peace talks in Oman and refused to return to negotiations before the strikes occurred.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2e41f9-d72b-4186-a97f-bb365c8ca84d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# Hegseth praises "our boys in those bombers"
Defense Sec. Pete Hegseth addressed the press this morning, praising the success and efficiency of the strikes, urging Iran to realize the magnitude of what occurred and enter negotiations.
"Iran is calculating the reality that planes flew from the middle of America in MISSOURI over night, completely undetected, over 3 of their most highly sensitive sites. And we were able to destroy nuclear capabilities, and our boys in those bombers are on their way home right now," Hegseth said.
"We believe that'll have a clear psychological impact on how they view the future."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/30efe87e-92c0-4597-8c0e-9f15bf11377a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: "We are not at war with Iran, we are at war with Iran's nuclear program!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "We are not at war with Iran, we are at war with Iran's nuclear program!" | | | Jun 22 | | | | | | | | | | | | Vice President JD Vance with Iran following last nights effective strikes on the regime's nuclear assets. "We are not at war with Iran, we are at war with Iran's nuclear program...We destroyed that uranium, and we did it without endangering the American pilots," Vance made clear. How the U.S. pulled off last night's historic strikes on the Iranian regime The United States launched its biggest-ever B-2 stealth bomber attack against Iranian nuclear facilities in a 25-minute operation that caught Tehran completely by surprise, marking the first combat use of massive 15-ton bunker buster bombs and the longest B-2 flight since 2001, Pentagon officials announced Sunday. | | ---|---|--- The operation was a historic military achievement using America's most advanced weapons \- It marked the biggest-ever attack by B-2 Spirit stealth bombers, the longest B-2 flight since 2001, and the first combat use of the massive 15-ton GBU-57 "bunker buster" bombs, with 14 of them dropped on Iranian nuclear sites. The strike completely surprised Iran with zero resistance encountered \- Iranian fighters never took off and surface-to-air missile systems failed to detect the incoming American aircraft throughout the entire mission, allowing U.S. forces to maintain the element of surprise from entry to exit. Three major Iranian nuclear facilities were targeted in a precisely coordinated 25-minute attack \- Seven B-2 bombers struck Fordow, Natanz, and Isfahan between 6:40-7:05 p.m. ET, while a U.S. submarine launched over two dozen Tomahawk cruise missiles against surface infrastructure at Isfahan. The mission required extraordinary logistical planning and execution \- The B-2s flew 18 hours and 6,900 miles from Whiteman Air Force Base in Missouri, completing multiple in-flight refuelings while maintaining minimal communications and coordinating with escort aircraft in complex, tightly-timed maneuvers. Advanced deception tactics ensured mission success \- The U.S. employed decoys and had F-22, F-35, and F-16 fighters sweep ahead at high altitude and speed, while using high-speed suppression weapons and preemptive fires against potential Iranian surface-to-air threats. U.S. forces remain on high alert for Iranian retaliation \- Military officials warned that American forces throughout Iraq, Syria, and the Gulf are fully postured to respond to any Iranian retaliation or proxy attacks, which they characterized as "an incredibly poor choice" for Tehran. | | ---|---|--- What we are seeing right now is truly historic. President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan. But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him... "There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future." If you want to learn more about , go ahead read this that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against. Yours Truly, SEAN HANNITY | | ---|---|--- What did Trump say about the strikes? Trump declared the strikes a "spectacular military success" that completely destroyed Iran's nuclear capabilities \- Speaking to the nation at 10 p.m. ET, the president announced that precision strikes had "obliterated" nuclear facilities at Fordow, Natanz, and Isfahan, eliminating Iran's nuclear enrichment capacity and the threat from the "world's number one state sponsor of terror." The president justified the attacks by citing decades of Iranian aggression against Americans \- Trump said Iran had been chanting "Death to America" for 40 years while killing over 1,000 Americans with roadside bombs and causing hundreds of thousands of deaths worldwide, making the strikes necessary to stop their "horribly destructive enterprise." Trump issued an ultimatum demanding Iran choose between peace or facing even more devastating attacks \- He warned that Iran "must now make peace" and that if they don't, "future attacks would be far greater and a lot easier," noting that many targets remain and most "can be taken out in a matter of minutes." The operation was conducted in coordination with Israel after diplomatic efforts failed \- Trump praised Prime Minister Netanyahu for working "like perhaps no team has ever worked before" and thanked both Israeli and American military forces, while noting that Iran had pulled out of scheduled peace talks in Oman and refused to return to negotiations before the strikes occurred. | | ---|---|--- Hegseth praises "our boys in those bombers" Defense Sec. Pete Hegseth addressed the press this morning, praising the success and efficiency of the strikes, urging Iran to realize the magnitude of what occurred and enter negotiations. "Iran is calculating the reality that planes flew from the middle of America in MISSOURI over night, completely undetected, over 3 of their most highly sensitive sites. And we were able to destroy nuclear capabilities, and our boys in those bombers are on their way home right now," Hegseth said. "We believe that'll have a clear psychological impact on how they view the future." Stay tuned to PolitiBrawl for more updates on the developing situation! subject: It’s not just the riots.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:

Peter,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

clean_body: This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester | Peter, TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents... No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL... This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester. I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana. Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name. It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life. Despite all the obstacles , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of one man : Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana. As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority. Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress. 2026 is right around the corner. Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race. The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. For America's Future, Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT) Former Navy SEAL Purple Heart Recipient P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Bernie is right about Super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
My good friend Bernie Sanders recently tweeted something important about Citizens United that the entire Democratic Party needs to hear.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250622-5168-footer&t=1&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)
Peter, my good friend Bernie Sanders recently tweeted something important about _Citizens United_ that the entire Democratic Party needs to hear:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20250622-citizens-united-petition/?source=em20250622-5168&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)
Earlier this year, I was proud to reintroduce the _We The People Amendment_ in the House that would overturn the _Citizens United_ decision that allowed corporations and Super PACs to wreak havoc on our political system in the first place.
[**Will you add your name in support of getting Super PAC money out of Democratic primaries AND overturning _Citizens United_ once and for all?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20250622-citizens-united-petition/?source=em20250622-5168&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20250622-citizens-united-petition/?source=em20250622-5168&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)**
I’m proud to say that since my first campaign for Congress, I haven’t taken a single cent from corporate PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. If we’re going to remake our party for the working class, we need _every_ Democrat to do the same.
Because while Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans may be taking it to a new level, the truth is our democracy has been vulnerable to the influence of wealthy billionaires, special interests, and corrupt Super PACs all the way since the Supreme Court’s flawed decision back in 2010.
The next time Democrats are in power, we can’t just talk the talk. We need to walk the walk and finally take action to end the corrupting influence of Big Money — both in our own primaries and for _everyone_ who wants to run for office.
**But those deeply entrenched special interests aren’t going to give up easily. It’s going to take a mass nationwide movement to change the status quo.**
[**So Peter, if you’re with me and Bernie in this fight, will you add your name today to demand Democrats get Super PAC money out of our primaries AND commit to overturning _Citizens United_ for good?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20250622-citizens-united-petition/?source=em20250622-5168&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20250622-citizens-united-petition/?source=em20250622-5168&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)**
This fight won’t be easy, but it’s one we must win if we want to create a government that puts working people first.
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250622-5168-footer&t=2&refcode2=5168_420207_lGaoyx&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5168%2E420207%2ElGaoyx)

**While families struggle with rising costs and Americans ask for real solutions, Republicans are focused on slashing food assistance and pulling funding from Sesame Street.** _Yes, Sesame Street._

Meanwhile, New Dems are not only fighting this divisive agenda but we’re helping move our country forward.

**We’re fighting to lower costs for everyday Americans, invest in infrastructure and innovation, and fix our immigration system with commonsense solutions.**

We’re also on the front lines of the toughest races in the country! **20 of the 26 most vulnerable House Democrats are New Dems.**

But we can’t secure these critical seats without your help.

**[With our end-of-quarter deadline approaching, your donation could be the difference between hitting our goals or falling short. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Monday, June 23rd at 6:30 pm Central

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjE0NTQxMDEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI1MTczLTM4ZGNjMjE3MGI1ZTQ4NGE4MmY2ZmMzNDRjNGJmNjZkIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVkLWNydXovcGdfZV9qdW5lLXR0aDEtb3lwXzIwMjUwNjIwX2Ffb3RoZXI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9KdW5lLVRUSDFfMjAyNTA2MjAmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1KdW5lLVRUSDEmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUifQ/mnGzJKZiFp5HeWy85_51-A)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **Please join me for an exclusive telephone town hall, on Monday, June 23****rd****by calling toll-free at 833-380-0731 at 6:30 pm Central that night.**_**During our conversation, I will be discussing everything that we must put into place in order to STOP a Blue Wave by defending our Republican Senate Majority, to ensure the Democrats don 't effectively cut President Trump's term in half**_**!** Fellow Conservative, the Radical Left is raising RECORD-BREAKING funds while making plans for a Blue Wave in the next election to take back the Senate. That's why President Trump has given me the task of delivering victories nationwide to ensure we defend, and work to increase, our Majority next year! Please understand that our opponents have been working around the clock since last November, plotting a course to take back the Senate. We have a lot to discuss about how we can stop them! To join, just dial in at this **CONFIDENTIAL** toll-free number:**833-380-0731**. _**_This briefing is for Constitutional Conservatives only, so do not share this message with anyone who is not like-minded_**_** _._** During the call, you will have an opportunity to ask me your questions directly, and I look forward to answering them. Friend, your participation in the fight to protect our values and defend our Senate Majority is critical to the future of our great nation. Thanks in advance for joining the call on **Monday****, June 23****rd********at 6:30 PM Central**. I look forward to speaking with you. For liberty, Ted Cruz

name: Mitch Kates
subject: They’re watching. Let’s show them what comes next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

More than 80,000 people showed up in Philly last weekend.
Not to scream into the void — but to send a message that echoed across the country:

**_We won’t be ruled by Trump. Not by fear. Not by force._**

The visuals got attention — but it was the people that made it matter. Protestors of every background stood shoulder to shoulder and made something clear: we’re done waiting for freedom to be handed to us. We’re taking it.

Now we organize to make that message real — in the courts, in the streets, and at the ballot box.

**[If you joined us in the streets or signed your name to the petition, the next step is this: help us fund the work it takes to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110051049/553105678/1318455813?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250622_FR_nokings_0_3MO_padems_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDhhMWNkOC04YjRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rgA44uw0Vutb2dLWjE9sCalPryBnHXdA6vM8XOxufc=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: | | Peter, More than 80,000 people showed up in Philly last weekend. Not to scream into the void — but to send a message that echoed across the country: We won’t be ruled by Trump. Not by fear. Not by force. The visuals got attention — but it was the people that made it matter. Protestors of every background stood shoulder to shoulder and made something clear: we’re done waiting for freedom to be handed to us. We’re taking it. Now we organize to make that message real — in the courts, in the streets, and at the ballot box. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We don’t need military parades. name: Team WFP
subject: Trump's attacks on Iran are illegal. Congress needs to stop him.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Trump's reckless actions are putting working people all across our country in danger. | | | Peter, Last night, Donald Trump made the decision to launch illegal offensive strikes on Iran, plunging the United States directly into a conflict with potentially devastating consequences. His reckless actions are putting working people all across our country in danger. **Let’s be clear: Donald Trump cannot unilaterally declare war on another nation — only Congress has the power to authorize war.** Congress must put a stop to these attacks by passing the War Powers Resolution immediately. Text **NO WAR to 30403** or call **771-203-5563** to reach your representative’s office and demand they sign on to the War Powers Resolution to put a stop to U.S. involvement in yet another senseless war. Americans across the political spectrum are opposed to U.S. involvement in the conflict between Israel and Iran. Trump has no legal authority to start such a war. **Every member of Congress needs to hear that their constituents want them to pass the War Powers Resolution immediately and put a stop to these reckless, illegal attacks.** Text **NO WAR to 30403** or call **771-203-5563** to reach your representative’s office now and urge them to sign on to the War Powers Resolution. name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Let’s get to work.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Georgia Democrats are facing a special election for a seat in the state Senate, and the stakes are sky high. We’re fighting to flip as many seats as possible in ultra-competitive chambers like this. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Did you hear what’s happening in Georgia on August 26th?** Polls will close in a special election for a seat in Georgia’s state Senate – and Democrat Debra Shigley will be in a unique position to **_FLIP_** the long-standing Republican stronghold. | | Friend, June is Pride Month — a time to celebrate the resilience, strength, and joy of our LGBTQ+ community. It’s also a reminder of the importance of supporting organizations that uplift and protect our neighbors. Here in Oakland, we are so fortunate to have our LGBTQ+ Community Center fighting to protect our community. They provide vital services to LGBTQ+ individuals and their families, including mental health support, housing assistance, youth programming, and crisis intervention services. | [Learn more about the Oakland LGBTQ+ Center → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110052129/553108728/1022122870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJjN2U2MzYtOTA0Zi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SmrHDvqL1zAentO5lw28HAe-cdMrsq0NzHqQjFWNAzE=&emci=de6af7c5-6a4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1bc7e636-904f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22554739)
---
This month, the Center is hosting free testing clinics, gender-affirming care services, and other community events to make sure everyone has access to the care they deserve. I encourage you to check out their calendar of events here: **[https://www.oaklandlgbtqcenter.org/calendar](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110052130/553108729/-249700903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJjN2U2MzYtOTA0Zi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SmrHDvqL1zAentO5lw28HAe-cdMrsq0NzHqQjFWNAzE=&emci=de6af7c5-6a4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1bc7e636-904f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22554739)**
[View the Oakland LGBTQ+ Center Calendar → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110052131/553108730/-249700903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJjN2U2MzYtOTA0Zi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SmrHDvqL1zAentO5lw28HAe-cdMrsq0NzHqQjFWNAzE=&emci=de6af7c5-6a4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1bc7e636-904f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22554739)
---
Volunteers are the heart of the center’s work. If you’re able, I hope you’ll consider volunteering your time or talents to support their mission. Whether it’s helping at a clinic, mentoring youth, or offering administrative support, every contribution makes a difference.
[Volunteer Link Here → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110052132/553108731/-1410583824?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJjN2U2MzYtOTA0Zi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SmrHDvqL1zAentO5lw28HAe-cdMrsq0NzHqQjFWNAzE=&emci=de6af7c5-6a4c-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1bc7e636-904f-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22554739)

Let’s continue to stand together in love and solidarity—not just this Pride month, but every day.
Thank you,
Lateefah Simon

Peter, Last Saturday, thousands of Hoosiers gathered in cities large and small across our state. Their message: we oppose the Trump-DOGE cuts and the tax increases at the Statehouse. In some of the reddest places in our state, hundreds of Hoosiers gathered. Even in LaGrange, Warsaw, Pendleton, and many other places where Donald Trump won by large margins. **This is why your donation is important.** _This is our moment to tell Hoosiers our agenda to escape the mess Republicans put us in. Let’s invest in early childhood education, and make Pre-K universal for every Hoosier child. Let’s provide real tax relief to working families and fight rising costs.[**_If you’re with us, help us fight for these important policies, and elect Democratic candidates in 2026 with a donation today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110052548/553110010/1764064610?refcode=250622success&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2E1NDBmMi05MTRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iaREor9T_Jjmwm35xxwk6i6EMSROYuP1UeW_N7BpN4M=)_ It’s clear that Hoosiers are fed up with the Republican agenda that’s hurting working families and raising our taxes.

Hi there, it’s Nadav – Nikki’s finance director. 👋

I’m sorry for reaching out over the weekend, but I just crunched the numbers ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline. **[I’m hoping to see another 7 donations from 18326 today – can you chip in $3 then let me explain why?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110052915/553111301/753003349?refcode=em-6.22.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWY1YWNkYS05MjRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKB14KfEOWA6XBRHssUSqGdjJHI0P13TnSjmtj3EJhk=)**

Take it from me: Nikki is one of the most effective fighters in Congress.

She’s dedicated her career to uplifting working families – and right now, she’s pushing back on the disastrous Trump agenda that’s slashing essential programs including Medicaid and SNAP.

Now, she already has two declared Republican challengers in this race, and the NRCC – the premier Republican fundraising arm – has started their attacks.

**Nikki made history when she flipped this seat and became the first woman to ever represent IL-13 in Congress. She defeated a self-funded Republican, and the GOP has been trying to take this seat back ever since.**

With only three seats separating control of the House, we can’t afford to fall short. Our end-of-quarter deadline is fast approaching, and we need a strong showing to prepare for the coming battles ahead.

**[Can Nikki and I count on your $3 donation today? Whatever amount you can give will immediately be put to work defending this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110052916/553111302/753003349?refcode=em-6.22.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWY1YWNkYS05MjRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PKB14KfEOWA6XBRHssUSqGdjJHI0P13TnSjmtj3EJhk=)**

clean_body: | = Hi there, it’s Nadav – Nikki’s finance director. 👋 I’m sorry for reaching out over the weekend, but I just crunched the numbers ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline. = Take it from me: Nikki is one of the most effective fighters in Congress. She’s dedicated her career to uplifting working families – and right now, she’s pushing back on the disastrous Trump agenda that’s slashing essential programs including Medicaid and SNAP. Now, she already has two declared Republican challengers in this race, and the NRCC – the premier Republican fundraising arm – has started their attacks. Nikki made history when she flipped this seat and became the first woman to ever represent IL-13 in Congress. She defeated a self-funded Republican, and the GOP has been trying to take this seat back ever since. With only three seats separating control of the House, we can’t afford to fall short. Our end-of-quarter deadline is fast approaching, and we need a strong showing to prepare for the coming battles ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nadav | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. * * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas creating task forces to target Permian Basin oil field thefts,** " Texas Tribune's**Carlos Nogueras Lopez** - "At least three times a week, **Darin Mitchell** gets the call.

Oil drums have been stolen. Copper wires were yanked. Other field equipment at an oil and gas facility was pilfered.

The Winkler County Sheriff dispatches his officers to investigate, but they rarely catch the crime in the act or find the stolen product, worth tens of thousands of dollars.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/050bb511-71e4-4d46-be95-a93c5da58d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The West Texas county's ten deputies are overextended, policing 841 square miles, a combination of neighborhoods, a downtown area and the oil and gas facilities surrounding them. He doesn't have the manpower -- or the money, he said -- to investigate every instance.

"I don't have a dedicated person to just sit out there," he said. "The county can't afford just to hire somebody full-time to do oil field thefts."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/050bb511-71e4-4d46-be95-a93c5da58d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Texas Legislature has stepped in, passing a suite of bills that lawmakers, the sheriff, and oil and gas industry leaders said are crucial to combat what they say is a billion-dollar loss in oil field thefts in the Permian Basin, the state's largest oil field.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** signed all three this month in Midland, saying in a statement that Texas is "bringing the full weight of the law to crack down on oil theft in the Permian Basin to protect the critical role energy development plays in fueling our economy."

Written by state Rep. **Drew Darby** , R-San Angelo, and Sen. **Kevin Sparks** , R-Midland, the bills instruct the Department of Public Safety and the Texas Railroad Commission, which regulates the state's oil and gas industry, to create task forces that will investigate oil field robberies. The effort will cost taxpayers nearly $5 million.

[House Bill 48](https://substack.com/redirect/8570f96f-1cdc-4597-a056-4cef1f711222?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), by Darby, establishes a DPS-created oil field theft prevention unit. The members comprising it can enforce existing laws, in addition to providing training, resources and strategies specific to deterring such thefts. The task force is also charged with conducting public awareness campaigns. Every two years, the body must report back to the legislature.

In a statement to The Texas Tribune, Darby called oil field theft "a complex, highly coordinated criminal enterprise, often with direct connections to cartels. This escalating threat poses serious risks not only to the oil and gas industry -- a cornerstone of our state's economy -- but also to the safety of our communities and the survival of small, hardworking businesses."

He said his bills are meant to "systematically take apart" criminal networks profiting from energy infrastructure.

[Senate Bill 494](https://substack.com/redirect/0d60aeb5-8647-4adc-977e-6b694bcbeee5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), authored by Sparks, directs the Railroad Commission to create a second task force to prevent the theft of petroleum products. This body must consist of proxies from the oil and gas industry, an oil and gas trade association and law enforcement agencies. They will conduct ongoing studies regarding theft, review the effectiveness of laws and analyze whether local and county governments are losing money in sales taxes as a result.

Another Sparks bill, [Senate Bill 1806](https://substack.com/redirect/546e87c7-8169-4757-8c91-39d608258b86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), authorizes DPS to inspect oil field cargo tanks they suspect of being used to transport stolen oil, take samples from the vehicle and study them in a crime laboratory. The bill authorizes apprehending officers to return the product or sell it and reimburse the company from which it was stolen.

The bill also increases the penalties for oil and gas theft. Transporting petroleum products to a waste disposal location is a felony with a penalty of at least $100,000; purchasing petroleum products without authorization from railroad commission can bring a penalty of up to $100,000; storing, purchasing or trading a petroleum product without authorization from the railroad commission can result in in a penalty of up to $10,000.

**Ed Longanecker,** president of the Texas Independent Producers and Royalty Owners Association, a trade group, said the bills were their top priority. He said one of their largest members lost $1.1 million in crude oil and equipment theft and damages between 2023 and 2024.

"And, again, this is just one of thousands of operators in Texas that have been victims of these crimes," Longanecker said.

A task force led by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, he said, estimated that operators in the Permian Basin lose up to $300,000 a month in stolen tools, pipes and valves.

"Considering more than 2 billion barrels of oil and condensate were produced in Texas in 2024, the loss is estimated to be in the billions of dollars annually," he said." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/9771c46a-c50c-4c21-8157-4a9856915489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS "Texas creating task forces to target Permian Basin oil field thefts, " Texas Tribune'sCarlos Nogueras Lopez - "At least three times a week, Darin Mitchell gets the call. Oil drums have been stolen. Copper wires were yanked. Other field equipment at an oil and gas facility was pilfered. The Winkler County Sheriff dispatches his officers to investigate, but they rarely catch the crime in the act or find the stolen product, worth tens of thousands of dollars. The West Texas county's ten deputies are overextended, policing 841 square miles, a combination of neighborhoods, a downtown area and the oil and gas facilities surrounding them. He doesn't have the manpower -- or the money, he said -- to investigate every instance. "I don't have a dedicated person to just sit out there," he said. "The county can't afford just to hire somebody full-time to do oil field thefts." The Texas Legislature has stepped in, passing a suite of bills that lawmakers, the sheriff, and oil and gas industry leaders said are crucial to combat what they say is a billion-dollar loss in oil field thefts in the Permian Basin, the state's largest oil field. Gov. Greg Abbott signed all three this month in Midland, saying in a statement that Texas is "bringing the full weight of the law to crack down on oil theft in the Permian Basin to protect the critical role energy development plays in fueling our economy." Written by state Rep. Drew Darby , R-San Angelo, and Sen. Kevin Sparks , R-Midland, the bills instruct the Department of Public Safety and the Texas Railroad Commission, which regulates the state's oil and gas industry, to create task forces that will investigate oil field robberies. The effort will cost taxpayers nearly $5 million. , by Darby, establishes a DPS-created oil field theft prevention unit. The members comprising it can enforce existing laws, in addition to providing training, resources and strategies specific to deterring such thefts. The task force is also charged with conducting public awareness campaigns. Every two years, the body must report back to the legislature. In a statement to The Texas Tribune, Darby called oil field theft "a complex, highly coordinated criminal enterprise, often with direct connections to cartels. This escalating threat poses serious risks not only to the oil and gas industry -- a cornerstone of our state's economy -- but also to the safety of our communities and the survival of small, hardworking businesses." He said his bills are meant to "systematically take apart" criminal networks profiting from energy infrastructure. , authored by Sparks, directs the Railroad Commission to create a second task force to prevent the theft of petroleum products. This body must consist of proxies from the oil and gas industry, an oil and gas trade association and law enforcement agencies. They will conduct ongoing studies regarding theft, review the effectiveness of laws and analyze whether local and county governments are losing money in sales taxes as a result. Another Sparks bill, , authorizes DPS to inspect oil field cargo tanks they suspect of being used to transport stolen oil, take samples from the vehicle and study them in a crime laboratory. The bill authorizes apprehending officers to return the product or sell it and reimburse the company from which it was stolen. The bill also increases the penalties for oil and gas theft. Transporting petroleum products to a waste disposal location is a felony with a penalty of at least $100,000; purchasing petroleum products without authorization from railroad commission can bring a penalty of up to $100,000; storing, purchasing or trading a petroleum product without authorization from the railroad commission can result in in a penalty of up to $10,000. Ed Longanecker, president of the Texas Independent Producers and Royalty Owners Association, a trade group, said the bills were their top priority. He said one of their largest members lost $1.1 million in crude oil and equipment theft and damages between 2023 and 2024. "And, again, this is just one of thousands of operators in Texas that have been victims of these crimes," Longanecker said. A task force led by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, he said, estimated that operators in the Permian Basin lose up to $300,000 a month in stolen tools, pipes and valves. "Considering more than 2 billion barrels of oil and condensate were produced in Texas in 2024, the loss is estimated to be in the billions of dollars annually," he said." Oil drums have been stolen. Copper wires were yanked. Other field equipment at an oil and gas facility was pilfered.

The Winkler County Sheriff dispatches his officers to investigate, but they rarely catch the crime in the act or find the stolen product, worth tens of thousands of dollars.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/3d7b6aa4-8ade-4445-8d41-f26a95d7c0d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The West Texas county's ten deputies are overextended, policing 841 square miles, a combination of neighborhoods, a downtown area and the oil and gas facilities surrounding them. He doesn't have the manpower -- or the money, he said -- to investigate every instance.

"I don't have a dedicated person to just sit out there," he said. "The county can't afford just to hire somebody full-time to do oil field thefts."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/3d7b6aa4-8ade-4445-8d41-f26a95d7c0d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Texas Legislature has stepped in, passing a suite of bills that lawmakers, the sheriff, and oil and gas industry leaders said are crucial to combat what they say is a billion-dollar loss in oil field thefts in the Permian Basin, the state's largest oil field.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** signed all three this month in Midland, saying in a statement that Texas is "bringing the full weight of the law to crack down on oil theft in the Permian Basin to protect the critical role energy development plays in fueling our economy."

Written by state Rep. **Drew Darby** , R-San Angelo, and Sen. **Kevin Sparks** , R-Midland, the bills instruct the Department of Public Safety and the Texas Railroad Commission, which regulates the state's oil and gas industry, to create task forces that will investigate oil field robberies. The effort will cost taxpayers nearly $5 million.

[House Bill 48](https://substack.com/redirect/9f5bb22f-6e6d-4ec3-8f3e-756d4ed1aac7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), by Darby, establishes a DPS-created oil field theft prevention unit. The members comprising it can enforce existing laws, in addition to providing training, resources and strategies specific to deterring such thefts. The task force is also charged with conducting public awareness campaigns. Every two years, the body must report back to the legislature.

In a statement to The Texas Tribune, Darby called oil field theft "a complex, highly coordinated criminal enterprise, often with direct connections to cartels. This escalating threat poses serious risks not only to the oil and gas industry -- a cornerstone of our state's economy -- but also to the safety of our communities and the survival of small, hardworking businesses."

He said his bills are meant to "systematically take apart" criminal networks profiting from energy infrastructure.

[Senate Bill 494](https://substack.com/redirect/393eba06-784b-41b9-b039-fbcde57f873d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), authored by Sparks, directs the Railroad Commission to create a second task force to prevent the theft of petroleum products. This body must consist of proxies from the oil and gas industry, an oil and gas trade association and law enforcement agencies. They will conduct ongoing studies regarding theft, review the effectiveness of laws and analyze whether local and county governments are losing money in sales taxes as a result.

Another Sparks bill, [Senate Bill 1806](https://substack.com/redirect/5782f179-14d4-4b02-bef1-d7de2c7a238c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), authorizes DPS to inspect oil field cargo tanks they suspect of being used to transport stolen oil, take samples from the vehicle and study them in a crime laboratory. The bill authorizes apprehending officers to return the product or sell it and reimburse the company from which it was stolen.

The bill also increases the penalties for oil and gas theft. Transporting petroleum products to a waste disposal location is a felony with a penalty of at least $100,000; purchasing petroleum products without authorization from railroad commission can bring a penalty of up to $100,000; storing, purchasing or trading a petroleum product without authorization from the railroad commission can result in in a penalty of up to $10,000.

**Ed Longanecker,** president of the Texas Independent Producers and Royalty Owners Association, a trade group, said the bills were their top priority. He said one of their largest members lost $1.1 million in crude oil and equipment theft and damages between 2023 and 2024.

"And, again, this is just one of thousands of operators in Texas that have been victims of these crimes," Longanecker said.

A task force led by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, he said, estimated that operators in the Permian Basin lose up to $300,000 a month in stolen tools, pipes and valves.

"Considering more than 2 billion barrels of oil and condensate were produced in Texas in 2024, the loss is estimated to be in the billions of dollars annually," he said." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/7da01318-0956-4f7b-8ade-d94f12d739a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

He said one of their largest members lost $1.1 million in crude oil and equipment theft and damages between 2023 and 2024. "And, again, this is just one of thousands of operators in Texas that have been victims of these crimes," Longanecker said. A task force led by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, he said, estimated that operators in the Permian Basin lose up to $300,000 a month in stolen tools, pipes and valves. "Considering more than 2 billion barrels of oil and condensate were produced in Texas in 2024, the loss is estimated to be in the billions of dollars annually," he said." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. * **TOP NEWS**

“**Texas creating task forces to target Permian Basin oil field thefts,** ” Texas Tribune's**Carlos Nogueras Lopez** – “At least three times a week, **Darin Mitchell** gets the call.

Oil drums have been stolen. Copper wires were yanked. Other field equipment at an oil and gas facility was pilfered.

The Winkler County Sheriff dispatches his officers to investigate, but they rarely catch the crime in the act or find the stolen product, worth tens of thousands of dollars.
» [BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.IpGzAqnc3m6dMmKQdod4OdZdsfX-sjnRfDuEmaXW-5lN-IqpP1xu2_Ygevf9CBs8iGkDwdDuKv-OIdRCcryDDgoqnwbBfsyGSk_4VJrOSCvmgxZEZTEXv72w0U68JXHpny88FhFoE4mM3a9phL8bbAddlo24WCcslgtb2vfUXQkIS_WP7OYod6bzSKI5vU5GFISBCaYGlhN79NKNJEGOf8RV5BvbRxifeMr3owxUGdS8ElGNqvS3qXGZ-4ijLmRcp0Cu42E-qFPW2wjDaJ4AjWi-C_MrRcwviQ18tCejne-Gq2wdN8xb4SgVoHpZ0GFMobJ08VPGgOPe8DerWeJQTdOSScp_3xVyCNRPSEnOmuDJAr5JJwBNYWGLHytrJ1Uu2djC4El4Kz_aH68jybdTLErTsMYuMPWBEiVdUBDvRyUEsj9FooTmQrUX95XmhBdX/4hk/x5oYdKG2Qxer5Q5bF6xD8Q/h10/h001.n61-n2BCBY5Qsxvy21jMcfMpX0o6D7JZNzKARp-VvVI)
The West Texas county’s ten deputies are overextended, policing 841 square miles, a combination of neighborhoods, a downtown area and the oil and gas facilities surrounding them. He doesn’t have the manpower — or the money, he said — to investigate every instance.

“I don’t have a dedicated person to just sit out there,” he said. “The county can’t afford just to hire somebody full-time to do oil field thefts.”
» [BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.IpGzAqnc3m6dMmKQdod4OdZdsfX-sjnRfDuEmaXW-5lN-IqpP1xu2_Ygevf9CBs8iGkDwdDuKv-OIdRCcryDDgoqnwbBfsyGSk_4VJrOSCvmgxZEZTEXv72w0U68JXHpny88FhFoE4mM3a9phL8bbAddlo24WCcslgtb2vfUXQkIS_WP7OYod6bzSKI5vU5GFISBCaYGlhN79NKNJEGOf8RV5BvbRxifeMr3owxUGdS8ElGNqvS3qXGZ-4ijLmRcp0Cu42E-qFPW2wjDaJ4AjWi-C_MrRcwviQ18tCejne-Gq2wdN8xb4SgVoHpZ0GFMobJ08VPGgOPe8DerWeJQTdOSScp_3xVyCNRPSEnOmuDJAr5JJwBNYWGLHytrJ1UuYoikN4WFRBApXy78VfieCmByAmvOzRvd31ik-JINT62lKqeNEVF-S2OGDgLuL3-I/4hk/x5oYdKG2Qxer5Q5bF6xD8Q/h11/h001.G4Mph7mkbjfd1seEPhHZIP4o9NX-xMMDynaqAu07KHE)
The Texas Legislature has stepped in, passing a suite of bills that lawmakers, the sheriff, and oil and gas industry leaders said are crucial to combat what they say is a billion-dollar loss in oil field thefts in the Permian Basin, the state’s largest oil field.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** signed all three this month in Midland, saying in a statement that Texas is “bringing the full weight of the law to crack down on oil theft in the Permian Basin to protect the critical role energy development plays in fueling our economy.”

Written by state Rep. **Drew Darby** , R-San Angelo, and Sen. **Kevin Sparks** , R-Midland, the bills instruct the Department of Public Safety and the Texas Railroad Commission, which regulates the state’s oil and gas industry, to create task forces that will investigate oil field robberies. The effort will cost taxpayers nearly $5 million.

[House Bill 48](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.y1qQg7vX491TJbzrGLYTuEYT0yv_aZw1IceJac_-o0Y-UGIWKkPTFm9Kz5DRdvb_-aYU7NLaOywMgY5yceksY0UkC0Vec0_fH3rXrzRLrA_Eon_w4AlRj2HZeViaa-kPSqTywZuUevx3bDfrfQylBcKx6Tb4rEKQDJh_UeFxJeOCreQTl7kQPZ995mWE6KX3Xq5suG9iBCjZBg2gE_b7aqELPFbN8aDlCntRj-o3c0xose0cYuwu-rmqF_7FCQftxwUvKmPSoU6Z-Qxar_PkAEjPEFSoqtY0iSQjOsJxcsSgsds8NzQhC-VlM_LGxZLaOFz3x0DBvfANXlTJZC0iUSmE6wph3uCks-h-4LS6MPJEFs8QrkHObQhKGvfTpKe7kxhsrFVxZj0hADawp0RzbBmfwlRuhrM4b3U_y6r_hUhm_gpPZEKLKBrVt02AWd40pbKQ7l9BXRpVb0bQ9WxpnRuEd87mb59Yu8yH-61PdNPAr6MynVOoIdCa6HjGQlEe/4hk/x5oYdKG2Qxer5Q5bF6xD8Q/h12/h001.p8AaSk5fw1P6ZqFPyqPRJ_aHMlN1XeP3bk6l_bvBAGs), by Darby, establishes a DPS-created oil field theft prevention unit. The members comprising it can enforce existing laws, in addition to providing training, resources and strategies specific to deterring such thefts. The task force is also charged with conducting public awareness campaigns. Every two years, the body must report back to the legislature.

In a statement to The Texas Tribune, Darby called oil field theft “a complex, highly coordinated criminal enterprise, often with direct connections to cartels. This escalating threat poses serious risks not only to the oil and gas industry — a cornerstone of our state’s economy — but also to the safety of our communities and the survival of small, hardworking businesses.”

He said his bills are meant to “systematically take apart” criminal networks profiting from energy infrastructure.

[Senate Bill 494](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.y1qQg7vX491TJbzrGLYTuEYT0yv_aZw1IceJac_-o0Y-UGIWKkPTFm9Kz5DRdvb_-aYU7NLaOywMgY5yceksY7WMQbGeIzMEseNtAVaFQS3_zfGQekOwFncIySNbVrgvFdQP2fZqsdp8RG5W51wo1YYPW99czYvCA27GEvBkZtZx_rdcRXgNP_F3--nNft_Cd0dr8QE7qpreAOQrDlFeR5Nk08aMMwB6pOulNZKXmq28b4dnz-D4kKwXAvg24gTWmL_9IDXdOtMBdlMxjSwqO2jB5FxomTX72TWEkQHRsoBe4srTAu_z9zGhiGz286fBV83QP5xGJej9aGwsgjx-i5MR4_IEaFKAQYp0Ci8bGLpj8wHLWfUqrVsMOVh3_SKwm_kv_tWDLk5xe2vzZLOgUUyzc-dnG65t6rC2QSFNXJix85-JwYnuWE3jeVOtXTOdbM13mZsjvVksM7vuaicApRAwzg9pfJYZtwQalke7xiU9g-1-4AQOKBCeA3c4D446/4hk/x5oYdKG2Qxer5Q5bF6xD8Q/h13/h001.VU1gnyXkuJ3ntuQpyECDpd67xn-EojrApOKB-1jbM0k), authored by Sparks, directs the Railroad Commission to create a second task force to prevent the theft of petroleum products. This body must consist of proxies from the oil and gas industry, an oil and gas trade association and law enforcement agencies. They will conduct ongoing studies regarding theft, review the effectiveness of laws and analyze whether local and county governments are losing money in sales taxes as a result.

Another Sparks bill, [Senate Bill 1806](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.y1qQg7vX491TJbzrGLYTuEYT0yv_aZw1IceJac_-o0Y-UGIWKkPTFm9Kz5DRdvb_-aYU7NLaOywMgY5yceksY5XPgL1CARU77KsmqysYQfc_2WTxyRoUbuMG7V1KhuAcdyuj3W5OB_3qC1t6I897gqKUeAA7sNxz7Um-tLDHeqlXfFfRacdVZarhu31HiSpKW3Fe-g_pW5SlOI0rLCQCackx0OSFjHrmCM21JpISiFcFGSp6qKTY6sATtj_AfZhxkSOnctlAzpREGPyWn0EP6cc8hkKhOo4_TjX98dhipJTVGPyKbva2ytO8kzTg3TG2Ix0X1Q-9WDlUFrgloG8KQ6MWW_vVn8UrlQW6Ez82Ff-JPNl_m6j-0c4lECNxrIQmQ8ymUSiAUEKRLbcckTLdHZ0mA82Z1BkFwktcURGohfNgjsO6p4maoXK3I0ta1x0qOyK82HrzStI9eWzBu44P93aEIG-Y40DhDM81LoKqyAYXBVPu77Oo1sRRR5k_XmoQ/4hk/x5oYdKG2Qxer5Q5bF6xD8Q/h14/h001.wpdCJGh_9gekri9ljDncnDCpwbtbmR08_l3D6B2df8Q), authorizes DPS to inspect oil field cargo tanks they suspect of being used to transport stolen oil, take samples from the vehicle and study them in a crime laboratory. The bill authorizes apprehending officers to return the product or sell it and reimburse the company from which it was stolen.

The bill also increases the penalties for oil and gas theft. Transporting petroleum products to a waste disposal location is a felony with a penalty of at least $100,000; purchasing petroleum products without authorization from railroad commission can bring a penalty of up to $100,000; storing, purchasing or trading a petroleum product without authorization from the railroad commission can result in in a penalty of up to $10,000.

**Ed Longanecker,** president of the Texas Independent Producers and Royalty Owners Association, a trade group, said the bills were their top priority. He said one of their largest members lost $1.1 million in crude oil and equipment theft and damages between 2023 and 2024.

“And, again, this is just one of thousands of operators in Texas that have been victims of these crimes,” Longanecker said.

A task force led by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, he said, estimated that operators in the Permian Basin lose up to $300,000 a month in stolen tools, pipes and valves.

“Considering more than 2 billion barrels of oil and condensate were produced in Texas in 2024, the loss is estimated to be in the billions of dollars annually,” he said." Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Texas creating task forces to target Permian Basin oil field thefts, ” Texas Tribune'sCarlos Nogueras Lopez – “At least three times a week, Darin Mitchell gets the call. Oil drums have been stolen. Copper wires were yanked. Other field equipment at an oil and gas facility was pilfered. The Winkler County Sheriff dispatches his officers to investigate, but they rarely catch the crime in the act or find the stolen product, worth tens of thousands of dollars. » The West Texas county’s ten deputies are overextended, policing 841 square miles, a combination of neighborhoods, a downtown area and the oil and gas facilities surrounding them. He doesn’t have the manpower — or the money, he said — to investigate every instance. “I don’t have a dedicated person to just sit out there,” he said. “The county can’t afford just to hire somebody full-time to do oil field thefts.” » The Texas Legislature has stepped in, passing a suite of bills that lawmakers, the sheriff, and oil and gas industry leaders said are crucial to combat what they say is a billion-dollar loss in oil field thefts in the Permian Basin, the state’s largest oil field. Gov. Greg Abbott signed all three this month in Midland, saying in a statement that Texas is “bringing the full weight of the law to crack down on oil theft in the Permian Basin to protect the critical role energy development plays in fueling our economy.” Written by state Rep. Drew Darby , R-San Angelo, and Sen. Kevin Sparks , R-Midland, the bills instruct the Department of Public Safety and the Texas Railroad Commission, which regulates the state’s oil and gas industry, to create task forces that will investigate oil field robberies. The effort will cost taxpayers nearly $5 million. , by Darby, establishes a DPS-created oil field theft prevention unit. The members comprising it can enforce existing laws, in addition to providing training, resources and strategies specific to deterring such thefts. The task force is also charged with conducting public awareness campaigns. Every two years, the body must report back to the legislature. In a statement to The Texas Tribune, Darby called oil field theft “a complex, highly coordinated criminal enterprise, often with direct connections to cartels. This escalating threat poses serious risks not only to the oil and gas industry — a cornerstone of our state’s economy — but also to the safety of our communities and the survival of small, hardworking businesses.” He said his bills are meant to “systematically take apart” criminal networks profiting from energy infrastructure. , authored by Sparks, directs the Railroad Commission to create a second task force to prevent the theft of petroleum products. This body must consist of proxies from the oil and gas industry, an oil and gas trade association and law enforcement agencies. They will conduct ongoing studies regarding theft, review the effectiveness of laws and analyze whether local and county governments are losing money in sales taxes as a result. Another Sparks bill, , authorizes DPS to inspect oil field cargo tanks they suspect of being used to transport stolen oil, take samples from the vehicle and study them in a crime laboratory. The bill authorizes apprehending officers to return the product or sell it and reimburse the company from which it was stolen. The bill also increases the penalties for oil and gas theft. Transporting petroleum products to a waste disposal location is a felony with a penalty of at least $100,000; purchasing petroleum products without authorization from railroad commission can bring a penalty of up to $100,000; storing, purchasing or trading a petroleum product without authorization from the railroad commission can result in in a penalty of up to $10,000. Ed Longanecker, president of the Texas Independent Producers and Royalty Owners Association, a trade group, said the bills were their top priority. He said one of their largest members lost $1.1 million in crude oil and equipment theft and damages between 2023 and 2024. “And, again, this is just one of thousands of operators in Texas that have been victims of these crimes,” Longanecker said. A task force led by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, he said, estimated that operators in the Permian Basin lose up to $300,000 a month in stolen tools, pipes and valves. “Considering more than 2 billion barrels of oil and condensate were produced in Texas in 2024, the loss is estimated to be in the billions of dollars annually,” he said." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. body:
Mariannette Miller-Meeks isn’t looking out for us.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110054706/553116636/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWE0NjBjNy05NjRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y8K5396yr-QGT1CWrDCgkgxN7Qm8Kue6mEBFj4guyR4=)

Peter, isn’t it funny how some politicians will say anything to get elected and then turn around and do the exact opposite?

_**That’s Mariannette Miller-Meeks in a nutshell.**_

She ran on protecting Iowa. The second she got back to Congress, she made it clear who she’s really working for: special interests, corporate backers, and party bosses.

She’s supported a plan to slash Medicaid, hurting thousands of Iowa families — _and when asked about it, she literally ran from reporters._ She backs Trump’s tax bill that hands massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy, while working Iowans get crumbs. And she’s been _completely silent_ as Trump’s tariffs put family farms and small businesses at risk.

**Mariannette Miller-Meeks isn’t looking out for us.** That’s _exactly_ why Christina Bohannan is running to defeat her. Christina knows this district deserves leadership rooted in truth and service to the community. But she can't win without your help.

**[This race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country. In 2024, we came within 799 votes. In 2026, we can finish the job. clean_body: Mariannette Miller-Meeks isn’t looking out for us. | = Peter, isn’t it funny how some politicians will say anything to get elected and then turn around and do the exact opposite? That’s Mariannette Miller-Meeks in a nutshell. She ran on protecting Iowa. The second she got back to Congress, she made it clear who she’s really working for: special interests, corporate backers, and party bosses. She’s supported a plan to slash Medicaid, hurting thousands of Iowa families — and when asked about it, she literally ran from reporters. She backs Trump’s tax bill that hands massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy, while working Iowans get crumbs. And she’s been completely silent as Trump’s tariffs put family farms and small businesses at risk. Mariannette Miller-Meeks isn’t looking out for us. That’s exactly why Christina Bohannan is running to defeat her. Christina knows this district deserves leadership rooted in truth and service to the community.
