clean_body: Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:| | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

body:
| | |
In just one week, a jaw-dropping 247,000 unemployment filings were recorded on Trump’s watch. These figures serve as a chilling reminder of how catastrophic federal policies can ripple through our local communities. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPqmEKkGS-n2yu_beKTwN1qPGBS3dtUr_gig-Nrv7wcblp-gwfPK8vuK1XEj05wYjhQs5VFPRgqCiZDDKo0mqdcR1T02GBVGUN1zKY7zyWirmnFbz55EgyjceTjAR59OrV5w3Y0k91kPLe4csiz0SxULKTV2r9AzoqKoHvAJZfJnYJXM_yWgcW453Ue6emPoQ-TiRgUdS1RDLdIW5gsxzcU7vE5b5AfJjs8pVpc03IYnUVt5RsMzPYSaopbsROXYVD_foBoCXVvwo8i-bA3BgVDHg1jCPFeZ8TEc3HWeCFyIv/4hk/jPoE1MqBS2C109g0rtoEug/h0/h001.grajFl8HLQjTHGfHVEPWJWBtxOWtGFUugq15itxsvnM) To make matters worse, the Trump regime has [delayed and manipulated](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVJT_QAfJIq9dVvtuxDYLgzNC_iLobDO0RuS8GnKvS0Z0TyiV9rdWczufQnEe9Isvg2Pel0ZcuhcWILX6RDSszSMcFB78pktJjMax0O4johaTex6dO55T_omW7O2SL8-0B8FOrz69Xhhy_wDkCRFQQHycGx238l8SPpKcG8_PeZZBRM9D1dyOxS3eu18-EqgpTnIJ4a120xis3N-1mHnYG0YFW3498muIrDN-XmXhz4utUtdJ_ZMGh6F4rNuuYazYFIX9JKG20lxGzjpB6PaKWT8OT3EnHpBNtpjPp5l2_EW5THntDTV3PQptwEpjICdXM8oD-65sKNwsH5MJgjule_yYMEoAUJ0GrO8sYWBsSUO1fHLG10Q3lnDZpqJZl-YUPusQnOTgb0L-Q9rwcZWK9LKJOaGuV4XjVZxt1MOLhwjjQ/4hk/jPoE1MqBS2C109g0rtoEug/h1/h001.zt8a-XI0d0dFI9Tand1ftZWo58AgZvFE1EZYXeyop-M) the release of critical economic data that doesn’t align with its narrative. Economists are raising alarms about the integrity of our government's [economic information](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUtpOZyQouJGdXp7wZXxxidWw7QrsWKAPGzwtY2aLAbx6A0IC-UwGzVeoLaRUyVB7KBbev_qHZOC9Sso3KR6-R4apnSq2aK7tGHbKJgtX4Q6TntHW0AZxuhOYB9zE3rSzolY2H9rRSDk2m3dCdk8imCVdH_JGF8BVGVG5Nbi5zNWmAE8uMRvOl3oAAGu27BTFgnzNnqzYkWi-dny-wiLVxI73P6TjFFTgZue0PYWHKoA77QQU5LAZBMg-wXm8MEwYb9dG9DfZKq5ZjH_qZCSvlT2SMLaLa7lumK1k-OCNPlH3Xcz4wVDdPLKXBmTZXuGYWrZU0rJ5Z7xHyyYRC8iCfrFaut7Cj2qV7Qm_YUiY3boaHKYwHjO4JRSolux-6Z8jQ/4hk/jPoE1MqBS2C109g0rtoEug/h2/h001.knVYcnD8-4_yI9lyrq57okEeM4Xkrx74gXHjfc6c-mk), fearing that the Trump administration may be [cooking the books](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRXuNSlhDxcvv3N1sDz0lokSaF92HLStmNZdZsjb7S2CSuLj5vRsE6x3JpYDKFjj64XJ01hsKcuu5NkkNqYu6sFAyH2Ds3GgInJCUHeCDfSxhING5gpnJzfyIC1VSXOnWK6R2_m36AryN77ADg_r_SLs0TzUb6FYrTB_BlMWDhhhOxoTa8bK8-Mym7JQ4xxFWz-S_AE0aAaFeEOv68bOwuNVturp51zDgbMxsISL_RA963DrbJVhx4pW0zdrh9hGjP9FGOeo41O9zuEVqDpCLAjRlscNOAdvJ7BkrS-C5VtY1lrjUs_0rGfQxm31XzTytMCgxn1m-kgw0CjdP5lia2ZwOh_WVTI5h8sl8mp53iTF0fSJAhyfUi-yxgXU8ahf2N5-y_8uBfyni3Cd9_9G7mofIXCV9qkHvSY6zF4-A5IH/4hk/jPoE1MqBS2C109g0rtoEug/h3/h001.bZSJXQEk07FJ3uL2L8adTg8f04OnG7T7Cidl4H-gSgs) to present a rosier picture of our economy. _Local governments play a crucial role in safeguarding local economies through various strategies and initiatives_ _. They act as a vital component of economic activity by directly supporting businesses, workers, and consumers in their communities._ **That’s why Local Democracy Project is working tirelessly to safeguard our democracy from the ground up. clean_body: | | | In just one week, a jaw-dropping 247,000 unemployment filings were recorded on Trump’s watch. These figures serve as a chilling reminder of how catastrophic federal policies can ripple through our local communities. To make matters worse, the Trump regime has the release of critical economic data that doesn’t align with its narrative. Economists are raising alarms about the integrity of our government's , fearing that the Trump administration may be to present a rosier picture of our economy. Local governments play a crucial role in safeguarding local economies through various strategies and initiatives . They act as a vital component of economic activity by directly supporting businesses, workers, and consumers in their communities. That’s why Local Democracy Project is working tirelessly to safeguard our democracy from the ground up. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110055689/553119676/2039042026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZmMDc5M2ItOWI0Zi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zRzI2xNLVQWdqaVyhsl8vz0Z2n3x6NIRx_RFL4_DH6M=)
This is infuriating.

JD Vance was just in Los Angeles, where he defended sending Marines into our streets, then mocked Sen. Alex Padilla by calling him “José Padilla” -- the name of a convicted terrorist.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110055690/553119678/2039042026?refcode=em-6.22.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGZmMDc5M2ItOWI0Zi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zRzI2xNLVQWdqaVyhsl8vz0Z2n3x6NIRx_RFL4_DH6M=)
Somehow it gets worse, folks.

After disrespecting our city and senator, he went on to headline a high-dollar fundraiser in Beverly Hills with Trump’s billionaire allies. **They’re planning to funnel that cash into flipping districts like mine.**

My parents risked everything for my freedom, and I won this seat by just 653 votes. I’m not backing down to Vance or anyone else trying to divide our community and buy this seat.

**[But we’re racing toward the June 30 end-of-quarter deadline, and time is running out. clean_body: | = This is infuriating. JD Vance was just in Los Angeles, where he defended sending Marines into our streets, then mocked Sen. Alex Padilla by calling him “José Padilla” -- the name of a convicted terrorist. = Somehow it gets worse, folks. After disrespecting our city and senator, he went on to headline a high-dollar fundraiser in Beverly Hills with Trump’s billionaire allies. They’re planning to funnel that cash into flipping districts like mine. My parents risked everything for my freedom, and I won this seat by just 653 votes. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20297%2E878179%2EKPDJ8T). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20297%2E878179%2EKPDJ8T).**

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Another endless war is not the answer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/79097/images/YA%20-%20Congress%20-%20Logo%20-%20Primary%201%20%5BRGB%5D_Full_Color_Coral.png]
Peter,

Yesterday, Donald Trump confirmed that the United States carried out strikes on three Iranian military facilities.

The Trump administration illegally took military action without congressional authorization, risking dragging us into another never-ending war.

These actions will put American troops in danger and threaten to destabilize not just the region, but the world.

As the daughter of two Iranian immigrants, I’m no stranger to the horrors of the current regime in Iran. The people of Iran deserve freedom from the regime, and the people of Israel deserve security , but entering another endless war is not the answer.

That’s why I cosponsored the bipartisan War Powers Resolution to reassert that any U.S. military action against Iran must be authorized by Congress — as mandated by our Constitution. I am calling for an immediate emergency session of Congress to vote on this resolution.

We must continue working to hold this administration accountable for these dangerous actions.

More soon,

Yassamin
Yassamin Ansari for Congress
PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002
United States
yassaminforcongress.com [yassaminforcongress.com] | info@yassaminforcongress.com [info@yassaminforcongress.com]
Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: 🚨Our Public Lands Are Under Threat🚨
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/g1kliZvQLEizydEanq63Lw2?contactdata=o0/Tw9cYVbAQWhdiBnFY8lae6HmGLC9eRnO7/2cdxkUemapbCOh2Ohmn/16aUlS2eNbPRdtziyhNrjK4bg+ym8AQp2Qx2vBG2abdh2AOxeYJTrMU13CTsnWmw64QbUoB [https://secure.everyaction.com/g1kliZvQLEizydEanq63Lw2?contactdata=o0/Tw9cYVbAQWhdiBnFY8lae6HmGLC9eRnO7/2cdxkUemapbCOh2Ohmn/16aUlS2eNbPRdtziyhNrjK4bg+ym8AQp2Qx2vBG2abdh2AOxeYJTrMU13CTsnWmw64QbUoB]
Hi Peter,
Our public lands are under threat. The current version of the Republican Budget Reconciliation bill—AKA Trump’s so-called Big Beautiful Bill—directs what is likely the largest single sale of national public lands in modern history. [https://www.wilderness.org/articles/media-resources/250-million-acres-public-lands-eligible-sale-senr-budget-reconciliation-package] The process for selling off these public lands would be rapid and without debate or public input . We won’t stand for this and neither should you. Tell your lawmakers to keep public lands in the public’s hands. [https://secure.everyaction.com/g1kliZvQLEizydEanq63Lw2]
Take action [https://secure.everyaction.com/g1kliZvQLEizydEanq63Lw2?contactdata=o0/Tw9cYVbAQWhdiBnFY8lae6HmGLC9eRnO7/2cdxkUemapbCOh2Ohmn/16aUlS2eNbPRdtziyhNrjK4bg+ym8AQp2Qx2vBG2abdh2AOxeYJTrMU13CTsnWmw64QbUoB]
This proposal is being made under the guise of producing more housing, but research suggests that very little of this BLM and USFS land is even suitable for housing. The real reason for the proposed sell offs is to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest among us and deliver a huge victory for big oil and gas companies.
Of the 11 western states with eligible lands for sale, Oregon has the third highest amount with over 21.7 million acres! Oregon has more than FOUR TIMES the eligible acres as Washington state, which is a terrifying reminder that Oregon lags behind our neighbors in protecting our public lands. On top of this, Trump’s Department of Justice recently reversed a 1938 opinion [https://www.npr.org/2025/06/11/nx-s1-5430270/justice-department-says-trump-can-cancel-national-monuments-that-protect-landscapes] , ruling that presidents can undo established national monuments. That means even more of Oregon’s cherished public lands like Cascade-Siskiyou National Monument and the John Day Fossil Beds are also at risk to be sold off.
Take action [https://secure.everyaction.com/g1kliZvQLEizydEanq63Lw2?contactdata=o0/Tw9cYVbAQWhdiBnFY8lae6HmGLC9eRnO7/2cdxkUemapbCOh2Ohmn/16aUlS2eNbPRdtziyhNrjK4bg+ym8AQp2Qx2vBG2abdh2AOxeYJTrMU13CTsnWmw64QbUoB]
These proposed selloffs are, of course, in addition to the cuts to vital community and environmental programs, such as Medicaid, SNAP, and the historic Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) climate investments. Please urge our US Senators and your member of Congress to OPPOSE this horrible Reconciliation bill and any attempts to sell off our public lands! [https://secure.everyaction.com/g1kliZvQLEizydEanq63Lw2]
Thank you for being with us in this fight!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Our public lands are under threat. The current version of the Republican Budget Reconciliation bill—AKA Trump’s so-called Big Beautiful Bill—directs what is likely the largest single sale of national public lands in modern history. [] The process for selling off these public lands would be rapid and without debate or public input . We won’t stand for this and neither should you. Tell your lawmakers to keep public lands in the public’s hands. [] Take action [] This proposal is being made under the guise of producing more housing, but research suggests that very little of this BLM and USFS land is even suitable for housing. The real reason for the proposed sell offs is to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest among us and deliver a huge victory for big oil and gas companies. Of the 11 western states with eligible lands for sale, Oregon has the third highest amount with over 21.7 million acres! Oregon has more than FOUR TIMES the eligible acres as Washington state, which is a terrifying reminder that Oregon lags behind our neighbors in protecting our public lands. On top of this, Trump’s Department of Justice recently reversed a 1938 opinion [] , ruling that presidents can undo established national monuments. That means even more of Oregon’s cherished public lands like Cascade-Siskiyou National Monument and the John Day Fossil Beds are also at risk to be sold off. Take action [] These proposed selloffs are, of course, in addition to the cuts to vital community and environmental programs, such as Medicaid, SNAP, and the historic Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) climate investments. Please urge our US Senators and your member of Congress to OPPOSE this horrible Reconciliation bill and any attempts to sell off our public lands! [] Thank you for being with us in this fight! [] Britney VanCitters (she/her) OLCV Political & Organizing Director [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Iran
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8706%2E5257348%2EA9pI3f)
Derek, I wanted to share my thoughts with you on the United States’ military operation in Iran after I appeared on CNN earlier:
First and foremost, I am grateful for the professionalism and bravery of our armed forces, and I commend the meticulous planning and execution that kept servicemembers out of harm’s way during last night’s complex operation.
Nevertheless, in the absence of evidence that Iran had made the decision to build a bomb and was constructing the mechanism of a bomb.
**And without the approval of Congress, the order to attack Iran’s nuclear facilities was unconstitutional and should never have been given.**
The Iranian regime is a malevolent actor which supports terrorism against Americans and poses an existential threat to Israel.
But I am aware of no intelligence concluding that Iran’s acquisition of a bomb was imminent, and that would therefore justify this strike.
We simply do not know what will happen next, and a war with yet another country in the Middle East is not what Americans want, nor what Congress has authorized.
The President may declare this will be a one-time operation — but that is far from guaranteed.
This week, the Administration will finally brief Congress, and we must demand answers from them on their justification for these strikes, the intelligence they relied upon, their plan to prevent potential further escalation and retaliation against U.S. personnel and interests, and how they expect to reach a diplomatic deal to permanently stop Iran’s nuclear ambitions.
**_We must ensure that Donald Trump does not continue to unilaterally put American lives at risk._**
For the sake of the tens of thousands of American servicemembers stationed across the region, and others who may be mobilized in the future, we must ensure that Donald Trump cannot unilaterally immerse us in yet another war without justification to Congress or the American people.
More soon,
Adam

clean_body: | Derek, I wanted to share my thoughts with you on the United States’ military operation in Iran after I appeared on CNN earlier: First and foremost, I am grateful for the professionalism and bravery of our armed forces, and I commend the meticulous planning and execution that kept servicemembers out of harm’s way during last night’s complex operation. Nevertheless, in the absence of evidence that Iran had made the decision to build a bomb and was constructing the mechanism of a bomb. And without the approval of Congress, the order to attack Iran’s nuclear facilities was unconstitutional and should never have been given. The Iranian regime is a malevolent actor which supports terrorism against Americans and poses an existential threat to Israel. But I am aware of no intelligence concluding that Iran’s acquisition of a bomb was imminent, and that would therefore justify this strike. We simply do not know what will happen next, and a war with yet another country in the Middle East is not what Americans want, nor what Congress has authorized. The President may declare this will be a one-time operation — but that is far from guaranteed. This week, the Administration will finally brief Congress, and we must demand answers from them on their justification for these strikes, the intelligence they relied upon, their plan to prevent potential further escalation and retaliation against U.S. personnel and interests, and how they expect to reach a diplomatic deal to permanently stop Iran’s nuclear ambitions. We must ensure that Donald Trump does not continue to unilaterally put American lives at risk. For the sake of the tens of thousands of American servicemembers stationed across the region, and others who may be mobilized in the future, we must ensure that Donald Trump cannot unilaterally immerse us in yet another war without justification to Congress or the American people. THE STATE OF AFFAIRS!

Fellow patriot,

THIS IS AN INFLECTION POINT!

With Democrats trying to IMPEACH ME for a third time, I know that
I’m doing something right...

The Golden Age of America is just beginning, and as long as I am
President of the United States, we will always be for AMERICA FIRST!

We can’t rest on our laurels. We can’t stop just because we won an
election - IN A LANDSLIDE BY THE WAY!

That is why today I am announcing that I want to set a TRUMP
FUNDRAISING RECORD.

HERE ARE 4 REASONS TO GIVE $5
[https://secure.winred.com/trump-national-committee-jfc/lp-prsp-email-4-reasons-5-v2-gold-golf-mawco?utm_term=lrm-active]to
help me crush THE TRUMP GOAL:

$5 FOR MAGA
[https://secure.winred.com/trump-national-committee-jfc/lp-prsp-email-4-reasons-5-v2-gold-golf-mawco?utm_term=lrm-active]

#1 “TRUMP LOSING SUPPORT FROM THE MAGA BASE.” I know that’s not
true because you have never left my side, and I love you for that.
GIVE $5 to show the Radical Left you still STAND WITH TRUMP!

#2 I’M BEING SUED for saving Gavin Newscum and Californians by
SENDING IN THE TROOPS.

Peter,
I want you to stop and think about this: Last night, Donald Trump launched illegal airstrikes on Iranian nuclear sites without a vote, without a debate, and without even bothering to brief Democrats on the House and Senate Intel committees. It was an unconstitutional act of war and a deliberate assault on the rule of law. **And in response to one of the most dangerous abuses of executive power in modern history, what have we heard from Marie Gluesenkamp Perez?** **Absolutely nothing.** No public comment. No demand for oversight. No statement defending the Constitution. What kind of political calculation tells you to stay quiet while the sitting president unilaterally bombs a sovereign country? What internal poll or consultant memo tells you to ignore a blatant violation of congressional authority - a.k.a. your job? **What possible reason could there be to go silent in the face of war?** Marie has become so obsessed with threading the political messaging needle in a purple district that she stands for absolutely nothing. Not even in a moment of national crisis. Not even when war is on the table. Not even when the President of the United States is unilaterally dragging us into another forever war. **This is the most basic thing we ask of our elected officials: to speak up when our rights, our laws, and our people are under threat.** **But silence is not caution. It is complicity.** Marie and her family will never be the ones sent to die in another Middle East conflict. But the working-class kids from our district will. The ones who serve while politicians like Marie play strategy games with their futures. I'm Brent Hennrich. And I am running because I refuse to let another generation pay for political cowardice. [**If you believe working class families should not pay the price for Marie 's political cowardice and Trump's illegal wars, chip in now. This campaign is about drawing the line because silence is not neutral. It is surrender.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUCgdBPMVmMhI8oQExI4nWOeebwZFSPnSKYkYwvRaA1r0Pmv9pFpwlRjD_rB_a2RM3tqO9RgnkTDZa7pJaIuILLkqDcX0ivcVXWeicnBXq54E0si_7RgekhyJLPpIvM_S6CLK3tBi_73v76VCeo5uPX7dQNYXrE-7RsyFJLs8G2gvzESRo90SWkpSH5UM3TB6fhki_PooXgVSofEbrYVDbwMHaPkleBU0ho-7GQDYzp2OIAClwBw3Rw9FFwBMfiPVztix5qBhK69cwzyaNd66_7UXTQC-gmfnEWXF6fFje6dClT-LAFYmu6IeQ23UevXTg4/4hk/zXCR5dozSiuDaab9215dag/h1/h001.r66skSufrW_PusWJC2eI2-IntQ0NM0fmSwzh3VDpstQ) Let's Heal Washington!

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: No more wars!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Trump's attacks on Iran are unconstitutional. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWSwumKtOMlnnxsWQirTw31p9w8pYtr5hbwo3ehCvBAGQe7UtFjAT-zTcZ18bDrfojEV6gYLPg6NVqNjZHCJD1mOH3Nqj-EC4GGqq4VnT9se8/4hk/Lzpm2m3NTy2EfKd7fqhx5A/h0/h001.z1FB74PyN6Lc0wL7Q3V_EGIU7AzJgjWC_xKaD40-pHk)
---
Friend, Last night, Donald Trump illegally bombed Iranian nuclear facilities without the consent of Congress―a blatant violation of the U.S. Constitution. **Americans do not want another forever war―spending our tax dollars on more death while families here at home struggle to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.** **Trump is misleading the American people and the world about weapons of mass destruction while supporting war criminal Netanyahu’s unprovoked attacks.** Both Trump and Netanyahu are attempting to distract from their unpopular agendas, including slaughtering Palestinians in Gaza and taking healthcare away from tens of millions of people here at home to pay for more tax breaks for billionaires. **To stop another forever war in the Middle East, I have signed onto a bipartisan War Powers Resolution, H.Con.Res.38―introduced by Reps. Ro Khanna (D-CA) and Thomas Massie (R-KY).** A similar bipartisan resolution has been introduced in the Senate. Because both are privileged resolutions, members can force a vote 15 days after introduction, which means the Senate could vote this week and the House the following week. As of last year, more than 50 members of Congress―including members from both sides of the aisle―own stock in military contractors. To fight back against this onslaught of attacks and win decisively is going to require an extraordinary effort.
#

_An update from Georgia:_
Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign is shaping up to be one of the most competitive and most expensive U.S. Senate races in history.
Already, right-wing super PACs have spent millions of dollars running attack ads designed to gin up anger and distort his record.
Before this race is over, it is very likely that Jon Ossoff will get slammed by _hundreds of millions of dollars_ in spending by the GOP and MAGA-aligned Super PACs.
**To fight back against this onslaught of attacks and win decisively is going to require an extraordinary effort.**
Peter, our path to victory in Georgia is to take what we did in 2020 and 2021 — building a massive grassroots movement that mobilized and organized every corner of the state — and go EVEN BIGGER.
That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach, and _earlier_ outreach too, to more people than ever before, all across Georgia. We’ve got to keep building bigger and faster every day.
All of that takes resources. So we have to ask:
**[Can you please give $3 or any amount to Jon’s re-election campaign today? We’re counting on your support — especially right now — to make sure we’re running the strongest possible campaign from now through Election Day.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250622-1-subs&t=1&akid=492%2E5691347%2El7pDUd)

name: Al Franken
subject: The “Powwow” Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman’.

|
---
Dear friend, I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great. Someone who understands what’s at stake in this moment, who listens, who leads, and who embodies the values that make Minnesota, well, _Minnesotan_. That person is Peggy Flanagan. And she’s running to represent our great state in the U.S. Senate. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110057628/553126416/-280578502?refcode=250622_Flanagan_Powwow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjgxMDNjZS1hNzRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQ_IQ4-1PB92Sk2nfkPa5Jcg4EBXgk5qF2dtnHp_ttI=)** I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom, Peggy knows the impact of federal programs that help working families. They had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher. Other public programs helped her mom afford health insurance and child care. **She gets it because she’s lived it.** And that’s exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington. (And frankly, what we have way too little of.) | **[HELP ELECT PEGGY TO THE SENATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110057629/553126417/-396354099?refcode=250622_Flanagan_Powwow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjgxMDNjZS1hNzRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQ_IQ4-1PB92Sk2nfkPa5Jcg4EBXgk5qF2dtnHp_ttI= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**
---
Peggy’s got the experience, too. She’s currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor — the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in the U.S. Before that, she was a state legislator, a school board member, an executive director for the Children’s Defense Fund–Minnesota, she even worked for ME!
But most importantly - she worked for my friend and hero, the late Senator Paul Wellstone. She and I both believe in his guiding principle: _We all do better when we all do better._ (Yes, it’s that simple. No, Republicans still don’t get it.)
While Republicans are hiding from their constituents, Peggy is doing the opposite. She’s traveling the state hosting ‘Kitchen Table Conversations’ — actually listening to _real_ Minnesotans, having real conversations, and working to bring people together. She doesn't just want to fight against bad stuff. She wants to build something, too.
Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. It’s about time. She is Ojibwe and a member of White Earth, and her Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’ If there’s one thing I know about Peggy, it’s that she’ll use that voice to fight for all Minnesotans - whether they agree with her or not.
[**So let’s make it happen. Split a donation with Ohio House Dems today, and help send Peggy Flanagan to the Senate, where she’ll keep speaking up, fighting hard, and making sure we all have a good hotdish recipe.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110057630/553126418/-280578502?refcode=250622_Flanagan_Powwow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjgxMDNjZS1hNzRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQ_IQ4-1PB92Sk2nfkPa5Jcg4EBXgk5qF2dtnHp_ttI=)
\- Al
P.S. I could go on and on about how great Peggy is. But instead, let me share a quick story from my first Senate campaign in 2008. Peggy was an organizer working with Native American communities and my advisor on Indian Affairs, and she told me if I went to the powwow at Red Lake, I should NOT dance. Good advice. But then a young man invited me to join in. So, I addressed the crowd and said, “Only if you don’t make fun of me after I leave.” They laughed and agreed, I danced, and a woman danced up to me and said, “You dance like a white guy.” I reminded her of the conditions of my dancing — to which she replied, “You said _after_ you leave.” That was my first lesson in Ojibwe humor.

clean_body: Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman’. | Dear friend, I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great. Someone who understands what’s at stake in this moment, who listens, who leads, and who embodies the values that make Minnesota, well, Minnesotan. That person is Peggy Flanagan. And she’s running to represent our great state in the U.S. Senate. = I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom, Peggy knows the impact of federal programs that help working families. They had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher. Other public programs helped her mom afford health insurance and child care. She gets it because she’s lived it. And that’s exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington. (And frankly, what we have way too little of.) | = "" Peggy’s got the experience, too. She’s currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor — the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in the U.S. Before that, she was a state legislator, a school board member, an executive director for the Children’s Defense Fund–Minnesota, she even worked for ME! But most importantly - she worked for my friend and hero, the late Senator Paul Wellstone. She and I both believe in his guiding principle: We all do better when we all do better. (Yes, it’s that simple. No, Republicans still don’t get it.) While Republicans are hiding from their constituents, Peggy is doing the opposite. She’s traveling the state hosting ‘Kitchen Table Conversations’ — actually listening to real Minnesotans, having real conversations, and working to bring people together. She doesn't just want to fight against bad stuff. She wants to build something, too. Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. It’s about time. She is Ojibwe and a member of White Earth, and her Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’ If there’s one thing I know about Peggy, it’s that she’ll use that voice to fight for all Minnesotans - whether they agree with her or not. = \- Al P.S. I could go on and on about how great Peggy is. But instead, let me share a quick story from my first Senate campaign in 2008. Peggy was an organizer working with Native American communities and my advisor on Indian Affairs, and she told me if I went to the powwow at Red Lake, I should NOT dance. Good advice. But then a young man invited me to join in. So, I addressed the crowd and said, “Only if you don’t make fun of me after I leave.” They laughed and agreed, I danced, and a woman danced up to me and said, “You dance like a white guy.” I reminded her of the conditions of my dancing — to which she replied, “You said after you leave.” That was my first lesson in Ojibwe humor. = = OHDC 545 E. Peter,

This is the closest we’ve ever been to flipping the House. Here's what we’ve known all along: The path to a Democratic majority runs through competitive districts like WA-08.

We have the momentum, but this is what you need to know:
* **We must protect every single frontline seat—including Kim's.** Kim was the first Democrat to ever flip this seat, and all signs point to another tough battle ahead to keep it blue.

* **We need to build a strong campaign now.** Republicans are already raising millions, and extremist outside groups will flood the airwaves with misinformation and fear tactics.

* **The fight for democracy isn’t over.** From January 6 deniers to ongoing voter suppression efforts, the threats to our institutions are real— _and we must stay vigilant and organized year-round._

The road to a Democratic House runs through grassroots supporters like you, and districts like WA-08.

Kim was the first Democrat to ever flip this seat, and all signs point to another tough battle ahead to keep it blue. We need to build a strong campaign now. Republicans are already raising millions, and extremist outside groups will flood the airwaves with misinformation and fear tactics. The fight for democracy isn’t over. Peter, let's not pretend this is politics as usual.
Donald Trump deployed U.S. troops into California to suppress peaceful protest — to use the military against American citizens .
Then, without seeking Congressional approval — and in direct violation of U.S. and international law — he launched a missile strike on Iran.
Two authoritarian moves. No oversight. No apology. No accountability.
And now, he's watching us to see how we'll respond.
We're facing our first end of quarter fundraising deadline since Trump's authoritarianism escalated - and our numbers will go PUBLIC. Friend, Last night, President Trump bombed Iran, roping America into another foreign war without authorization from Congress.

**This action is blatantly unconstitutional.** Our founding fathers gave the power to declare war to Congress to avoid the scenario we find ourselves in now - a single mad man unilaterally starting an unjust and unpopular war. Last week, Reps. Thomas Massie and Ro Khana introduced a War Powers Resolution, a federal law that prohibits the president from committing the United States to armed conflict without congressional approval. Congress must immediately pass the War Powers Resolution to reign in Trump's power and prevent the situation from escalating further and dragging our country into yet another bloody and expensive war in the Middle East. [Add your name: Reject Trump's Iran War](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_tIK4eR3O5WT5nawYnCA_slpXMLHhucYUu-b2FSdZHcM0FJj6Vm1tvpr51j5txH-bDp1HOIxPzXOZqzTtUy6dvRljqIqbqXmbSJO6MwEBPQOYbKQhEHHMTv7kE8gerUVGF2qdgxmxh7qYfOkFH4Rb4CRG3WHKuS75v4fWSVcDxJLdFDWsDWZlzXhtKo2bP031-ZP0zU0nm1IEEeG17Hvox0OwFWvUQDkzZvTrrnihqyQfULF-eQk5vNUhoXWq2zXe2lJid7wJIBwabYdLVIlzm7kbMiABDmhJS61FO6SdCbaVSj75Af-S-3g-TsbF-UCiLdvj6EDNcb1TaG5YIcJdO70-2qgooTcyWi9Btal_KEQ/4hk/_bCzeEQPR7aj1S66qXsumA/h2/h001.mnX8iGOru_NRQUKNp130rSfwskd187TqiAVoC5J_DmI)

clean_body: Our founding fathers gave the power to declare war to Congress to avoid the scenario we find ourselves in now - a single mad man unilaterally starting an unjust and unpopular war. | | Friend, Last night, President Trump bombed Iran, roping America into another foreign war without authorization from Congress. | This action is blatantly unconstitutional. Our founding fathers gave the power to declare war to Congress to avoid the scenario we find ourselves in now - a single mad man unilaterally starting an unjust and unpopular war. Last week, Reps. Thomas Massie and Ro Khana introduced a War Powers Resolution, a federal law that prohibits the president from committing the United States to armed conflict without congressional approval. Congress must immediately pass the War Powers Resolution to reign in Trump's power and prevent the situation from escalating further and dragging our country into yet another bloody and expensive war in the Middle East. In solidarity, Team No Dem Left Behind | | i️Before you go Trump's unconstitutional act of war against Iran is clear grounds for impeachment and removal from office, but to do so we need Dems to win back the House with a large enough majority to successfully impeach Trump. The majority of the American people are against another war in the Middle East and Trump's bombing of Iran will spark massive backlash against Donald Trump and Republicans. No Dem Left behind is a grassroots organization that supports Democrats running in unglamorous red and rural districts by giving them resources they need to win. If you want to support our work in helping build a historic blue wave in the 2026 midterms, please consider making a donation today. Thank you! | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . # The #1 AI Energy Stock
Dear Reader,

Nearly $600 billion is projected to be spent on AI data centers this year.

That's because the ones being built now will [**dwarf everything that came before them.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/OKKU95_G7Fj7CzCNoCFa9y427SmelnjIDi28IFHTmEmtC0WFT2BHSfLjnKC2QuqeoeyAPE3PKfwT_22Iv3fS8SYMt_ylNqxSpBtsUNUtvmQArWCcpndewnpZHeZMecXxvguUGlcHG0l-plCi4nigKbRReJLUf2tK5knZDvwMaG4Sq62CiqBSvtzHlhvqfOYGMRZ80RiW3HD25ZSeRomMuX48kUhuDK15rufdcbMMngMkqjE7Y5iHjy6ExwG1ZzUojrC-vGz5ky8AGXcCOe1lUs2SsXT_NoNIawP1C1iLjcQsqA6zg_jBxBnSWRe2I3yw0Il5FGuk_1c3EaxorAIAqlvUjUWQBqi-JWqcYSrY1cxORVWya5WR-MlTiGxIscleokvDlstdjtYbDiiC182aUakQjaTARzkzqqk6GG7NmGdNil1lWg7_oU8VzPSL-r31zEQ9fey1k6UBhNVBUN_Urm60gR5ngFu4PLlA_nkLSYNNPM13wgY_hN5EYR44KtxDTRCn6RgkI7j63fhIzqkt97uj7CrRi6tPC1yofYX6_6SBnwqrDhTcJGqzZcWRVeu3T9j1zpv6KBcbhjKUBKJQ2tUkc_ulNYkrBowYtTaoH6lEs-8RQXUT4s08job4wBa-fFY/gvJJ2biGE2Kflg0Mct3JsKH9-wDIUcfF/10)

Thanks to AI's ravenous hunger for power ...

They are beginning to morph into sprawling behemoths.

Meta has committed $10 billion to a data center in Louisiana set to occupy more than 4 million square feet.

That's Meta's largest data center ever.

Elon Musk recently announced an $80 million expansion to Colossus ...

That's his supercomputer in Memphis, the largest of its kind in the world.

And then there's Stargate ...

A $500 billion endeavor involving Microsoft, Nvidia, OpenAI, Oracle and SoftBank, among others.

It was recently announced at the White House in a press conference with President Trump.

Stargate's plans include 20 data centers occupying 10 million square feet.

The first site under construction, about 200 miles outside Dallas, will be the same size as Central Park.

Big Tech has gone all in ...

These monstrous AI data centers are rising at a breakneck pace nationwide.

And they all need one thing ...

More power.

A limited number of companies are capable of providing these data centers with the energy they need for this new AI boom.

One in particular appears to be perfectly positioned to capitalize on this generational opportunity.

[**Click here to learn more about the #1 AI Energy Stock of 2025**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/SPLK9tWyRyqJOLdzqgXR8XfAmNdgVHs9G10XHXbEo6i2oNfCyb6h05C5LfvQMU_zs2XNGaH7TbpmnmJIyzS5TNpLhN0jQJ-mM38PvdvOg6XhnSh0SyFsL0C7aLDbuuCvdREPiI9wgMWYYRumMylUf4ERVnOzHIKufRO4qbqoaoGhA_4tmkcBtxOqXg1Oz-WW0R4B-p-ApoY2WPNYS0UkQh_4VSgXljLyPHyhgk9OHZK1sGTS4pFN5kobM819Ea958L8i2ozdVuKpAOiiZfb5pFAh4BxSDANHyATaLBXPNVcO0ctUnrN-AXORhPzhwDMe491-p9bGzPihS9bc5OlAJMpEfk34soGmhqnFWH9H4ZasyYkslLgBx48S5ZSFfSwrGEFg3kZYns4-RZaBlpd_t8u9BTzUnRWWuUzOuKnSCDBwqgcALomnsagA8NjiePctXYj0qqSO5AHtxbUuyXX4aYyaddgTnGspaScE2L1jIXf3fgHF5YEH-PckcKd67yN_nId_ohqaeP_TmVupr6-dJ-z3VSWdUL8Elgj2_-vRTH3YKlwDj3ejRqREERsR2D8QGcxFvJWmxUFj6KXOhZ0wShPfFe20ju6LjG2bjkEKS-usuqsw7dghISN-5khJ9rsM1UA/itHh1fbt7rqc3N3EctSu-eS72WwfatxG/10)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110057866/553127426/114605485?refcode=em-6.22.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTc5MmNlMC1hYjRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmUI30p6fMre0imB3fe4Djw8Xy6J7zLTCEF1VGfqs18=) Hi there, I’m Democrat Shenna Bellows. As Maine’s Secretary of State, I issued a decision that declared Donald Trump ineligible to be on the ballot because of his incitement of the January 6 insurrection. I know many on the right are now trying to rewrite history, claiming that day was “a day of love,” as the president put it. But the truth is, it was a violent insurrection that resulted in the deaths and injuries of police officers, threatened our elected representatives, and betrayed the values this country stands for. Immediately after my decision to hold Trump accountable, my family and I were targeted, threatened, and even harassed. But I stayed in the office and did my job. Because Mainers elected me to do right by them, and by the law of the land. **And as governor, I'll bring that same commitment to work with me _every single day_.** I won't back down from making difficult decisions. I won’t bow down to Donald Trump and his extreme allies. And I won't sell out middle class families while billionaires get richer. I'll fight for affordable healthcare, quality education, and good-paying jobs right here in Maine. But I can’t do this without you and your support, friend. That’s why I’m reaching out and humbly asking: [**Will you chip in $3 between me and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State today? clean_body: | = Hi there, I’m Democrat Shenna Bellows. As Maine’s Secretary of State, I issued a decision that declared Donald Trump ineligible to be on the ballot because of his incitement of the January 6 insurrection. I know many on the right are now trying to rewrite history, claiming that day was “a day of love,” as the president put it. But the truth is, it was a violent insurrection that resulted in the deaths and injuries of police officers, threatened our elected representatives, and betrayed the values this country stands for. Immediately after my decision to hold Trump accountable, my family and I were targeted, threatened, and even harassed. But I stayed in the office and did my job. Because Mainers elected me to do right by them, and by the law of the land. And as governor, I'll bring that same commitment to work with me every single day. I won't back down from making difficult decisions. I won’t bow down to Donald Trump and his extreme allies. And I won't sell out middle class families while billionaires get richer. I'll fight for affordable healthcare, quality education, and good-paying jobs right here in Maine. But I can’t do this without you and your support, friend. That’s why I’m reaching out and humbly asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Take care, Shenna | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Hands Off Food Assistance
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170202.172776.465&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14677)
#
# **Hands Off Food Assistance**
**** [Senator Hughes recently held a telephone town hall](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14678) with experts from across Pennsylvania to discuss how federal cuts to food assistance would hurt Pennsylvanians and our economy. He was joined by:
* [Pennsylvania Secretary of Agriculture](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14679), Russell Redding
* CEO of [Feeding Pennsylvania,](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14680) Julie Bancroft
* Vice President of the [Pennsylvania Food Merchants Association](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14681), Michael Howells
* Executive Director of [Share Food Program](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14682), George Matysik

The group discussed the many ways proposed federal cuts to food assistance and SNAP would hurt the health of Pennsylvanians, Pennsylvania's farming industry, and our overall economy and access to jobs. [**Listen to the full conversation on our website.**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14678)
* * *
**Here 's What to Know About Cuts Proposed by Republicans** Cuts proposed in the Republican Big Ugly Bill would **strip $18B in SNAP benefits from households with children**. It would be the biggest cut to food assistance in American history. In Pennsylvania, **over 400,000** residents would be at risk of losing some of their food assistance, including many children. On a broader scale, the bill would **raise the cost of groceries for up to 2 million Pennsylvanians**. And the cuts could force between**$212 million and $1.06 billion in new costs** onto Pennsylvania. **No state has the capacity to cover the devastation of these cuts. ****[Visit our website to learn more about what 's included in the big, ugly bill.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14683)**
* * *
**Stay Informed** Senator Hughes is committed to keeping constituents informed. [**Visit our website**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14683) **for the latest information about what 's going on in Washington DC and why it matters to Pennsylvania. **
* * *
**Stay Engaged, 5 Steps to Take Action** The bill is now being negotiated and debated in the US Senate. Republican Senators have said [they're aiming to have the bill fully passed and sent to President Trump's desk by July 4th.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14666) **Take Action:**
1. Call US Senators Fetterman and McCormick and let them know you do not support the big, ugly bill
* Senator Fetterman: 215-241-1090
* Senator McCormick: 215-405-9660
2. Share information about this bill and how harmful it will be with five of your friends, family, or neighbors. It's important for the entire community to be educated about the decisions lawmakers are making in Washington.
3. Share your personal story. Make a video, write an essay, or connect with local advocacy groups to see if your story can help in the fight to stop this bill. When Republicans tried to overturn the Affordable Care Act, the overwhelming voice of the people and our personal stories are what made the difference.
4. Stay informed by following our channels on [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14668), [Instagram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14669), [Tiktok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14670), [Bluesky](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14672), and [Twitter](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170202.172776.465&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14673).
5. Keep fighting, don't lose hope, and stay informed! We can win on this issue, if we keep going and stay engaged.

* * *

#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110058204/553128534/701031030?refcode=em-6.22.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNkY2UzNDItYWQ0Zi1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XBrkEYVagVn-13pushx5vs8yu857WZ6AZIRS7k8FzAI=) Hi there, it's Randy. Most don’t know this, but while I’m running for Congress, I’m also teaching students at my local community college. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. **That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on.** He’s voting for the interests of billionaires and the far-right -- not the working people I see every day. Our communities deserve a voice that understands their struggle, and won’t sell them out. That’s why I’m running. clean_body: | = Hi there, it's Randy. Most don’t know this, but while I’m running for Congress, I’m also teaching students at my local community college. These aren’t your typical four-year college students. They’re moms. They’re immigrants. They’re folks holding down night shifts, raising families, but still showing up because they believe in building something better. That’s the story of the Central Valley. It was my family’s story -- and it’s the story my opponent David Valadao has turned his back on. He’s voting for the interests of billionaires and the far-right -- not the working people I see every day. Our communities deserve a voice that understands their struggle, and won’t sell them out. NPR: Judge rules suit challenging DOGE and Elon Musk's power over government can continue [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_MuskDOGELawsuits.png]
Folks -- Elon Musk may have left government "service", but it appears he cannot hide from lawsuits over misused authority.
A U.S. District Court judge recently ruled that a lawsuit alleging Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) are illegally wielding power over federal government operations can move forward. The ruling highlights often-conflicting descriptions of the power that Musk and the DOGE entity have been given to implement Trump's agenda, and how efforts to downplay that power in court have been undermined by public statements and actions.
We want to know how you feel about these lawsuits. Will you take our one-click survey today?
Are you in favor of stopping DOGE from wreaking further havoc on our federal government?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=VT58jsGJwROFBMgRdn2kcmb4SIO/yRTm+8A2r+uteTCpG8hWtpRuOVwl8RMm4UhkdeZFpVRCbjoPmBN6qOjAtuP6Qdvp6IpBaFUVWMHTpNE=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=VT58jsGJwROFBMgRdn2kcmb4SIO/yRTm+8A2r+uteTCpG8hWtpRuOVwl8RMm4UhkdeZFpVRCbjoPmBN6qOjAtuP6Qdvp6IpBaFUVWMHTpNE=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: President Barack Obama
subject: This movement needs you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We have a chance to make a real impact.
|
---

Peter,
The progress we’ve made to build a more inclusive democracy is a testament to generations of heroes.
That includes ordinary Americans like my late friend John Lewis, who marched in Selma, endured billy clubs and tear gas, and put his body on the line for the right to vote. Without courageous champions like him, Congress would not have passed the Voting Rights Act 60 years ago this August.
But despite the profound sacrifices of people like John, some politicians today are still trying to roll back our hard-won progress on equal rights and equal representation.
They’re working to take power away from their fellow citizens — even when it means violating the promises of the Voting Rights Act. They’re drawing district lines that deny communities of color the opportunity to elect the candidates of their choice. They’re making it harder to vote in ways that disproportionately hurt seniors and anyone who works hard to make ends meet.
And they think they’ve got a better chance of clinging to power if they get to choose their voters instead of the other way around.
**That’s why groups like the National Redistricting Action Fund are fighting for a truly representative democracy. They are**** _the_****strategic force against racial and partisan gerrymandering, with a systematic 10 Year Plan to have the fairest maps possible in 2032. They work to protect the right to vote so our leaders can’t escape accountability.**
[**And they are counting on you, Peter, to power this work. I’m counting on you, too. Will you join me in supporting the National Redistricting Action Fund today, and help build an America that is stronger because it better lives up to our more fundamental values?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110058314/553128905/-776240876?refcode=don_aotl_Tier1NonOpenrs_email_ObamaJune_email_20250622-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaJune-ObamaNOR_var1&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250622-AOTL-Tier1-ObamaJune-ObamaNOR_var1&utm_campaign=ObamaJune&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4MjQ3YmY4LWFkNGYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dVRICtQboF5FD0PbjeaJu6GfB2Nmg8mNPP_Iv-V_H-0=)

With support from people like you, the fair maps movement is standing up for the promise of democracy.
In court, the National Redistricting Action Fund’s affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, has successfully fought to uphold the Voting Rights Act and won new district maps with new opportunities for equal representation. Like in Alabama, which elected two Black members of Congress for the first time in history in 2024 after voters fought for and won a new map that reflected their voices.
And the National Redistricting Action Fund’s work — including organizing citizens to advocate against gerrymandered maps and holding map manipulators accountable — has resulted in what _The New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”
But too many Americans still live under manipulated maps that deny them a real voice in their state legislatures or in Congress. And we face ongoing threats to basic fairness in our elections.
This spring, House conservatives launched one of the most striking attacks on voting rights in decades. The SAVE Act would make it harder to vote by forcing people to show a costly and burdensome amount of proof of their citizenship in person before gaining access to the ballot box.
The new requirements could disenfranchise millions of Americans who can’t afford a passport, can’t take time off work to visit an elections office, or don’t have a birth certificate that matches their married name.
Think about that. How can any elected official rationalize making it harder for people to vote? How can they penalize people because they don’t have money? That’s contrary to who we are. That’s not what we believe. That’s not why people like John Lewis marched in Selma.
**In the United States of America, we should have no patience and no tolerance for gerrymandered maps or vote-suppressing laws that aim at silencing our fellow citizens. **
[**I’m asking you to fight back with a grassroots investment in the National Redistricting Action Fund as we keep working to end gerrymandering and stop legislation that tries to silence people’s voices. Together, we can strengthen our democracy. clean_body: We have a chance to make a real impact. | Peter, The progress we’ve made to build a more inclusive democracy is a testament to generations of heroes. That includes ordinary Americans like my late friend John Lewis, who marched in Selma, endured billy clubs and tear gas, and put his body on the line for the right to vote. Without courageous champions like him, Congress would not have passed the Voting Rights Act 60 years ago this August. But despite the profound sacrifices of people like John, some politicians today are still trying to roll back our hard-won progress on equal rights and equal representation. They’re working to take power away from their fellow citizens — even when it means violating the promises of the Voting Rights Act. They’re drawing district lines that deny communities of color the opportunity to elect the candidates of their choice. They’re making it harder to vote in ways that disproportionately hurt seniors and anyone who works hard to make ends meet. And they think they’ve got a better chance of clinging to power if they get to choose their voters instead of the other way around. That’s why groups like the National Redistricting Action Fund are fighting for a truly representative democracy. They are thestrategic force against racial and partisan gerrymandering, with a systematic 10 Year Plan to have the fairest maps possible in 2032. They work to protect the right to vote so our leaders can’t escape accountability. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = With support from people like you, the fair maps movement is standing up for the promise of democracy. In court, the National Redistricting Action Fund’s affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, has successfully fought to uphold the Voting Rights Act and won new district maps with new opportunities for equal representation. Like in Alabama, which elected two Black members of Congress for the first time in history in 2024 after voters fought for and won a new map that reflected their voices. And the National Redistricting Action Fund’s work — including organizing citizens to advocate against gerrymandered maps and holding map manipulators accountable — has resulted in what The New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” But too many Americans still live under manipulated maps that deny them a real voice in their state legislatures or in Congress. And we face ongoing threats to basic fairness in our elections. This spring, House conservatives launched one of the most striking attacks on voting rights in decades. The SAVE Act would make it harder to vote by forcing people to show a costly and burdensome amount of proof of their citizenship in person before gaining access to the ballot box. The new requirements could disenfranchise millions of Americans who can’t afford a passport, can’t take time off work to visit an elections office, or don’t have a birth certificate that matches their married name. Think about that. How can any elected official rationalize making it harder for people to vote? How can they penalize people because they don’t have money? That’s contrary to who we are. That’s not what we believe. That’s not why people like John Lewis marched in Selma. In the United States of America, we should have no patience and no tolerance for gerrymandered maps or vote-suppressing laws that aim at silencing our fellow citizens. = Thank you, President Barack Obama = Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from NRAF by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. **By Wendy Kinney**
Nigel Farage is doing what the elites swore he never could: winning. Again.
After years of censorship, mockery, and exile, the man who led Britain out of the European Union is back--this time with a mandate not just to exit, but to rebuild.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..x0x6_ZEU51STOdF4h4OqNI_J5GGypsGTr3JSrDJeHV0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166549539)
The people of England are fed up. Fed up with globalist puppets who have handed their country over to Brussels, open borders, and radical ideologies. Fed up with the rise in violent crime, the erasure of British culture, the silencing of truth, and the complete collapse of public trust in government.
And in Nigel Farage, they've found the only man willing to say what everyone knows to be true.
Farage's Reform UK party has just surged ahead in national polling--leapfrogging Labour and leaving the Conservative Party in the dust. If an election were held today, Reform UK would take Downing Street. That's not a protest vote. That's a revolution.
A recent Ipsos poll put Reform at 34%, vaulting past Labour and leaving the Tories at a historic low of 15%--an electoral earthquake.
**A Reckoning Decades in the Making**
The ruling class dismissed Brexit as a one-off tantrum. They were wrong. It was a warning. Now, the people are returning with a verdict--and they're delivering it through Reform UK. This isn't about one issue or one moment. It's about reclaiming a nation that was stolen by politicians who stopped listening.
Mass immigration has transformed Britain, and not for the better. Farage is the only national leader calling it what it is: a crisis. Entire towns have been reshaped. Violent crime has soared. Grooming gangs were ignored for decades because authorities were too afraid to be called racist. And those who dared speak out? Silenced.
Britain's compassion has been weaponized against it. And Farage, once ridiculed for warning where this would lead, has been proven right--again.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below):**
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's Push For America First](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against.
**[Read The Great American Reset now.](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Yours Truly,
**SEAN HANNITY**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ Click To Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/d9791ea5-304b-4d4d-8f00-03e91b80aaf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
**Populist? Yes. Patriotic? Absolutely.**
While legacy politicians wring their hands and repeat the same failed scripts, Farage speaks with clarity and conviction. He talks about real things--about energy independence, industrial revival, and putting British workers first.
He doesn't pander to elites in London or Brussels. He listens to the working-class, the forgotten, and the furious.
That's why Farage has now won over Labour's former base. Once-loyal working-class towns in the North and Midlands are now Reform strongholds. Why? Because Reform UK is promising to do what neither Labour nor the Tories will: put Britain first.
Reform now dominates in regions once considered Labour heartlands--especially in the Midlands and North--where the working class has turned their backs on the establishment.
And he means it. He's called for reindustrialization. He's talking about reopening coal mines, nationalizing steel, and ending dependency on unreliable foreign energy. In other words, he's speaking the language of national survival.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..x0x6_ZEU51STOdF4h4OqNI_J5GGypsGTr3JSrDJeHV0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166549539)
**No More Woke**
Farage's rise isn't just political. It's cultural.
Britain is sick of being lectured by smug bureaucrats and rainbow-flagged ministries. The country doesn't want government pronoun guides, taxpayer-funded drag shows, or DEI officers scolding them into submission.
They want safety. Stability. A nation they can recognize.
Woke politics has failed--and not softly. It has failed catastrophically. It has created chaos in classrooms, destroyed trust in institutions, and encouraged a culture of censorship, cowardice, and collapse.
Farage isn't afraid to say it. He's not afraid to challenge the orthodoxy. That's why they fear him. He's proposed deporting all illegal immigrants, scrapping net-zero targets, and investigating taxpayer waste--bold policies the political class refuses to even discuss.
**The Global Trend**
What we're witnessing in Britain is part of a broader global realignment.
Elites keep trying to suppress populism--whether in the U.S., France, Canada, or the Netherlands--but they can't kill the hunger for truth and sovereignty.
People want their countries back. Farage is Britain's answer. And he's proving once again that one man with guts and a microphone can reshape a nation.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..x0x6_ZEU51STOdF4h4OqNI_J5GGypsGTr3JSrDJeHV0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=166549539)
**A Warning to the Establishment**
The political class should take this moment very seriously. Because Farage hasn't just returned--he's igniting something bigger than himself. And the people of England? They're no longer whispering. They're roaring.
They're done being told to sit down and shut up. They're done being called racist, xenophobic, transphobic, or "far-right" for simply wanting order, culture, and freedom. They're done with being governed by those who don't believe in their country.
They're rising. And Farage is leading.
**The Moment**
Nigel Farage represents what every free nation needs right now: courage, clarity, and a total rejection of the failed globalist experiment. England isn't collapsing. It's waking up.
And as Reform UK rises, the rest of the world should take note. The British lion is roaring again--and this time, they aren't stopping halfway.

**About the Author:**
Wendy Kinney is a Christian, legal strategist, attorney, and entrepreneur committed to free speech, financial freedom, and the Constitution. As Founder & CEO of Revere Payments, she protects businesses from financial censorship, ensuring American enterprises remain free.
She speaks truth to power with conviction, standing firm in faith, justice, and the unwavering belief that freedom must always be defended. Her work is rooted in light, guided by principle, and fearless in the fight for truth.
