Nigel Farage represents what every free nation needs right now: courage, clarity, and a total rejection of the failed globalist experiment.England isn't collapsing. It's waking up... | | | Jun 22 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- By Wendy Kinney Nigel Farage is doing what the elites swore he never could: winning. Again. After years of censorship, mockery, and exile, the man who led Britain out of the European Union is back--this time with a mandate not just to exit, but to rebuild. The people of England are fed up. Fed up with globalist puppets who have handed their country over to Brussels, open borders, and radical ideologies. Fed up with the rise in violent crime, the erasure of British culture, the silencing of truth, and the complete collapse of public trust in government. And in Nigel Farage, they've found the only man willing to say what everyone knows to be true. Farage's Reform UK party has just surged ahead in national polling--leapfrogging Labour and leaving the Conservative Party in the dust. If an election were held today, Reform UK would take Downing Street. That's not a protest vote. That's a revolution. A recent Ipsos poll put Reform at 34%, vaulting past Labour and leaving the Tories at a historic low of 15%--an electoral earthquake. A Reckoning Decades in the Making The ruling class dismissed Brexit as a one-off tantrum. They were wrong. It was a warning. Now, the people are returning with a verdict--and they're delivering it through Reform UK. This isn't about one issue or one moment. It's about reclaiming a nation that was stolen by politicians who stopped listening. Mass immigration has transformed Britain, and not for the better. Farage is the only national leader calling it what it is: a crisis. Entire towns have been reshaped. Violent crime has soared. Grooming gangs were ignored for decades because authorities were too afraid to be called racist. And those who dared speak out? Silenced. Britain's compassion has been weaponized against it. And Farage, once ridiculed for warning where this would lead, has been proven right--again. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below): | | ---|---|--- What we are seeing right now is truly historic. President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan. But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him... "There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future." If you want to learn more about , go ahead read this that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against. Yours Truly, SEAN HANNITY | | ---|---|--- (Continued) Populist? Yes. Patriotic? Absolutely. While legacy politicians wring their hands and repeat the same failed scripts, Farage speaks with clarity and conviction. He talks about real things--about energy independence, industrial revival, and putting British workers first. He doesn't pander to elites in London or Brussels. He listens to the working-class, the forgotten, and the furious. That's why Farage has now won over Labour's former base. Once-loyal working-class towns in the North and Midlands are now Reform strongholds. Why? Because Reform UK is promising to do what neither Labour nor the Tories will: put Britain first. Reform now dominates in regions once considered Labour heartlands--especially in the Midlands and North--where the working class has turned their backs on the establishment. And he means it. He's called for reindustrialization. He's talking about reopening coal mines, nationalizing steel, and ending dependency on unreliable foreign energy. In other words, he's speaking the language of national survival. No More Woke Farage's rise isn't just political. It's cultural. Britain is sick of being lectured by smug bureaucrats and rainbow-flagged ministries. The country doesn't want government pronoun guides, taxpayer-funded drag shows, or DEI officers scolding them into submission. They want safety. Stability. A nation they can recognize. Woke politics has failed--and not softly. It has failed catastrophically. It has created chaos in classrooms, destroyed trust in institutions, and encouraged a culture of censorship, cowardice, and collapse. Farage isn't afraid to say it. He's not afraid to challenge the orthodoxy. That's why they fear him. He's proposed deporting all illegal immigrants, scrapping net-zero targets, and investigating taxpayer waste--bold policies the political class refuses to even discuss. The Global Trend What we're witnessing in Britain is part of a broader global realignment. Elites keep trying to suppress populism--whether in the U.S., France, Canada, or the Netherlands--but they can't kill the hunger for truth and sovereignty. People want their countries back. Farage is Britain's answer. And he's proving once again that one man with guts and a microphone can reshape a nation. A Warning to the Establishment The political class should take this moment very seriously. Because Farage hasn't just returned--he's igniting something bigger than himself. And the people of England? They're no longer whispering. They're roaring. They're done being told to sit down and shut up. They're done being called racist, xenophobic, transphobic, or "far-right" for simply wanting order, culture, and freedom. They're done with being governed by those who don't believe in their country. They're rising. And Farage is leading. The Moment Nigel Farage represents what every free nation needs right now: courage, clarity, and a total rejection of the failed globalist experiment. England isn't collapsing. It's waking up. And as Reform UK rises, the rest of the world should take note. The British lion is roaring again--and this time, they aren't stopping halfway. About the Author: Wendy Kinney is a Christian, legal strategist, attorney, and entrepreneur committed to free speech, financial freedom, and the Constitution. As Founder & CEO of Revere Payments, she protects businesses from financial censorship, ensuring American enterprises remain free. She speaks truth to power with conviction, standing firm in faith, justice, and the unwavering belief that freedom must always be defended. Her work is rooted in light, guided by principle, and fearless in the fight for truth. PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: some good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
amidst all the bad news
#
Peter — we know it feels like there’s bad news happening all the time right now.
**So today, we’re reaching out with three bits of good news from the Heartland:**
1. **Earlier this month, Americans across the Heartland showed up in historic numbers to the No Kings protests.** News outlets are estimating that over five million people showed up nationwide — signaling unprecedented momentum for pro-democracy, pro-freedom movements like ours, even in red and purple states.

2. **After Joni Ernst’s “we all are going to die” comment in reference to the GOP Medicaid cuts, Iowa’s U.S. Senate race was reclassified by TWO of the nation’s top race raters from Solid Republican → Likely Republican.** It’s a small shift, but it’s promising. If we’re going to take back the Senate next year, we need to seriously compete in states like Iowa (and Kansas and Ohio) across the Heartland — and now, experts are confirming that we can.

3. **Elon Musk spent millions of dollars to prop up a candidate for Supreme Court in Wisconsin — and he lost... BIG TIME.** Wisconsin voters proved that their elections cannot be bought by Elon Musk, no matter how much he spends.

These are all promising signs of what could happen in the Heartland in 2026 and beyond. But before we get into the thick of election season, we need to raise the resources necessary to support candidates running in targeted races up and down the ballot.
**[Will you help us build on this positive momentum in the Heartland by rushing a donation of $10 or whatever you can today? Our movement is built by people like YOU, not corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, so we mean it when we say any amount will make a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90125?refcode=em20250622-9040&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9040%2E614464%2EK5b8Vc)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Two things:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, first off, baby tax:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250621-1-160+&t=1&akid=3896%2E734936%2E_xMYgu)
Look at Cooper! So proud to be his dad.
Second, let me put this very bluntly:
There is one party warmongering right now.
One party looking to sell off public lands.
Trying to kill PBS and NPR.
Gutting Medicaid and food assistance and housing assistance.
Destroying the Constitution and ending due process.
Giving billionaires a massive tax cut they don’t even need.
It’s Trump’s party. The party in full control of the federal government. And they are using that power to do a bunch of stuff that everyone hates and nobody wants.
If we want to put a stop to that we have to put our heads down and get to work. That’s what I’m trying to do right now (even with a newborn baby boy).
We have to fight like never before. And I’m asking you for help.
[**Please, make a donation to support our efforts combatting the Trump Administration and stopping all of the ridiculously awful stuff they’re trying to get done.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250621-1-160+&t=2&akid=3896%2E734936%2E_xMYgu)

body:
This is time-sensitive.
| | | Hey team -- It's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I'll cut to the chase: **We NEED you to represent Pennsylvania in our Democratic Strategy Interview for 6/22/25.**

**[I'll tell you more in a moment, but before I do, will you share your answers real quick? >>](http://go.dscc.org/go/21812?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20585%2E9716520%2Ebi04wD)**

| **[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/21812?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20585%2E9716520%2Ebi04wD)**
---

If I've learned anything in politics, it's that getting a head start isn't just important -- it's _crucial._ Victories only happen when we start well _before_ the elections. **And that means today.**

But we also need the right kind of head start. That's why **_not everybody's getting this email._** It's only going to top Democrats with a proven track record of making a difference in our country. **This is your chance to shape our vital 2026 Senate strategy, and believe me, it'll be very hard to get it right without your help.**

Today's survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **I don't have your response on file yet! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now: [www.dscc.org/DemStrategyInterview/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/21812?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20585%2E9716520%2Ebi04wD) **

**[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/21812?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250622-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=20585%2E9716520%2Ebi04wD)**
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Pat
DSCC Research Director

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Please share this message with everyone you know
body:
Our nation needs prayer at this moment
| | | |
---
Friend, please share this message with everyone you know. I need y’all to spread the word that our nation needs to be in deep prayer.
America is very vulnerable after our borders have been open for the past four years and I serve on Homeland Security Committee and I know the threats that are within our own borders.
Over 2 million people came across the border and were never stopped by border patrol and we know that among them are terrorists.
I’m asking that all Christians in Northwest Georgia and across our great country go to prayer for the protection and safety on our own homeland. I’m also asking for everyone to pray for our great men and women in the military who have been called to enter this war and are serving on military bases in the Middle East.
We also need to pray for Americans that may be trapped in Iran for their lives are now in danger. And of course, pray for peace in Israel and the world and for all the innocent people who may now be in harms way.
In the Almighty name of Jesus, the one and only son of God, may the Lord’s will be done on Earth as it is in Heaven.
**For not my will Lord, but only yours. 🙏**
_In Faith,_
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
|
---
|
---
### **_[Unsubscribe from list](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJw8kMtO6zAQhp_G3jVyxo6dLrw4PSHdIRAgKDvHl9SVcyFOUtKnRy2h23--mf_TqKYP3i0SiR0COHoTEQCi_xDAPj8s3Jmv_W7z9FBtbPFILtch_F_JGe5sq1U4zS8n9fYeZ_rsP87fhzm90-PS2zu7Via2UT5cU1FgI3PhlHHYylRkhNM0owwf5VanjOXcaM711m6dc65SYKlSxmXECewlEMgIBwCgkEKSVYzqXORKZFxVmiFGbkVJPVjbWqa7th5sjInuGhzkcRz7ePMqEZTNWCftpIOd4u-S7hoE5WqMoIxTFfXg-9F3bURQTu2aVBbR8vY-WnwOxWvPlwsepOnPPgQfuUCM1H8n8SzhJwAA__-YzXUu)_**

| | | **Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says, “The President’s disastrous decision to bomb Iran without authorization is a grave violation of the Constitution and Congressional War Powers... It is absolutely and clearly grounds for impeachment.”**
**[Tell Congress: Impeach warmonger Trump NOW for launching illegal airstrikes against Iran!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoGo1a6gzIGaWnavBRqAbg6uAtQ4JqTvMyXk1fVW-h1uH1Be4OCHg1h1rM8zL6uSbZkGKTjhEc1vtTnFalrCvWyOYIFKPUIGuJuFfiaAQJAGQMcvODjVTxox0XAvmyIuYSx7M1M5qDvHcOTKiUlrPsgh_0jT2m7BmHxe2VZThIIktgZBl1zI-h21sEvmV8tNYobDxfwoh-AFlGCe_ch7eDgdbdiexvKYYIguogD3gE-aq1MGLe2rpH6TfyW3oyXcMgGAJM0iUjzm2UCiE2Us0WSIYjeSYhtn4KzoUyPPVhFt7Q/4hk/yYsFuUG_T8WUnChwbwfpog/h0/h001.Np8fnMsw_mGtJFj-RH-Mcw4W_0FgV3-UfUBHyTlVNbk)**

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: This situation is DIRE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:

clean_body: This is Newt Gingrich. I usually don't send messages like this, but I'm afraid the situation in must-win South Texas is DIRE right now! Texas-15 - once a stronghold for Democrats - is now a purple district thanks to the tireless efforts of MAGA conservative, Monica De La Cruz. Unfortunately, we're in a bind right now. Allow me to go into more detail: 1 -> A top liberal Super PAC just unleashed a whopping $50M+ worth of attack ads on the most vulnerable GOP Members, including Monica. 2 -> The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) released their list of the 45 most vulnerable Republicans they're targeting - and Monica De La Cruz is their ONLY TARGET in all of Texas. 3 -> They're planning an ALL-OUT BLITZ to destroy Monica and replace her with a weak liberal. That's why I cannot overstate the importance of this race. We can't sit back while Democrats run smear campaigns against vulnerable Republicans like Monica De La Cruz. Our House Majority is RAZOR-THIN, and if we lose Texas-15, it will result in dire consequences for the GOP. She can't win without an immediate fundraising surge. And that can't happen without good folks like you chipping in a couple bucks here and there. the reality: This race will be won or lost on the ground with door-to-door campaigning, phone calls, and get-out-the-vote efforts. It's going to take all of us - working together - to make sure Monica has the resources to fund these key programs. Don 't forget this - the ENTIRE House Majority hangs in the balance and Monica De La Cruz is the key to saving it. That's why I'm reaching out to you on her behalf. So can you please help out? | | | ---|---|--- Thank you, Peter. Newt Gingrich * National Democrats already pledged up to FIFTY MILLION dollars to wipe me out for being a MAGA Latina in a purple district... And that was all BEFORE I was added to this new target list! There's still time to right the ship as long as we move right now. - Monica De La Cruz | | | | Paid for by Monica for Congress PO Box 4605 McAllen, Texas 78502 To unsubscribe from Monica for Congress, |

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110060234/553136062/963696235?refcode=250622_Sherrill_Decision&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTRmYTZmOC1jMDRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEB3qYTilW88gtlCqJqVDWgqwR4xjJLdzGa3RgpdXfs=)** Team — I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success. **I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.** This country gave my family so much, and it’s always been obvious to me that I wanted to dedicate my life to public service. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an Outreach and Reentry Coordinator and a federal prosecutor. **Team, it’s why I first decided to run for office.** In 2017, I watched Donald Trump attack every value that I had spent my life fighting for. And as I thought about it, I realized I couldn’t ask someone to do my fighting for me – that if I wanted to defend the country I love then I had to run toward the crisis. It was a long shot to run as a nobody in a district that had been held by an entrenched Republican for more than two decades. **But I knew what was at stake and I knew what I had to do.** I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Congress — work that earned me the distinction of being named the most effective member of the New Jersey House delegation in just my second term. **But I know I can do more as your governor. And that’s why I decided to run.** By winning this seat, we can build more homes to reduce mortgage and rental costs, crack down on shady middlemen making prescription medications more expensive, and bring down utility costs by bringing more clean, cheap power like solar onto the grid. But the truth is that this is already the most expensive New Jersey gubernatorial race on record. And our opponent is benefiting from millions of dollars in spending from outside entities. So I am asking: [**Will you consider splitting $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Ohio House Dems?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110060235/553136063/963696235?refcode=250622_Sherrill_Decision&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTRmYTZmOC1jMDRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEB3qYTilW88gtlCqJqVDWgqwR4xjJLdzGa3RgpdXfs=) | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110060236/553136064/1509077774?amount=10&refcode=250622_Sherrill_Decision&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTRmYTZmOC1jMDRmLWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEB3qYTilW88gtlCqJqVDWgqwR4xjJLdzGa3RgpdXfs= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

name: Cliff Schecter with Blue Amp
subject: The U.S. Has Never Been a Bigger Target for Terrorism
body:
Trump is the Reason Why

# [The U.S. Has Never Been a Bigger Target for Terrorism](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=166545350&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY2NTQ1MzUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NTA2MzU5MTEsImV4cCI6MTc1MzIyNzkxMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.EcDj_KF8J0QUGV2t1qOp2wB-wc6Sef42pc9OZLuwefg)

In 1941, the Japanese high command was considering launching a surprise attack on the United States. Their top commander, Admiral Yamamoto Isoroku, handed them a plan for a crippling strike on Pearl Harbor. But it came with an ominous warning: "In the first six to twelve months of a war with the United States ... I will run wild and win victory upon victory. But then, if the war continues after that, I have no expectation of success."
Before Pearl Harbor, America had been willfully blind to the world burning. The anti-war arguments of the rabidly isolationist America First Committee (AFC) carried crushing support in public opinion polls. Two days after Pearl Harbor, American public backing for war had become nearly unanimous and AFC had "pledged their full support."
Sixty years later, the post-9/11 rally around the flag showed that this American capacity to unify and mobilize in a crisis was undimmed with the passage of time. Former President George W. Bush had a bare majority of public backing, with Democrats still bitter from the 2000 election, when Bush became the first President to lose the popular vote, yet become President, in over 100 years.
Two weeks after the Twin Towers fell, Bush had soared to 90 percent approval, and a Congress evenly split between the parties would go on to overwhelmingly pass 48 vigorous legislative responses, while the U.S. invasion of Afghanistan would decimate the leadership of Al-Qaeda and much of the Taliban leadership providing safe harbor for them.
For the past century, that's been the hidden power of this superpower: a strategic reserve of mutual trust and dormant energy which allowed us to black start from divided jumble to fearsome juggernaut.
This is not an infinitely renewable resource. It requires confidence that our leaders will wield the awesome power of our shared determination to act in the nation's best interests. That confidence can be depleted.
As Bush began to exchange patriotic determination for the cheaper coin of political leverage--in order to push ahead with his attack on Iraq and quixotic partisan projects like privatizing Social Security--Democrats became justifiably suspicious that they had been played, their trauma used and then weaponized not against enemies, but against them. That left cracks in our shared vessel.
Over the past 10 years, President Donald Trump has transformed these cracks into caverns.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73b9a76c-3a19-435b-8817-73b957c207c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump has repeatedly shown that for him, there is no national interest. He cares only for ever more money, vengeance, and power. Like any junkie, he continually ups the dosage, provoking his opposition with greater outrage to stoke the division that fuels his political life and the petty dominance displays that apparently feed a desperate soul.
In just the past month he has monetized the presidency to the tune of billions of dollars (crypto dinners, Qatari jets) handed out favors to those who pay him (corrupt pardons, more crypto operators) or fluff him (reality stars, corrupt right wing officials), sought retribution against opponents (law firms, New York Attorney General Leticia James, Democrats), and picked fights with everyone (NATO, China, Ukraine, Russia, Canada, Denmark, penguins). Our strategic trust reserve is now dry.
There is no action that his government could take in a crisis that we could rally around.

And that is incredibly dangerous. We've seen why. Remember that Israel's defense establishment warned Benjamin Netanyahu four different times that his Trumpian moves in 2023--leading to internal dissent and unrest--would make Israel a target for a terrorist attack. They did.
As former vice presidential candidate and Congressman Jack Kemp once observed, weakness is provocative. What a provocation America currently presents.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3afb4b19-60f2-4289-8a99-cacc7330bede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Consider this thought experiment (because, our enemies surely have): what would happen if there were even a moderate-sized terrorist attack in America tomorrow? Well, all you have to do is look at the reaction to last week's protests in Los Angeles. Trump's every move created only more anger and fear--likely intentionally. And that was a minor security situation.
So imagine how America would respond to a major act of terrorism in the homeland. Could we take any of Trump's border security measures at face value after his never-ending cries of "wolf?"
If we were the target of a biological attack, would _anyone_ follow the guidance of a Centers for Disease Control and Prevention that is under the thumb of Robert F. Kennedy Jr., a man who doesn't believe that germs cause disease?
If Trump launched a military response, would half of Americans see it as a self-serving "wag the dog" exercise? Many are already referring to his decision to bomb uranium enrichment sites in Iran this way.
Maybe we would reach deep into America's historic DNA and come together. But, it's far more likely that America would melt into a series of lawsuits, infighting, and paranoia.
The whole point of terrorism is to have an asymmetrical impact: for a small force to achieve a big effect. It is hard to imagine a time where such a vast potential effect has been on offer. Where our country could be so easily broken into many pieces.
Our enemies undoubtedly see this--some, such as Putin and Xi, have undeniably used disinformation to contribute to it. Certainly, they possess the imagination to think of what they could do now that our greatest deterrent asset has been sapped.
Abraham Lincoln once warned that a house divided against itself cannot stand. When it comes to the threat of terrorism against Americans, Trump has spent his days ripping out the beams.
